job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Be part of a cutting-edge, global product Fast-tracked growth & exciting challenges everyday Excellent salary and perks The Job At LeapXpert, we're revolutionizing business communication by seamlessly integrating the familiarity of consumer messaging apps with enterprise-grade security and compliance. As pioneers in responsible business communications, we empower employees and clients to connect through their preferred messaging platforms while upholding the highest standards of governance and security. Our mission is to transform workplace communication globally. We've been recognized as a Visionary in Gartner's Magic Quadrant for Digital Communications Governance and Archiving Solutions, raised a $20 million Series B funding round - bringing our total funding to $60 million, and earned the trust of top-tier institutions worldwide, who rely on our platform daily to streamline client communications. This is just the beginning - we're growing rapidly, and we're seeking passionate, talented individuals to join our team. This is your opportunity to work on impactful projects using cutting-edge technologies alongside driven innovators from around the world. Apply now to be part of something revolutionary! Why join us Innovative Culture: Work at the cutting edge of business communication technology, with a product that’s changing the way Fortune 500 companies communicate. Impactful Work: Your contributions will directly impact how millions of professionalsconnect and collaborate worldwide. Global Team: Be part of a diverse, mission-driven team that values collaboration, innovation, and growth. Growth Opportunities: With our rapid expansion, there are plenty of opportunities for professional growth and development. Award-Winning Product: Join a company with a track record of success and recognition, including accolades like being named a Gartner Cool Vendor. About the role LeapXpert is transforming how regulated enterprises communicate compliantly across modern messaging channels. As we scale our R&D organization across 15 product squads and shift toward an agentic AI development model, we need someone to own the knowledge infrastructure that powers it all. This is not a traditional technical writing role. You won’t be measured by pages produced. You’ll be measured by how well our documentation system scales, how quickly squads ship accurate docs alongside features, and how reliably our knowledge assets serve both internal teams and enterprise customers in regulated industries. Title: Knowledge Systems Lead (formerly Technical Writer) Function: Product Reporting: Head of Product Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam What you’ll own Documentation Pipeline Architecture Design and operate the end-to-end agentic documentation pipeline — from PRD and spec inputs through AI-assisted drafting to published output Define the toolchain: structured authoring tools, doc-as-code workflows, version control, and publishing infrastructure Build and maintain prompt frameworks that generate first drafts from structured inputs (Jira tickets, PRDs, API specs, release notes) Quality Standards & Governance Set and enforce content standards across all 15 squads — tone, structure, accuracy, and compliance-safe language Act as the adversarial reviewer on AI-generated content — catching hallucinations, missing regulatory caveats, and contradictions with platform behavior Own the compliance language library: approved phrasing for SEC 17a-4, FINRA, MiFID II, GDPR, and other frameworks LeapXpert operates within Knowledge Architecture Design and maintain the content taxonomy across product areas (messaging channels, compliance features, admin, integrations) Ensure documentation is structured as machine-readable knowledge — optimized for RAG retrieval, AI chatbot grounding, and customer-facing search Own the single source of truth strategy: eliminate duplication, manage versioning across product bundles (Essentials, Enterprise, Enterprise+) Squad Enablement Embed documentation checkpoints into the product development lifecycle — not as a downstream task but as a release gate Train PMs and engineers on structured writing inputs so AI pipeline outputs improve over time Provide squad-level support during major integration launches (WhatsApp, Telegram, RCS, LINE, etc.) What success looks like Documentation ships alongside features, not weeks after AI pipeline reduces manual drafting effort by 60%+ within 12 months Zero documentation-related compliance incidents with enterprise customers Squads self-serve 80% of routine doc updates through the pipeline with minimal intervention Knowledge base serves as a reliable grounding source for internal AI tools and customer-facing chatbots Your Skills and Experience What you bring Must-have Proven ability to design or operate documentation workflows — we care more about what you’ve shipped and how you think than how long you’ve been doing it Hands-on experience with docs-as-code workflows (Git, Markdown, static site generators like Docusaurus or MkDocs) Strong editorial judgment — you can spot when AI output is subtly wrong, not just obviously wrong Ability to read and interpret API documentation, PRDs, and engineering specs independently Experience designing or operating AI-assisted content pipelines — or demonstrated hands-on experimentation with AI writing tools in a structured workflow Strong advantage Familiarity with structured authoring standards (DITA, content reuse patterns) Background in compliance, fintech, or other regulated SaaS environments Prompt engineering experience applied to documentation or knowledge workflows Mindset Systems thinker first, writer second Comfortable owning ambiguous infrastructure problems without a playbook Proactive about flagging when documentation is a risk, not just a gap What this role is not It is not a high-volume drafting role — AI handles first drafts It is not a support function that activates after engineering ships — you’re upstream It is not isolated from product decisions — you have a seat in the product development lifecycle Why You'll Love Working Here Our Values Curiosity: We’re curious and future-focused. One Team: We’re one team, in many colors. Customer–Driven: We’re obsessed with the customer. Integrity: We don’t compromise on the integrity. Excellence: We exemplify excellence. What you’ll get An awesome job with an attractive remuneration package Comfortable environment and settings Friendly colleagues who support each other to win as a team A flat, product-focused organization and Agile team to let you add your value and ideas to the product and company Opportunities to learn and be trained in applied new technologies and methodologies Facing new and innovative challenges to deliver commercial-grade, world-class product Career growth in multiple directions, based on your preferences and abilities Benefits 13th Salary, paid pro-rata, every month to allow more flexible financial plans 18 annual Leaves and 1 birthday leave Full salary on probation Fully social insurance according to Vietnam Labor Law Premium Health Care Insurance and Annual health check Lunch and parking allowances Team building, fun monthly, quarterly activities, and so much more fun are waiting for you! Annual Performance Review Attractive career path Advanced technical solutions, agile culture, and the opportunity to work with the latest technologies LeapXpert values diversity and inclusion as critical components of our culture and success. We believe a diverse team with various backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives fosters creativity, innovation, and mutual respect. We are committed to creating a welcoming and supportive environment where everyone can thrive regardless of ethnicity, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, religion, or ability. We actively seek to recruit and retain talent from diverse communities and encourage all qualified candidates to apply. Please submit your resume for consideration.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Design, develop, and deploy AI-integrated applications that solve real logistics and operations problems. Identify opportunities for AI/LLM-driven automation across Sales, Customer Service, Operations, and Finance, and propose data-driven solutions. job_title: AI/ML Developer Python, LLM, Redis, LLM
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are looking for an AI Agent / Applied LLM Engineer to design and build LLM/VLM-based agent systems that automate or support specific tasks based on structured/unstructured data. This role is not just about building simple chatbots, but developing search, reasoning, and execution-based AI systems connected to documents, databases, APIs, and internal systems. Job Description Data Pipeline & Preprocessing: Collect, refine, and structure data (documents, tables, images, logs, DB, etc.) into AI-ready formats. Build pipelines including document parsing, OCR, chunking, and metadata design. RAG System Development: Design and implement RAG systems using Embedding, Vector DB, Hybrid Search, and Re-ranking. AI Agent Design: Develop LLM/VLM-based agents capable of Query Routing, Tool Calling, Workflow Orchestration, Multi-step Reasoning, and Human-in-the-loop interaction. System Integration: Develop AI functions integrated with customer systems (DB, ERP, MES, PLM, Groupware, internal APIs) using backend frameworks like FastAPI. Deployment & Optimization: Deploy and operate models and search systems in On-premise or Cloud environments. Monitor and improve response quality, search performance, latency, cost, and stability Your Skills and Experience Requirements 2–5 years of experience in LLM/VLM related projects, service development, or research. Strong proficiency in Python and ability to implement systems/services to solve real-world problems. Hands-on experience with core LLM application elements: RAG, Vector DB, search, and Agent Workflows. Experience handling diverse data sources (documents, images, tables, DB, logs). Experience with LLM/VLM APIs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic) or Open Source LLMs. Understanding of Prompt Engineering, Structured Output, and Tool Use/Function Calling. Familiarity with data processing (Pandas, SQL) and unstructured data parsing (PyMuPDF, BeautifulSoup, etc.). Experience with Backend development (FastAPI, Flask, or Django) and Docker-based deployment. Preferred Qualifications Experience with frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, DSPy, or Haystack. Experience in fine-tuning, evaluating, or serving open-source LLMs (vLLM, Ollama, etc.). Experience designing performance monitoring and evaluation metrics (RAGAS, DeepEval). Experience building AI services in On-premise, private cloud, or air-gapped environments. Experience with MLOps and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins). Tech Stack Language: Python, SQL, Bash. AI/LLM: OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, Hugging Face. Framework: LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, FastAPI, Flask. Vector DB/Search: Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, Pinecone, Elasticsearch. Infra/Ops: Docker, Kubernetes, Linux, AWS. Data/Monitoring: Pandas, Redis, MLflow, Langfuse. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job As a Middle-Level AI Engineer, you will be a key contributor to the development and optimization of our AI Agent systems. You will bridge the gap between conceptual architecture and practical implementation, taking ownership of specific modules within our orchestration engine and multi-agent frameworks. You will be responsible for building reliable, scalable features that allow AI Agents to reason, interact with tools, and collaborate effectively. You are expected to work with a high degree of independence while collaborating with senior architects to refine the system's capabilities. Key Responsibilities Feature Ownership: Independently design and implement core features for AI Agents, including tool-use capabilities, function calling, and complex task-reasoning logic. Workflow Implementation: Build and refine sophisticated workflows within our orchestration engine, ensuring efficient task decomposition, execution, and error handling. Advanced LLM Integration: Go beyond basic API calls to optimize LLM performance through advanced prompting techniques (ReAct, Chain-of-Thought), fine-tuning context window management, and handling embeddings. ML Model Application: Integrate and fine-tune traditional machine learning models for tasks such as detection, prediction, and classification to enhance agent decision-making and data processing. Agent Communication & Memory: Implement and maintain protocols for agent-to-agent communication and memory persistence, ensuring data consistency and state management across long-running tasks. Performance Optimization: Monitor agent performance, identify latency bottlenecks in LLM calls, and implement solutions to improve system speed and cost-efficiency. Code Quality & Peer Review: Maintain high code standards through rigorous testing and peer reviews. Assist in the technical growth of junior engineers through mentorship and documentation. Prototyping & Iteration: Translate research findings and senior-level architectural designs into functional prototypes, quickly iterating on agentic design patterns to prove product viability. Your Skills and Experience Required Skills and Qualifications Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related technical field. Experience: 3+ years of professional software engineering experience, with at least 1-2 years of hands-on experience building and deploying AI/LLM applications. Machine Learning Knowledge: Solid understanding of core ML concepts and practical experience implementing models for classification, object detection, or predictive analytics using libraries like Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, or TensorFlow. Python Proficiency: Expert-level proficiency in Python, including experience with asynchronous programming (Asyncio) and building production-grade APIs (FastAPI/Flask). AI Frameworks: Strong experience with modern orchestration frameworks such as LangChain , LlamaIndex , or Haystack . RAG & Vector Data: Solid understanding of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) patterns and experience working with vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, or Milvus). Engineering Best Practices: Deep familiarity with Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud environments (e.g., AWS, Azure, or SAP BTP). Analytical Thinking: Ability to take semi-structured requirements and deliver a structured technical solution with minimal supervision. Preferred Qualifications Multi-Agent Systems: Familiarity with multi-agent orchestration libraries (e.g., Microsoft AutoGen, CrewAI) or custom state-machine logic. LLM Observability: Experience using LLM monitoring and evaluation tools (e.g., LangSmith, Arize Phoenix, or Weights & Biases). Infrastructure: Knowledge of deploying AI agents in scalable, distributed environments and managing model inference costs. Community Engagement: Active involvement in the AI open-source community or a portfolio of personal projects involving autonomous agents. Tham gia tuyển dụng nhân tài, huấn luyện và phát triển đội ngũ Your Skills and Experience - Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực AI/ML. - Chuyên môn: + Hiểu biết sâu về các công nghệ AI/ML/Computer Vision/NLP/LLM... + Có chuyên môn sâu về quản trị dữ liệu - Kỹ năng quản lý: + Kỹ năng lập kế hoạch, tổ chức và quản lý công việc + Kỹ năng ra quyết định, giải quyết vấn đề và quản lý xung đột + Khả năng truyền cảm hứng cho đội ngũ - Yêu cầu khác: + Hiểu biết về các quy định pháp lý, đạo đức liên quan đến AI + Kiến thức về quản trị rủi ro và các tiêu chuẩn ngành MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau: - Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính - Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ - Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp - Kinh nghiệm làm việc - Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật - Nguồn Tuyển dụng Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? job_title: Senior AI Expert Machine Learning, Deep Learning, LLM
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến The Job 2026TD450201 - Senior AI Expert - Tham gia cố vấn và xây dựng chiến lược, định hướng phát triển AI cho Ban lãnh đạo - Giám sát, điều phối và phát triển các dự án, sản phẩm hoặc dịch vụ AI trong ngân hàng. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Make a real impact on global sustainability Career development in a stable global industry Flexible working environment in a trusted company The Job Are you passionate about transforming real business challenges into powerful AI‑driven solutions? At ROSEN, we are integrating Generative AI across our operational value chain to elevate efficiency, unlock new capabilities, and accelerate innovation. We are looking for a hands‑on GenAI Developer who is excited to build, prototype, and deploy AI solutions that make a measurable impact on our daily operations. This is your opportunity to work close to the business, collaborate with domain experts, and turn ideas into production-ready solutions using the latest AI tools and technologies. Your Responsibilities Design, develop, and deploy GenAI-based use cases across ROSEN’s operational value chain Translate business requirements into technical concepts, prototypes, and working applications Build chat agents, copilots, and workflow automations that support operational teams Utilize Microsoft Copilot Studio, Azure AI Services, and automation tools like Power Automate to create scalable AI solutions Integrate GenAI capabilities into existing systems and processes Ensure responsible AI usage, data quality, and compliance with internal security standards Continuously research and evaluate new GenAI technologies, tools, and frameworks Collaborate with cross-functional experts from operations, IT, and business units document solutions and support knowledge transfer across teams Your Skills and Experience Academic degree in the field of information technology, computer science or comparable Minimum of 3 years professional experience in in NodeJS, React, and TypeScript 3 years of professional experience in CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices Proven, hands-on development experience with modern GenAI tools such as Microsoft Copilot / Copilot Studio (Chat Agents, Orchestrators), Power Automate & Power Platform, Azure AI and Azure OpenAI Services, or tools like Cursor, Lovable (AI IDEs) or similar AI-assisted development environments. Experience designing and implementing AI use cases, copilots, or workflow automation with the ability to build prototypes quickly and evolve them into stable applications Understanding of prompt engineering, RAG, and model orchestration Familiarity with APIs, REST interfaces, and integration patterns Strong sense of ownership with end-to-end responsibility for bringing ideas to life Strong problem-solving mindset with a hands-on builder attitude Curiosity and willingness to experiment with new technologies Strong and proactive communication skills with the ability to simplify complexity and to communicate with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders Team spirit and openness to work in an international team across different countries, time zones, and cultures Fluency in English (written and spoken) Why You'll Love Working Here If you are passionate about software development, data engineering, or building scalable digital solutions, ROSEN offers: Global Exposure: Work on international projects with teams across 110+ countries Engineering Meets Technology: Hands-on experience in advanced engineering, data, and digital solutions Career Growth: Structured training, mentorship, and long-term development opportunities Meaningful Impact: Contribute to solutions that enhance safety, reliability, and environmental protection Collaborative Culture: Supportive, knowledge-driven environment that values innovation Stability & Reputation: A trusted global company with 45+ years of proven success … and of course a competitive salary and benefits package and a flexible working environment . Company Benefits 13th month salary Health insurance & medical benefits Festival allowances Newborn allowance Marriage allowance Meal allowance

We welcome expatriates and international professionals to bring fresh perspectives and help shape the future of technology. job_title: Agentic Engineer Python/Go/C/C++ Backend  AI Agents
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến The Job 2026TD450887 - Agentic Engineer (Python/Go/C/C++ Backend & AI Agents) Xây dựng phát triển các sản phẩm AI có khả năng tự động lập kế hoạch, ra quyết định và thực thi hành động, được triển khai thực tế ở quy mô lớn, các hệ thống AI thế hệ mới như: - AI Agents (Autonomous Agents) - LLM-powered Applications - Multi-agent Workflow Systems - AI-driven Backend Services - Intelligent Automation Platforms Trách nhiệm công việc (Responsibilities): - Thiết kế và phát triển các hệ thống Backend tích hợp AI/LLM Agents. - Xây dựng các Agentic Workflow, A: Planning – Tool Use – Memory – Execution. - Phát triển các dịch vụ AI dưới dạng Microservices (FastAPI/Flask/Django hoặc Java/Go services). - Tích hợp các mô hình AI vào hệ thống sản phẩm qua REST/gRPC APIs. - Triển khai hệ thống AI production-ready với Docker/Kubernetes. - Tối ưu hiệu năng inference: latency, throughput, cost. - Làm việc với dữ liệu lớn và hệ thống có lượng người dùng cao (đặc biệt trong tài chính/ngân hàng/chứng khoán). - Nghiên cứu và ứng dụng các kỹ thuật mới: RAG, Function Calling, Multi-agent systems, Reinforcement Learning Agents. - Đảm bảo các tiêu chuẩn về bảo mật, an toàn và khả năng mở rộng của hệ thống AI. Your Skills and Experience Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, Công nghệ phần mềm, Hệ thống thông tin, Tự động hóa, Điện tử viễn thông hoặc các ngành liên quan Có kinh nghiệm thực tế làm Backend tại công ty hoặc dự án lớn. Thành thạo ít nhất 1 ngôn ngữ Backend: Ưu tiên Python, Go, C/C++ Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế hệ thống Microservice Architecture. Thành thạo một trong các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu:PostgreSQL, MongoDB... Hiểu rõ API design (RESTful/gRPC), bảo mật và tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống. Có kinh nghiệm với: LLM Agents (GPT, Gemini, Claude...), LangChain / LangGraph/ ADK, Autogen, RAG pipelines, Vector Database(Milvus, pgvector...). Tool-use Agents (Function Calling), Memory + Planning + Multi-step reasoning systems Thành thạo Git/GitFlow Có kinh nghiệm: Docker, Kubernetes... Ưu tiên: + Có kinh nghiệm trong domain: Tài chính, ngân hàng, chứng khoán + Hiểu biết về AI Safety, Guardrails, Model Monitoring. + Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu hệ thống AI cost-efficient ở production. + Với ứng viên Junior, Fresher: Ưu tiên các bạn xếp loại học tập loại Giỏi, Xuất sắc; GPA cao; đạt giải thưởng trong các cuộc thi chuyên môn, học sinh giỏi tỉnh, thành phố trở lên; có nghiên cứu khoa học được công bố tại các hội thảo, tạp chí quốc tế (ứng viên cần thể hiện nội dung về GPA, giải thưởng trong CV) + Có kiến thức, Kỹ thuật xử lý dữ liệu:NLP, Computer Vision, Speech, Video Understanding + Hiểu biết kiến trúc mô hình: CNN, RNN, Transformer, Attention, GNN… MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau: - Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính - Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ - Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp - Kinh nghiệm làm việc - Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật - Nguồn Tuyển dụng Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? Thành thạo ít nhất 1 ngôn ngữ Backend: Ưu tiên Python, Go, C/C++ Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế hệ thống Microservice Architecture. Thành thạo một trong các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu:PostgreSQL, MongoDB... Hiểu rõ API design (RESTful/gRPC), bảo mật và tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống. Có kinh nghiệm với: LLM Agents (GPT, Gemini, Claude...), LangChain / LangGraph/ ADK, Autogen, RAG pipelines, Vector Database(Milvus, pgvector...). Tool-use Agents (Function Calling), Memory + Planning + Multi-step reasoning systems Thành thạo Git/GitFlow Có kinh nghiệm: Docker, Kubernetes... Ưu tiên: + Có kinh nghiệm trong domain: Tài chính, ngân hàng, chứng khoán + Hiểu biết về AI Safety, Guardrails, Model Monitoring. + Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu hệ thống AI cost-efficient ở production. + Với ứng viên Junior, Fresher: Ưu tiên các bạn xếp loại học tập loại Giỏi, Xuất sắc; GPA cao; đạt giải thưởng trong các cuộc thi chuyên môn, học sinh giỏi tỉnh, thành phố trở lên; có nghiên cứu khoa học được công bố tại các hội thảo, tạp chí quốc tế (ứng viên cần thể hiện nội dung về GPA, giải thưởng trong CV) + Có kiến thức, Kỹ thuật xử lý dữ liệu:NLP, Computer Vision, Speech, Video Understanding + Hiểu biết kiến trúc mô hình: CNN, RNN, Transformer, Attention, GNN… MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau: - Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính - Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ - Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp - Kinh nghiệm làm việc - Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật - Nguồn Tuyển dụng Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng. - Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất. - Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage: - Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers - Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers - Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers Why You'll Love Working Here Trải nghiệm Thu nhập hấp dẫn với gói đãi ngộ toàn diện: Thưởng thành tích tháng 13; Thưởng thành tích theo kết quả công việc 06 tháng, 1 năm ; Thưởng các dịp lễ tết trong năm ; Thưởng theo danh hiệu cá nhân và tập thể… Du lịch nghỉ dưỡng hàng năm Khám sức khỏe định kì Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân (MIC) Quà tặng và ngày nghỉ sinh nhật hưởng nguyên lương Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân: Được thử sức với các nền tảng công nghệ mới, tham gia vào những dự án chuyển đổi lớn của ngân hàng Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng Được trải nghiệm các phương pháp học tập mới và phát triển năng lực theo lộ trình công danh. company_name: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members 16++ days of paid leave per year The Job The Senior AI Engineer for this global workflow product plays a specialized role at the intersection of reverse engineering and forward-looking product development . Unlike standard AI roles, this position focuses heavily on "unlocking" decades of tribal knowledge and operational data hidden in legacy silos to power the next generation of AI-driven automation. You will lead the technical strategy for extracting, mining, and transforming massive volumes of legacy data into high-quality training sets for AI models. Your mission is to evolve our global workflow product from a reactive IT tool into a proactive, AI-driven platform capable of predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and automated decision-making. Key Responsibilities Legacy Data Mining: Architect and implement advanced data mining techniques to extract valuable operational insights from structured and unstructured legacy systems (e.g., old SQL procedures, mainframe logs, siloed documentation). AI Product Evolution: Design and deploy production-ready ML/Deep Learning models that drive core product features such as intelligent workflow routing, natural language interfaces (LLMs), and predictive analytics. Feature Engineering for Workflows: Lead the discovery and creation of "features" from legacy data that specifically improve IT workflow efficiency, such as identifying bottleneck patterns or predicting system failures. Global Model Management: Oversee the deployment and lifecycle (MLOps) of models across global regions, ensuring low-latency performance and compliance with regional data residency laws (e.g., GDPR, SOC2). Reverse Engineering via GenAI: Utilize Generative AI and LLMs to automate the modernization of legacy codebases, turning outdated scripts into documented, cloud-native services. Cross-Functional Leadership: Mentor junior engineers and collaborate with Product Managers to translate legacy business logic into modern, AI-powered user experiences Your Skills and Experience Technical Skills & Experience Education: Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related quantitative field. Experience: 8+ years in software or data engineering, with at least 4+ years specialized in AI/ML deployment in a global production environment. AI/ML Mastery: Expert proficiency in Python and frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow, or Scikit-learn . Strong experience with LLM Orchestration (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph). Data Mining & Engineering: Deep experience with ETL/ELT pipelines, NoSQL/Graph databases, and tools like Apache Spark or Flink for large-scale data processing. Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with MLOps (MLflow, Airflow), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and global cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP). Specialized Hybrid Skills Legacy System Knowledge: Ability to navigate and extract data from older relational databases or siloed enterprise architectures. Analytical Mindset: Proven track record of identifying high-value AI use cases from messy, real-world "dark data". Strategic Communication: Ability to justify the ROI of legacy data mining projects to senior leadership. Why You'll Love Working Here Private Health Insurance (Generali) : Covered by company Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract) 12 days annual leave

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Team Context You'll join a small, high-output AI/ML team within Microsoft's Lifecycle Scale Solutions (LSS) organization, working across a 10-project AI portfolio that includes AI agents, LLM evaluation tools, NLP pipelines, and ML models. The team innovates, experiments, and builds — from early POCs to production systems on Azure. We serve as customer zero for larger engineering and product teams, piloting new AI tools and patterns for our organization. What You'll Do · Build and deploy AI agents and multi-agent systems on Azure using composable patterns · Build and consume MCP servers to connect agents to internal data sources, tools, and enterprise workflows · Design orchestration patterns, tool integrations, and RAG pipelines · Develop prompt engineering and evaluation workflows (including automated eval loops) · Build APIs for agent integration with enterprise platforms (M365 Copilot, Teams) · Implement data pipelines for unstructured data (transcripts, support interactions) · Set up CI/CD, responsible AI controls, and production monitoring · Use agentic dev tools (GHC CLI, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot agent mode) as your primary development workflow · Flex into low-code agent configuration, infrastructure, and data engineering as needed Your Skills and Experience Must-Have Skills · AI agent development — building and deploying agents on Azure AI Foundry, Microsoft Agent Framework, or equivalent; composable agent patterns · LLM/GenAI engineering — prompt engineering, model selection, evaluation, fine-tuning, structured outputs · AI-native dev tools - GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, etc. · Python (Advanced) — production-quality, async, typed, well-tested code · API development — designing and building production REST APIs · Cloud infrastructure — Azure services, search, identity, deployment pipelines · Good to Have: MCP server development, LLM/ML Ops, PySpark, NLP, Copilot Studio, Power Platform, front-end development, containerization, agent evaluation frameworks Qualifications . 4+ years software engineering, 2+ years building GenAI/LLM solutions in production. Full-stack experience preferred. Must demonstrate hands-on agent or AI system development — not just calling APIs. Experience with MCP or similar agent-tool integration protocols is a strong differentiator. BS/MS in CS or equivalent. . Proficiency in English Why You'll Love Working Here Innovative Work Culture: Join a team where creativity and innovation are at the heart of everything we do. Our IT company thrives on new ideas, and we foster a collaborative environment where every voice is valued and heard. You'll have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects that push the boundaries of technology. Career Growth & Learning Opportunities: We believe in the power of continuous learning. Whether it’s through mentorship, online courses, or access to industry conferences, we provide the tools you need to grow professionally. You’ll have opportunities to learn and advance in your career, all while working with some of the best minds in the industry. Flexible Work Environment: Work-life balance is key. We offer flexible hours and a supportive environment that adapts to your needs. Whether you're a night owl or an early bird, we trust our employees to manage their time in a way that allows for both productivity and personal time. Collaborative Team Spirit: We know that great things happen when people come together. Our teams are diverse, inclusive, and driven to succeed. From brainstorming sessions to cross-departmental collaboration, you’ll work with talented individuals who are passionate about what they do.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Lead the design and implementation of AI/ML solutions for complex, real-world business use cases Architect scalable AI systems covering data pipelines, model development, MLOps, deployment, and monitoring Collaborate closely with Consulting, Data, Cloud, and Engineering teams to ensure alignment between business objectives and technical solutions Review technical designs, code, and model performance to ensure quality, security, and scalability Mentor and coach Junior/Mid level AI Engineers, providing technical guidance and code reviews Support pre-sales activities such as solution ideation, technical proposals, and client workshops when required. Prepare and present technical documentation, solution architectures, and knowledge-sharing materials for internal teams and clients Proactively propose new AI approaches, tools, and architectures to improve delivery efficiency and business impact Your Skills and Experience 1. Senior AI Engineer Experience: 3–5 years of experience in developing AI solutions/AI Agents, with a strong preference for practical, production-grade projects. LLM Expertise: Proven track record in deploying and optimizing solutions using Azure OpenAI/OpenAI APIs . Deep understanding of prompt engineering and context management for conversational AI. Backend Development: Proficient in Python and building backend services (APIs). Experienced in integrating AI with chat channels (Web, Zalo OA, etc.) and enterprise systems. Knowledge Retrieval: Hands-on experience with Vector Databases (FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.) and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) techniques for building knowledge bases. Agentic Workflows: Ability to implement tool calling , workflow orchestration, and complex business logic integration across multiple systems. Cloud & DevSecOps: Experience with cloud platforms ( Azure/AWS ), performance optimization, LLM cost management, and data security standards. ⭐ Nice-to-Have: Experience in Web Scraping/Crawling (BeautifulSoup, Playwright, Selenium, etc.). Knowledge of Data Analytics, Dashboards, or BI tools. 2. Junior AI Engineer Experience: 1–2 years of experience in developing AI Chatbots or AI Agents. Programming: Proficient in Python with the ability to build basic APIs and handle data processing (scripting, crawling, data cleaning). AI Frameworks: Solid understanding of LLMs and experience with OpenAI/Azure OpenAI APIs or frameworks like LangChain and LlamaIndex . Data Handling: Experience working with databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and processing various file formats (Excel, PDF, JSON, etc.). Teamwork: Ability to collaborate with Senior Engineers to implement AI modules and integrate them into real-world systems. Soft Skills: Proactive learner with a product-oriented mindset and the ability to adapt to complex business requirements. Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary. Performance based award Annual leave, working conditions follow Vietnam labor laws “FPT Care” health insurance provided by AON and is exclusive for FPT employees International, dynamic, friendly working environment Successful candidates will be offered a friendly, motivated working environment Continuous development of hard and soft skills through work and professional trainings

The Job Design and develop core AI components and frameworks that can be reused across projects. Define common architectures, design patterns (blueprints), and technical standards for building AI-based systems. Build and improve internal tools and platforms to support the development and deployment of AI solutions. Work closely with Applied AI Engineers to ensure core components are practical and usable in real projects. Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability for AI-based applications. Design and organize workflows for AI systems (e.g. LLM-based applications). Analyze real business problems and translate them into working technical solutions. Share knowledge, document solutions, and contribute to continuous improvement within the team. Your Skills and Experience 2+ years of experience in software engineering, with hands-on experience in building AI systems using Python. Good understanding of software architecture and system design. Experience developing production-ready applications (reliability, performance, scalability). Familiarity with LLM-based applications or modern AI tools is a strong advantage. Experience with some of the following tools/technologies is a plus: JupyterLab, Playwright, SearXNG, MinrU, LiteLLM, Presidio, NATS, Open WebUI, Milvus, PostgreSQL, SeaweedFS, Redis, and OpenTelemetry. Experience in building reusable components, libraries, or frameworks is preferred. Ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Good English communication skills (both speaking and writing). Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary with full insurance coverage (medical, social, unemployment) based on net salary. 13th-month salary (paid semi-annually, with partial payment made mid-year rather than waiting until year-end). Performance review twice a year with bonus opportunities. Annual loyalty bonus (50% of monthly net salary from the 2nd year). Premium health insurance and annual health check-up. 14 days of leave, plus additional leave based on tenure. Daily perks: lunch allowance, free snacks/coffee, and sports activities. Learning & development support: training programs and certification sponsorship. English-speaking environment with tuition support. Team activities and events: company trips, team building, and holiday celebrations. Opportunity to work with international teams and join internal tech communities.

Your Skills and Experience 1. Must have · At least 2 years experiences in Digital Image Processing and Computer Vision. · Good programming skill in one of languages C, C++. C#. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Role Purpose We are building an AI Factory to transform finance and accounting across Asia, the US, and Europe. This role is critical in designing, developing, and deploying AI-driven automation, ML models, and agentic AI workflows that improve productivity, accuracy, and insight generation for a 600-person finance organization. The Data Scientist will partner with FP&A, Accounting, Tax, Treasury, and IT teams to industrialize AI solutions — from prototype to scaled production — with a focus on measurable business outcomes (time savings, error reduction, working capital impact, forecast accuracy). Key Responsibilities Design and deploy AI/ML pipelines to automate finance processes (close, reconciliation, forecasting, tax analytics). Develop agentic AI systems (multi-agent workflows with CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph, or similar). Integrate AI solutions with enterprise platforms (ERP, BI tools, Dataiku, Google Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI). Build supervised/unsupervised ML models (forecasting, anomaly detection, fraud/risk analysis). Fine-tune LLMs on finance datasets with strict compliance and governance controls. Implement monitoring, retraining, and performance management frameworks for models. Translate finance workflows into measurable AI use-cases with ROI (e.g., >20% time savings, >30% accuracy uplift). Deliver pilots in <90 days and scale to enterprise level within 6–12 months. Work closely with process owners to ensure adoption and governance. Ensure AI solutions meet audit, data privacy, and regulatory requirements. Build explainability and traceability into deployed models. Your Skills and Experience Candidate Profile **Must-have** 4–7 years in data science / ML engineering with proven production deployments. Hands-on experience with AI factory models: modular design, reusable components, orchestration frameworks. Proficient in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch/TensorFlow), SQL, APIs. Experience with agentic AI frameworks: CrewAI, AutoGen, LangChain, LangGraph, or similar. Cloud deployment skills: Google Vertex AI, Azure ML, AWS Sagemaker, or equivalent. Strong track record in delivering business productivity projects with measurable ROI. **Nice-to-have** Exposure to finance/accounting processes (forecasting, close, compliance, treasury). Familiarity with Dataiku DSS or similar low-code AI factory platforms. Experience with workflow automation (Power Automate, UiPath, n8n). Previous work in a shared services or multinational finance organization. Bilingual (Vietnamese + English). Key Metrics of Success (First 12 Months) Deliver ≥3 AI pilots in FP&A/Accounting with >20% productivity gain. Build reusable AI components for the finance AI Factory (agents, connectors, templates). Demonstrate cost savings of >US$500k equivalent through AI-enabled automation. Establish governance framework for AI in Finance (accuracy, audit, risk). Why You'll Love Working Here 14 days Annual leaves + 3 Sick leaves Private Health Insurance Annual Salary Review Performance Bonus 100% salary in probation period Free LinkedIn Learning Account Company Events & Team Building Opportunity to build the first AI Factory in finance across a global enterprise. Work on cutting-edge agentic AI and enterprise AI tools. Be part of a lean, high-impact team reporting to global finance leadership. Competitive package and growth path within a multinational group.

job_title: Lead QC Engineer Automation  Gen AI
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Disruptive innovations People-oriented philosophy of doing business Your footprint on regional on-demand market The Job We are seeking a visionary Lead QC Engineer with 5–7 years of experience to spearhead our transition into AI-augmented quality engineering. In this role, you will architect an Automation-First ecosystem powered by Generative AI and high-velocity deployment tools. You aren't just managing a test suite; you are leveraging cutting-edge CLI tools like Claude Code and robust frameworks like Antigravity to ensure reliability at the speed of modern development. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES Automation & Gen AI Execution (65%) AI-Native Development: Use Claude Code (CLI) to accelerate script generation, perform real-time code refactoring, and automate the creation of complex test suites directly from the terminal. High-Velocity Execution: Implement and maintain automation workflows using Antigravity, ensuring tests are lightweight, fast-executing, and resilient across different environments. Gen AI Execution Strategy: Build "Prompt Libraries" and AI agents to handle the heavy lifting of manual-to-automated script conversion (Playwright/Cypress). CI/CD Intelligence: Integrate AI-driven insights into GitLab/Jenkins pipelines to predict "flaky" tests and optimize execution paths based on code changes. Self-Healing Frameworks: Design automation layers that utilize LLMs to self-correct scripts when UI elements or API contracts shift. Process Innovation & Strategy (20%) Workflow Engineering: Re-engineer the QC lifecycle by deploying AI agents for defect triaging, log analysis, and automated bug reporting. Tech Advocacy: Continuously evaluate the intersection of Claude Code, LLMs, and Antigravity to minimize "gravity" (friction) in the release cycle. Efficiency Metrics: Define and track "AI-Lift" metrics—measuring how AI integration reduces time-to-market and increases test coverage. Leadership & Mentorship (15%) The "Automation-Mindset": Coach the team to move beyond manual validation, fostering a culture where AI assistants are the primary driver for efficiency. Strategic Alignment: Partner with DevOps and Engineering leads to align quality gates with rapid, "Antigravity-speed" deployment cycles. Your Skills and Experience Experience: 5–7 years in QA/QC, with at least 2 years in a Lead capacity spearheading automation initiatives. Automation Mastery: Expert-level proficiency in Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, or Java. Hands-on experience with Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium. Advanced Tooling & AI: Claude Code: Proficiency in using Claude’s CLI for agentic coding, automated debugging, and script generation. Antigravity: Proven experience leveraging Antigravity for high-efficiency test execution and infrastructure management. LLM Literacy: Expert at using GPT-4, Claude 3.5/4, and AI-powered IDEs (Cursor/GitHub Copilot). Technical Stack: Deep knowledge of API Testing (Postman, RestAssured) and Microservices. Proficiency in Docker/K8s and cloud-native environments. job_title: Remote Data Engineer - AI Data Platform Japan Python
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 100% remote—work from anywhere with flexible hours Claude Code MAX ($200/month) provided from Day 1 Build pipelines for 8B data points—largest in SEA The Job What Makes SalesNow Different Data scale: 8B data points, 14M records, 2.3M daily updates (vs. 1M-100M rows at typical companies) Data ownership: You build and own Japan's largest corporate intelligence platform (vs. processing someone else's data) AI integration: 20+ AI pipelines in production, MCP Server live (vs. "We're planning to use AI someday") Dev tools: Claude Code MAX ($200/month), Cursor, CodeRabbit — all company-paid (vs. standard IDE, maybe Copilot) Your code's impact: Feeds AI products used by enterprise clients, millisecond latency matters (vs. dashboards no one reads) Career trajectory: Build Japan's data infrastructure → architect AI data products → global leverage (vs. same stack forever) Remote work: 100% remote, no relocation required (vs. hybrid / office-required) Why This Role Exists AI models are commodities now. The cost of running GPT-3.5-equivalent models dropped 280x in two years. Every company has access to the same foundation models. The war moved to data — who owns it, who structures it, who feeds it to AI. Oracle's Larry Ellison said it plainly on his December 2025 earnings call: "AI models are trained on the same public data, so they're rapidly commoditizing. AI inference on private data will be an even bigger, more valuable business." McKinsey echoes: "By 2030, the AI leaders will be defined not by who trained the biggest model, but by who built the most reliable systems on proprietary data." SalesNow owns 14 million company records and 8 billion data points — the largest structured corporate intelligence platform in Japan. This data updates 2.3 million records daily, with differential refresh as fast as every 60 seconds. Hiring signals, funding rounds, organizational changes, press releases, job postings — all structured, all real-time, all proprietary. This data doesn't exist inside any LLM's training set. The only way to access it is through SalesNow. That's the moat. We need data engineers who can build and scale the pipelines that make this moat wider every day. What You'll Build This is not "maintain existing ETL jobs." You're building the data nervous system of Japan's corporate intelligence. The Scale 14 million+ company records across Japan's entire business landscape — from Toyota to a 3-person startup in Okinawa 8 billion data points structured and queryable at millisecond speed 2.3 million records updated daily — hiring signals, funding rounds, organizational changes, press releases, job postings Sub-minute differential refresh — when a company posts a new job or announces funding, SalesNow knows within 60 seconds 42+ data sources feeding into a unified schema 5 delivery formats: Web app UI / CRM integration (Salesforce, HubSpot) / MCP Server / Data API / Custom AI Agents AI-Native Development Culture SalesNow doesn't just "use AI." AI is the operating system of how we build software. What this means for you, concretely: Claude Code MAX — Company-paid for every engineer. This is a $200/month tool that most individual developers can't justify. You get it Day 1, fully covered Monthly AI tool budget — Tens of thousands of yen per person, on top of Claude Code MAX, for any AI tool you want to try CodeRabbit — Automated PR reviews powered by AI. Every pull request gets AI review before human review Vibe coding culture — Not just engineers. The CEO, COO, and business teams all write code with AI assistance. When you propose a technical solution, leadership actually understands it 20+ AI pipelines in production — X post generation, candidate screening, PR monitoring, behavioral analytics, financial page generation — all running daily in production. This isn't a demo. It's how the company operates No "AI committee" or "innovation lab" gatekeeping — You want to try a new approach? Ship it. The decision loop is measured in hours, not quarters Why this matters for your career: In 3 years, every engineering role will require AI-native development skills. At SalesNow, you build those skills now — not by watching tutorials, but by shipping production AI systems daily. Before You Apply — Quick Self-Check Please confirm the following before submitting your application: I have professional experience building data pipelines or data processing systems with Python I have professional experience writing SQL queries and working with databases I am available for full-time remote work (40 hours/week) Bonus: Japanese language ability (JLPT N3+) is a strong plus. In Your Cover Letter, Please Include: 1. The largest dataset or data pipeline you've worked with — how many records per day, and what did it do? 2. What was the most technically challenging problem you solved in your career? (1-2 sentences is fine) 3. Which data tools or frameworks have you used? (e.g., Airflow, dbt, Spark, Kafka, Elasticsearch — list any that apply) Your Skills and Experience Must Have 2+ years of professional data engineering experience Strong Python skills — clean, testable pipeline code Strong SQL skills — complex queries, window functions, query optimization Experience with at least one orchestration tool — Airflow, Dagster, Prefect, or equivalent Experience with relational databases at scale — PostgreSQL preferred English proficiency (professional working level) Nice to Have Experience with Elasticsearch or OpenSearch at scale dbt experience Web scraping / large-scale data collection systems Experience with data quality frameworks and monitoring AWS experience (S3, Lambda, ECS, RDS, etc.) RAG pipeline / vector database experience Experience processing 1M+ records daily Japanese language ability (JLPT N3 or above) Why You'll Love Working Here Salary: $1,000–$2,500 USD/month (25–62 triệu VND) MacBook provided Full-time contract via EOR (local legal employment) Paid leave per local labor law Performance-based salary review every 6 months AI translation tools provided (company-paid) Monthly AI tool budget in addition to Claude Code MAX

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Lương/ thưởng hấp dẫn Cơ hội thăng tiến nghề nghiệp cao Môi trường làm việc thân thiện, năng động The Job 1. Trách nhiệm trong Xây dựng và quản lý thiết kế nền tảng AI: Thiết kế và xây dựng nền tảng AI nhằm phát triển các ứng dụng AI với các agentic AI và tinh chỉnh các mô hình sử dụng LLM, VLM. Dẫn dắt nhóm phát triển AI thực hiện dự án bằng cách cung cấp hướng dẫn kỹ thuật trong suốt vòng đời phát triển phần mềm. Xác định chiến lược AI và hợp tác chặt chẽ với các bên liên quan trong doanh nghiệp để đảm bảo các giải pháp AI phù hợp với mục tiêu của tổ chức. Thiết kế và tối ưu hóa các mô hình AI để đảm bảo khả năng mở rộng, hiệu suất và hiệu quả. Cung cấp sự lãnh đạo và cố vấn kỹ thuật cho các kỹ sư AI, thúc đẩy văn hóa đổi mới và cải tiến liên tục. Tiến hành nghiên cứu và phát triển chuyên sâu để khám phá các công nghệ và phương pháp luận AI mới. Giám sát việc tích hợp các giải pháp AI với các hệ thống và quy trình kinh doanh hiện có, đảm bảo việc triển khai và vận hành suôn sẻ. Phối hợp với ban lãnh đạo để xác định tầm nhìn và lộ trình AI cho tổ chức 2. Thu thập các usecase từ người dùng nghiệp vụ ABBANK để đưa vào danh sách phát triển. Thường xuyên tổ chức hoặc dẫn dắt tổ chức các buổi giới thiệu về sản phẩm AI, công nghệ AI, đề xuất ứng dụng AI, ... tới đội ngũ công nghệ nhằm lan tỏa và thúc đẩy việc ứng dụng AI và tích hợp AI vào các giải pháp công nghệ 3. job_title: AI-Native Associate Product Manager Japanese required
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Hybrid working; Flexible time; Macbook Pro L&D programs; 17 days off 13.7 million B2C users; 140,000+ business customer The Job Purpose and Objective At Money Forward Vietnam, a Product Manager is “Someone who does whatever it takes for the success of the product.” As an AI-Native Associate Product Manager , you are the driver of product execution and a "Mini-CEO" of your assigned scope. Your mission is to master the Product Management Triangle (Engineering, Business, and User) and leverage AI to bridge the gap between non-verbalized user pain points and high-fidelity technical requirements. You are responsible for navigating complex legal and operational constraints to ensure our products deliver world-class value. About This Role: Responsibilities Absolute Ownership: You own the success of your assigned product area. You identify gaps between departments and proactively resolve issues outside the traditional scope to move the product forward. Cross-Functional Synergy (Sales & CS): You serve as the primary bridge between the product and the front office. You work closely with Sales and Customer Success teams to ensure they are fully equipped to deliver the product's value. You provide expert-level support by addressing complex product inquiries and translating technical capabilities into business benefits. High-Fidelity PRD Development: You translate guidance from Lead PdMs and identified user needs into comprehensive PRDs from scratch. You drive the development process and ensure the output meets the "Money Forward" standard of excellence. Domain Structuring: You move beyond "Domain Knowledge" to "Domain Understanding." You are expected to define the absolute boundaries and legal/operational constraints of complex back-office workflows. Hypothesis-Driven Development: You utilize the "Demo First" approach. Instead of passive interviewing, you present high-fidelity hypotheses and prototypes to stakeholders and customers to extract true, non-verbalized insights. AI Management: You integrate AI tools into your workflow for deep data analysis and to translate vague requirements into high-resolution technical specifications for the engineering team. Your Skills and Experience Your Skills and Experience Core Competencies (The Triangle) User/Domain: Ability to structure complex operations (Finance, Accounting, HR). You must be able to explain the why behind a requirement, not just the what . Business & Communication: Strong interpersonal skills to collaborate with Sales and CS. You act as the product advocate, ensuring that feedback from the field is funneled back into the roadmap while providing the clarity the business side needs to succeed. AI & Technical Execution: You utilize AI tools to analyze data and translate vague requirements into high-resolution specifications. You lead the Agile development cycle by effectively communicating business and user constraints to engineers, ensuring the final output aligns perfectly with the strategic product vision. Minimum Qualifications 1–3 years of experience as a Product Manager, Business Analyst, or in a high-impact architectural role within the Fintech/SaaS sector. Track Record of Ownership: Demonstrated ability to drive projects to completion by taking initiative beyond the standard job description. Strategic Reverse-Calculation: Ability to visualize the "Final Goal" of a product and work backward to define the necessary steps, avoiding the trap of incremental "stacking." Global Communication: Professional fluency in English . Japanese Language Skills (JLPT N2 or higher): Essential for understanding the nuances of Japanese back-office constraints and influencing stakeholders in a multinational environment. Preferred Qualifications Direct experience with ERP, HR, or Accounting systems for SMEs or growth-stage companies. Performance Expectations & Career Growth Success in this role is measured by your ability to evolve from guided execution to independent leadership. You are expected to: Initiate: Proactively propose additional features based on a clear understanding of why a specific function is required at a specific timing. Self-Direct: Transition to identifying product needs and initiating PRDs from necessity without senior follow-up. Support & Empower: Become the go-to expert for Sales and CS, reducing friction in the sales cycle and onboarding process through deep product knowledge and responsive communication. The "Money Forward" Mindset We are looking for product "craftsmen" with the tenacity to commit to a product’s long-term evolution. If you aim to build the No. 1 Product Management team in the global SaaS industry and hold yourself to the highest standards of execution, we want to talk to you. We're looking for a Middle to Senior Frontend Engineer to build intuitive, intelligent interfaces that simplify complex marketing tasks and empower our users to achieve more with less effort. Your core challenges will include: Craft delightful, intuitive interfaces that anticipate user needs across our product suite, including email, forms, checkout, and workflow automation. Build AI-powered features that help users accomplish more: smarter writing assistance, auto-generated designs, and intelligent workflows. Optimize for performance, accessibility, and stability. Drive 80%+ test coverage and maintain our scalable component library across products. Có khả năng sử dụng các phần mềm thiết kế 3D cho thiết bị công nghiệp, lắp ráp thiết bị với bo mạch chính (Jetson), liên hệ các đối tác để in 3D. Có kinh nghiệm hoặc khả năng tìm hiểu để triển khai phần mềm ElectronJS trên thiết bị. Có thành tích học tập tốt: GPA cao các môn chuyên ngành; tham gia/đạt giải các kỳ thi cấp tỉnh, quốc gia hoặc kì thi về lập trình; từng học lớp/trường chuyên; đạt các học bổng, giải thưởng trong quá trình học tập. Điều kiện điểm cộng: có các kinh nghiệm sau C/C++ Python: PyTorch. Typescript: ReactJS, ElectronJS, NodeJS. Triển khai mô hình LLM Why You'll Love Working Here Cấp thiết bị làm việc Ngày nghỉ phép năm
benefits: Cấp thiết bị làm việc Ngày nghỉ phép năm

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến The Job 2026TD450878 - Senior AI Engineer (Computer Vision/NLP/LLM) - Phát triển, ứng dụng, tối ưu, tích hợp mô hình AI cho các bài toán ứng dụng trong hoạt động Kinh doanh/Ngân hàng về các lĩnh vực Computer Vision, NLP... - Tham gia vào các công đoạn triển khai dịch vụ: Kiến trúc hệ thống, thiết kế mô hình hoạt động, luồng hoạt động, chức năng, tối ưu performance - Coding, test metrics, service và unittest theo mô hình DevOps, MLOps - Nghiên cứu, tìm hiểu các bài báo khoa học mới nhất về AI, ML, DL - Với nhóm ứng viên là các bạn chuẩn bị tốt nghiệp tài năng và fresher: tham gia các chương trình đào tạo và dự án dành cho nhân sự tập sự để phát triển lên các vị trí chính thức. Your Skills and Experience Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, Điện tử viễn thông, Công nghệ phần mềm, Hệ thống thông tin.... Yêu cầu ứng viên có từ 2 năm kinh nghiệm ở các vị trí AI. Có kiến thức và kỹ năng về MỘT TRONG NHỮNG nội dung sau: + Ngôn ngữ lập trình Python, C/C++ + Service/MicroService với một trong các framework FastAPI/Flask/Django + Tensorflow/Pytorch/DGL/PyG/Onnx + API (Restful/gRPC), Lập trình an toàn, đảm bảo & tối ưu hiệu năng + Git và Git Flow, Docker/ Kubernete, Kubeflow/MLFlow, TritonServer/ Tensorflow Serving + Các dạng bài toán Supervised learning, Reinforcement learning + Xử lý Ảnh (Computer Vision)/Video/Âm thanh/Ngôn ngữ tự nhiên (NLP) + CNN/RNN/Transformer/Attention, SVM/KNN/Clustering, GNN vv... + Kỹ thuật Knowledge Distiller/ Model Prune, Model Quantization MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau: - Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính - Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ - Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp - Kinh nghiệm làm việc - Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật - Nguồn Tuyển dụng Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng. - Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất. - Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage: - Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers - Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers - Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers Why You'll Love Working Here Trải nghiệm Thu nhập hấp dẫn với gói đãi ngộ toàn diện: Thưởng thành tích tháng 13; Thưởng thành tích theo kết quả công việc 06 tháng, 1 năm ; Thưởng các dịp lễ tết trong năm ; Thưởng theo danh hiệu cá nhân và tập thể… Du lịch nghỉ dưỡng hàng năm Khám sức khỏe định kì Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân (MIC) Quà tặng và ngày nghỉ sinh nhật hưởng nguyên lương Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân: Được thử sức với các nền tảng công nghệ mới, tham gia vào những dự án chuyển đổi lớn của ngân hàng Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng Được trải nghiệm các phương pháp học tập mới và phát triển năng lực theo lộ trình công danh. Hưởng các chính sách hỗ trợ, khuyến khích học tập, nâng cao trình độ và phát triển bản thân (chứng chỉ nghề quốc tế...) Môi trường làm việc lý tưởng với: Những người cộng sự thân thiện và tài năng Cơ sở vật chất, không gian làm việc xanh và hiện đại.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Enterprise platforms for business operations AI, cloud, cybersecurity, and digital services Industry solutions for complex environments The Job JOB PURPOSES Focus on developing high-quality enterprise software solutions for web and mobile applications. Contribute to the entire product development lifecycle, optimizing application performance and ensuring robust information security. Work collaboratively with team members to execute projects efficiently, ensuring scalability and maintainability. Embrace modern development practices including AI-assisted coding, automation, and data-driven decision making to improve development speed and software quality. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES Build, maintain, and enhance web and mobile applications using PHP/Laravel, Kotlin and others Develop APIs to integrate systems with third parties. Optimize code quality and application performance for efficient and reliable solutions. Collaborate with teams to deploy applications and databases on-premises or cloud infrastructures. Research and apply new technologies to improve software quality and development efficiency Perform other tasks assigned by management in projects. Leverage AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude Code, Local AI Development Tool, etc.) to enhance development productivity, code quality, and problem-solving efficiency. Continuously explore and adopt new technologies to improve system design, automation, and user experience. Your Skills and Experience Bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or related field. Minimum 2-3 years of experience in a similar position, particularly working with PHP/Laravel. Experience in deploying enterprise software (ERP, CRM, Call Center, E-invoice, etc.) or SaaS-based products is a plus. Knowledgeable in LAMP stacks (Linux, Apache, MySQL, PHP), JavaScript, CSS, HTML, and web security. Proficient in Git for source code management and collaboration. Familiarity with DevOps automation, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and CI/CD pipelines is a plus. Experience working in companies with CMMI Level 3 or higher is a plus. Experience in developing multi-tenant web applications and microservices architecture is an advantage. Open mindset towards adopting AI-assisted development tools and modern engineering practices. Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to leverage tools and automation to improve efficiency. Willingness to continuously learn and adapt to emerging technologies, especially in AI and software engineering. Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary and benefits package, including a guaranteed 13th-month salary. Company trip annually. Dynamic and innovative working environment with professional colleagues. Opportunities for professional growth and exposure to enterprise technology platforms and global business practices. Comfortable workplace with free parking, coffee, snacks. Company-sponsored training programs and professional certifications. Onsite working environment at the company office in District 7, Ho Chi Minh City.

Develop documentation throughout the software development life cycle (SDLC) Serve as an expert on the system and provide technical support to other Internal teams Your Skills and Experience Bachelor’s degree in computer programming, computer science, or a related field At least 3+ years of development experience Proficient in Relational database modeling & design with Postgres/MSSQL Knowledge of Microservices, Clean-code, Clean-Architecture & SOLID principles Having experience in Message Queues with Kafka/RabbitMQ Having experience with Docker, Kubernetes Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies English Professional working proficiency Preferred Proficient in backend technologies: Entity Framework Core, LINQDocument DB modeling & design with Elasticsearch Object Storages with AWS S3 Messaging with Sendgrid, Twilio, AWS SNS,… Having experience in Cloud Native Computing DevOps, SysOps in AWS and Git CI/CD experience Why You'll Love Working Here We’re not just about building platforms; we’re about creating a workplace where talent thrives. Full salary during probation & Guaranteed 13th month salary 15 days of paid annual leave, plus seniority paid leave Global health insurance package for yourself and direct family members, plus annual health checkup Growth Opportunities Hands-on exposure to cutting-edge technologies and complex system architecture in a global-scale project. Opportunity to work on challenging problems in data analytics, customer engagement, and operational efficiency. With your technical expertise, you’ll continuously propose innovative solutions to elevate their performance and contribute to the overall success of the organization.

company_name: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN THANH TOÁN TRỰC TUYẾN TOÀN CẦU
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một kỹ sư DevOps/SRE đam mê công nghệ, có khả năng nắm bắt xu hướng nhanh bén. Bạn sẽ là người giữ cho hệ thống Fintech và Vận tải luôn hoạt động trơn tru (đảm bảo tính High Availability, Security), đồng thời tiên phong áp dụng các công cụ/giải pháp AI để tự động hóa, giám sát hệ thống và tối ưu hóa quy trình phát triển phần mềm (AIOps/MLOps). Trách nhiệm chính 1. Vận hành & Đảm bảo độ tin cậy (Site Reliability - SRE) Xây dựng, quản lý và tối ưu hóa cơ sở hạ tầng Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure) phục vụ cho cả mảng Fintech (yêu cầu bảo mật cao, độ trễ thấp) và mảng Vận tải (hệ thống tracking thời gian thực, lưu lượng dữ liệu lớn). Thiết lập và giám sát các chỉ số SLI, SLO, SLA. Đảm bảo hệ thống đạt uptime 99.99%. Xây dựng hệ thống Monitoring & Alerting toàn diện (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK stack). Chủ động xử lý sự cố (Incident Management) và thực hiện Post-mortems. 2. CI/CD & Tự động hóa (DevOps) Thiết kế và duy trì các pipeline CI/CD tự động, an toàn và tốc độ cao. Quản lý Infrastructure as Code (IaC) bằng Terraform, Ansible hoặc Pulumi. Quản lý, vận hành và scale hệ thống Container/Orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes). 3. Ứng dụng AI & Nắm bắt xu hướng (Điểm nhấn chiến lược) AIOps: Ứng dụng các mô hình AI/Machine Learning vào việc giám sát hệ thống (phát hiện bất thường - anomaly detection, dự đoán tải - predictive scaling, phân tích log thông minh). MLOps: Hỗ trợ đội ngũ Data/AI xây dựng hạ tầng và pipeline để training và deploy các mô hình AI (như AI định tuyến vận tải, AI chấm điểm tín dụng Fintech). AI Tooling: Tiên phong áp dụng các công cụ AI (như GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, v.v.) vào công việc hàng ngày để tối ưu hóa việc viết script tự động, tạo tài liệu, hoặc phân tích nguyên nhân gốc rễ (Root Cause Analysis). Liên tục cập nhật các xu hướng công nghệ mới về Cloud Computing, SRE và AI để đề xuất cải tiến kiến trúc hệ thống. Your Skills and Experience Kinh nghiệm & Chuyên môn: Ít nhất 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí DevOps, SRE hoặc System Engineer. Kiến thức sâu rộng về một trong các Cloud Provider lớn (AWS, GCP, Azure). Thành thạo Linux, Networking và kiến trúc Microservices. Có kinh nghiệm thực tế triển khai và quản trị Kubernetes (K8s) ở môi trường Production. Nắm vững các công cụ CI/CD (GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins...) và IaC (Terraform). Kỹ năng lập trình/scripting tốt với ít nhất một ngôn ngữ: Python, Go, Bash. Yêu cầu đặc thù: Đam mê AI: Có kiến thức cơ bản về quy trình phát triển AI/ML. Rất hoan nghênh ứng viên đã từng làm MLOps hoặc có kinh nghiệm tích hợp AI/LLM API. Tư duy hệ thống: Hiểu biết về các yêu cầu bảo mật trong ngành tài chính (PCI-DSS là một lợi thế) và khả năng xử lý bài toán scale lớn trong vận tải. Kỹ năng mềm: Tư duy chủ động (proactive), khả năng giải quyết vấn đề xuất sắc, chịu được áp lực cao và có tinh thần tự học hỏi không ngừng. Why You'll Love Working Here Mức lương thưởng cạnh tranh, đánh giá năng lực minh bạch. Môi trường làm việc cởi mở, khuyến khích thử nghiệm công nghệ mới (đặc biệt là AI). Cung cấp các công cụ AI trả phí để hỗ trợ tối đa cho công việc chuyên môn. Gói chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn diện và các đặc quyền sử dụng dịch vụ nội bộ (Fintech & Vận tải).
benefits: Mức lương thưởng cạnh tranh, đánh giá năng lực minh bạch. Môi trường làm việc cởi mở, khuyến khích thử nghiệm công nghệ mới (đặc biệt là AI). job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary package and valuable benefits Get the opportunity to access global L&D programs Hybrid and flexible working environment The Job HRS AS A COMPANY HRS, a pioneer in business travel, aims to elevate every stay through innovative technology. With over 50 years of experience, their digital platform, driven by ProcureTech, TravelTech, and FinTech, transforms how companies and travelers Stay, Work, and Pay. ProcureTech digitally revolutionizes lodging procurement, connecting corporations and suppliers in a cutting-edge ecosystem. This enables seamless efficiency and automation, surpassing travelers' expectations. TravelTech redefines the online lodging experience, offering personalized content from selection to check-in, ensuring an unparalleled journey for corporate travelers. In FinTech, HRS introduces advancements like mobile banking and digital payments, turning corporate back offices into touchless lodging enablers, eliminating legacy cost barriers. The innovative 2-click book-to-pay feature streamlines interactions for travelers and hoteliers. Combining these technology propositions, HRS unlocks exponential catalyst effects. Their data-driven focus delivers value-added services and high-return network effects, creating substantial customer value. HRS's exponential growth since 1972 serves over 35% of the global Fortune 500 and leading hotel chains. Join HRS to shape the future of business travel, empowered by a culture of growth and setting new industry standards worldwide. BUSINESS UNIT The Search & Book unit at HRS plays a pivotal role in delivering innovative solutions through HRS Connect, the company's flagship product within the expansive global corporate travel management market. HRS Connect specifically targets the rapidly growing and significantly underserved segments of corporate lodging, meetings, groups, and long stays. The unit develops, enhances, and maintains complex technology solutions that seamlessly integrate hotel distribution systems, Property Management Systems (PMS), Online Travel Agencies (OTA), and Hotel Chain systems into the HRS Connect platform. POSITION A Senior Fullstack Engineer (AI-Native) builds production-grade applications and intelligent workflows with an AI-first mindset across the full software development lifecycle. This role is for an engineer who does not treat AI as an add-on, but as a core way of working across design, implementation, testing, documentation, debugging, and delivery. The ideal candidate consistently approaches work by asking whether a task can be completed entirely with AI or materially improved through AI-assisted execution, while still applying strong engineering judgment and quality controls. CHALLENGE Full-Stack Engineering: Design, build, and maintain scalable applications using Next.js/TypeScript (frontend) and Java/Python (backend). AI-Native Product Development: Integrate GenAI APIs and LLM-powered capabilities into core product workflows. Build agentic flows, tool-using systems, and AI workflow automations with clear guardrails and observability. AI-Native Engineering Practice: Apply AI-assisted workflows across the full SDLC - from design and implementation to testing, debugging, and documentation. Review and validate AI-generated outputs for correctness, security, and production readiness. Technical Leadership: Drive architectural decisions, mentor engineers, and champion AI-native engineering practices across the team. Your Skills and Experience 7+ years of professional full-stack engineering experience across frontend, backend, APIs, databases, and production systems, with strong end-to-end ownership of product delivery. Hands-on expertise with Next.js, React, and TypeScript, including server-side rendering, component-based architecture, and state management. Strong backend development skills in Java and/or Python, with solid understanding of system architecture, scalability, and production reliability. Experience integrating GenAI APIs, LLM features, assistants, or AI-powered product capabilities into production systems. Immersive adoption of AI across the SDLC. Demonstrated experience using AI-assisted development workflows for scaffolding, refactoring, testing, debugging, documentation, and delivery while critically reviewing outputs and maintaining engineering standards. AI-first mindset. Approaches every task by asking whether it can be completed entirely with AI or improved significantly through AI, then applies the right level of human review, validation, and control. Excellent communication skills and fluency in English to collaborate effectively in an international environment. Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive Pay: Attractive salary package with a 13th-month bonus and Reward bonus Hybrid Working Model: Embrace flexibility of working from both home and office that supports better work-life balance and boosts productivity Recognition That Matters: We celebrate your milestones with meaningful rewards and long-term commitment opportunities (after 2 years, 5 years, 10 years, etc. Of service) Comprehensive Benefits: Private health insurance for you and family member, plus full statutory coverage (social, health, unemployment) Time to Recharge: 18 days of paid leave per year, including sick days Continuous Growth: Dedicated learning budget, access to Udemy, English classes, mentoring, and global workshop/business forum opportunities Support for Your Day-to-Day: Meal and parking allowances to keep life simple Culture That Empowers: Company trips, year-end celebrations, structured quarterly team bonding, culture activities for x-team collaboration — because strong teams drive meaningful outcomes Refer and Earn: Generous referral bonus for every successful hire you bring in
