job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job In this role, you will partner with a close-knit group of quantitative researchers, data engineers, technologists, and data sourcing colleagues to analyze and enrich a broad range of structured and unstructured big data. Enriching a wide range of structured and unstructured data into datasets. Enhancing data quality & integrity by developing validation tools to measure the effectiveness of data enrichment. Becoming a domain expert on different deep learning and machine learning applications, analyzing & understanding the underlying dynamics and behaviors within the data. Develop insights based on the data and collaborate with the research team to generate tradable signals. Developing utility tools that can further automate the software development, testing, and deployment workflow. Using your expertise to provide technical support for global researchers, including diagnosing root causes of technical problems and proposing solutions to developers. Your Skills and Experience Must-have: 5+ years of hands-on working experience with Python, focusing on data engineering. Demonstrated ability to implement data science pipelines and real-time applications in Python. Practical experience with and theoretical understanding of deep neural networks and AI/Machine learning techniques. Proficiency with Python-based tools like Jupyter Notebook, and coding standards like PEP-8. Strong academic background – minimum of a bachelor’s degree in a technical or quantitative field. Exceptional analytical & problem-solving abilities, with a strong attention to detail. Excellent software development skills: ability to convert rough overall use-cases to a working codebase. Motivated by a deep curiosity and passion to learn. Nice-to-have: Proficiency with C++ based tools like STL, and object-oriented programming in C++. Past experience as a Data Scientist or Data Engineer in a finance or investment profile. Experience with Linux/Unix shell and Git. Practical experience with time-series forecasting and analysis methods. Why You'll Love Working Here ITviec Recruitment Consulting' s client is a premier Software Outsourcing & IT Consulting firm with over 20 years of expertise in the global market. Headquartered in a major Tech Park in HCMC, they specialize in delivering high-performance solutions for Healthcare (HealthTech), Supply Chain, and Enterprise Management . Serving elite clients across North America and Asia-Pacific, the company offers a stable, international environment where engineers tackle complex digital transformation projects using modern tech stacks. Why You'll Love Working Here: Work Environment & Culture: Engage with a youthful, dynamic team working on awesome projects applying cutting-edge technologies. Gain global exposure by working alongside international specialists, providing a fantastic opportunity to expand your skill set. A transparent, honest, and respectful culture that empowers individuals to reach their full potential. Compensation & Health Benefits: 13th-month salary and highly attractive performance-based bonuses. Premium accident and healthcare insurance plans, plus comprehensive annual health check-ups. Allowances & Facilities: Allowances for lunch, free parking, and life events (marriage, newborn baby, bereavement, etc.). A spacious, fully equipped pantry (microwave, fridge, coffee maker, etc.) for your most comfortable lunch breaks. Engagement & Recognition: Diverse sports clubs and social activities (Badminton, Football, Yoga, Tech clubs). Annual company teambuilding trips. Engaging monthly internal events: Happy Gatherings, Mini Games, Team Birthdays, Year-End Party, etc. Quarterly and yearly awards recognizing outstanding individuals, teams, and long-term dedication. Advanced English and soft skill training programs to assist your career development. Exclusive perk: Unique internal company supporting funds to help ease personal financial goals (Home, Vehicle, Tuition loans, etc.).

job_title: Senior Flutter Engineer BNPL  AI Automation - Dart
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are finalizing the migration of our legacy native apps (Java/Swift) to a modernized Flutter ecosystem. We need a Product Builder to own this new codebase and help pioneer our Figma-to-Flutter AI automation pipeline. Key Responsibilities: Mobile App Development & Architecture: Lead the development of our Flutter applications. Define robust and scalable app architectures (e.g., MVVM, Clean Architecture). API & User Flow Collaboration: Work closely with backend engineers and designers to define APIs, user workflows, and system integration from the ground up. Release Management: Manage the end-to-end mobile app release process, including App Store and Google Play submissions. Security & Performance: Take full ownership of app performance (optimizing rendering and memory) and security protocols, specifically for payment and checkout modules , ensuring compliance with modern mobile security standards. Collaborate on AI Workflow: Work closely with an international, cross-functional team in English to gradually integrate and improve our Figma-to-Flutter AI automation pipeline. Preferred Personal Characteristics (Core Values): We are looking for a true "Product Builder" who thrives in a startup environment. You will be a great fit if you possess: True Ownership: You own outcomes, not just tasks. If a project is failing, you step in and fix the gap, even if the root cause is technically outside your job description. Zero Ego & "Join All Hands": You prioritize the "right answer" for the business over winning arguments. You are willing to drop your own priorities to do unglamorous "grunt work" (like manual QA or data entry) if that is what the business needs to survive. First-Principles Thinking: You remove bias and think deeply. You don't just accept the status quo or "industry standards"; you dig into the raw data, test assumptions, and make decisions based on facts. Demand High Standards & Force Multiplier: You have the courage to constructively reject subpar work to maintain excellence. You actively look for ways to unblock teammates, share knowledge, and maximize the ability of those around you. Kaizen: You embrace continuous improvement, always questioning how workflows and systems can be optimized. Empowerment: Cultivate a high-performing and collaborative team environment by actively focusing on the career development, skill enhancement, and overall professional growth of your direct reports and all team members. This involves providing constructive feedback, identifying tailored training opportunities, mentoring individuals to reach their full potential, and delegating challenging, growth-oriented tasks. The goal is to build a resilient, technically proficient, and motivated team capable of tackling complex, next-generation challenges and contributing significantly to the company's long-term success. Integrity: Act with honesty and fairness. We operate fundamentally with honesty and fairness in all internal and external interactions. This requires complete transparency, integrity, and ethical conduct in our business, decisions, and relationships with all stakeholders. Your Skills and Experience Must-Have Skills: 3-5+ years of hands-on experience in mobile application development, with strong core expertise in Flutter/Dart. State Management: Expertise in architecting Flutter apps using Provider , Riverpod , BLoC , or equivalent frameworks for complex, high-state environments. Quality-First Mentality: Experience implementing Unit, Widget, and Integration tests alongside performance profiling to ensure a seamless user experience. Experience in writing clean, testable code and implementing quality assurance measures (Unit/E2E testing) before release. Store Release Experience: Proven experience in managing app release processes for both Apple App Store and Google Play. Workflow / API Design Aptitude: Strong ability and willingness to communicate closely with designers and backend teams to shape and define APIs and user workflows, rather than just waiting for fixed specifications. Architectural Thinking: Ability to evaluate and select technologies/architectures by weighing pros and cons, considering security, operations, and AI-driven development. Business-level English proficiency for international communication and cross-border collaboration. Nice-to-Have: Zero-to-One / Setup Experience: Proven track record of setting up new project repositories and building mobile CI/CD pipelines from scratch. Knowledge of OWASP Mobile security principles and experience with encrypted local databases (e.g., Hive with encryption or SQFlite with SQLCipher). Experience with Flutter's FFI (Foreign Function Interface) or writing custom Platform Channels for deep integration with native iOS/Android APIs. External Collaboration: Act as the development team's representative in external stakeholder negotiations and discussions. Coordinate and communicate with partners and vendors regarding product and system integration. Experience in mobile development utilizing Swagger (OpenAPI) specifications. Backend development experience is a strong plus. Experience with Native mobile development (Java/Kotlin for Android, Swift/Objective-C for iOS). Experience or strong interest in AI agents, CodeGen tools, Figma APIs, or designing intermediate DSLs (Domain Specific Languages). Why You'll Love Working Here Experience the Future of Development : Contribute to our next-generation UI Automation Platform using Figma, Flutter, and AI. Gain hands-on experience in CodeGen and DSL design. High Autonomy in Tech Selection : You select the best tech stacks and architectures with AI integration and long-term maintainability in mind. Startup Environment – Experience the exciting journey of building and scaling a new business and product in a fast-growing market. Ownership & Opportunities – You will not only execute tasks but also think, act, and create many opportunities to learn and grow. Beyond Coding – This is an ideal environment for those who aspire to become leaders who contribute not only through coding, but also to the business, product, and organization as a whole. Benefits: Transportation allowance Housing allowance Meal allowance Twice-monthly bonuses Paid leave Health insurance MacBook Pro provided

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Personal Development Opportunities Attractive Salary & Seniority Bonus (3/5/7 years) Premium Private Health Care(employee & dependents) The Job About the Role: We are seeking a highly proactive Senior Full-Stack Engineer (5+ years of experience) with a strong frontend focus to join our team. You will be instrumental in building scalable user interfaces using React, powered by a purely Headless Magnolia CMS backend. We operate in a fast-paced, modern environment and are actively embracing AI-assisted development. We are looking for a self-starter —someone who doesn't wait to be told what to do, actively identifies and solves blockers independently, and communicates effectively across the team. Key Responsibilities Frontend: Drive the development of robust, high-performance UIs using React, seamlessly consuming REST APIs from our Headless Magnolia setup. Backend Integration & Support: While the immediate focus is on the frontend, you will work with Java to configure Magnolia, expose RESTful services, and maintain backend stability. Autonomous Execution: Take ownership of your deliverables. Proactively identify blockers, propose solutions, and independently drive tasks forward while maintaining tight, continuous alignment with our PM, Architects, and Leads to shape epics and clear dependencies. Agent-Assisted E2E Delivery: Go beyond basic code completion. We expect you to actively leverage agentic AI workflows (using tools like Gemini, Claude) across the entire product lifecycle. From shaping epics and brainstorming architecture with the PM, to automating complex development tasks, testing, and streamlining our go-to-market deployment—you will use AI to reduce cognitive load, stay unblocked, and boost your efficiency. Collaborate & Communicate: Maintain clear communication in English regarding project status, technical hurdles, and architectural decisions, which is critical for our team's success. Your Skills and Experience 5+ Years of Experience: Proven track record as a Senior Full-Stack Engineer or a Frontend Engineer with solid backend capabilities. React Expertise: Deep knowledge of React and the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem. Java: Solid proficiency in Java. Autonomy: A demonstrable history of taking initiative, self-managing, and driving projects forward independently in a remote environment. Language Skills: Excellent command of written and spoken English is a must have. Forward-Thinking: A strong curiosity and willingness to adopt AI tools to accelerate your development speed. Why You'll Love Working Here Personal Development Opportunities: We believe in nurturing individual growth and happiness. As part of our commitment, we provide a range of indoor and outdoor training activities, including technical courses, English classes, and soft skills training. Comprehensive Health Coverage: Your well-being and that of your family are paramount to us. We cover 100% of healthcare premiums for all employees and their dependents, ensuring you can access quality medical care without financial worries. Employee and Family Care: At Magnolia, we extend our care beyond the workplace. From health insurance to organizing summer vacations and family events like Family Day, Children's Day, and the Mid-Autumn Festival, we prioritize the well-being and happiness of our employees and their families. Additionally, enjoy recreational activities such as football, swimming, bowling, cinema, and more. Competitive Salary and Benefits: Your hard work deserves recognition. Our compensation package includes: An attractive salary, a 13th-month salary, seniority bonuses, and opportunities for career advancement. Annual leave of up to 21 days; Opportunity for the exchange programs to Switzerland. Flexible Working Hours: We understand the importance of work-life balance. Enjoy flexibility in your schedule. Employee Perks: Your comfort and satisfaction matter to us. Our office is stocked with beverages, fruits, and snacks, and we provide meals every evening. Join us on "Whoopee Fridays" for team-building activities, knowledge exchange sessions, and lively conversations.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Flexible work hours Product-mode organization Flat Management The Job About FWH: Facilitated Work Hub (FWH) partners with Norwegian tech scale-ups to employ software engineers in Vietnam under a long-term, one-client collaboration model, where each engineer works as part of the client’s product organisation as a fully integrated colleague, not as an outsourced or rotating resource. Our model prioritises stability, clear ownership, and cultural alignment, supported by a flat, Norwegian-inspired working environment grounded in fairness, transparency, and trust, with local support from a Norwegian Cultural Advisor and a transparent HR setup. We hire self-driven professionals who value long-term collaboration, professional integrity, and meaningful contribution within serious technology companies. About the client: Fishency develops and delivers advanced technology solutions for the continuous monitoring of fish groups across the entire value chain. By combining image analysis, IoT sensors, and Artificial Intelligence, the company enables the collection and analysis of real-time data related to fish health, welfare, and production. Joining this exciting opportunity, you will be able to progress further, by working together with other high level and experienced colleagues like yourself. You'll have close contact with the management and have a voice to give your ideas and input as we work in a Norwegian style flat hierarchy . Annotation and Data Quality overview: Annotation work is a critical part of Fishency's value creation and forms the foundation for precise and robust machine learning models. The work is organised with a clear separation between ownership, quality assurance, and operational production to ensure high quality, scalability, and low risk. Fishency owns the entire annotation process, methodology, and quality standards. Production is carried out by dedicated annotation resources in Vietnam via FWH, under close Norwegian leadership and oversight. About the role: The annotation resources in Vietnam perform operational annotation work based on defined guidelines and quality requirements. Resources are dedicated exclusively to Fishency and work solely within Fishency's annotation tools and processes. Responsibilities: Perform video and sequence annotation of fish and relevant objects Annotate very small objects (down to millimetre-level) with high precision Perform multi-class annotation in accordance with defined taxonomies Follow established workflows, instructions, and quality standards Report deviations, ambiguities, and improvement suggestions to the QC lead Your Skills and Experience Framework conditions: No requirement for domain expertise or programming skills Work is evaluated based on precision, consistency, and adherence to instructions Final quality approval is always performed by the Norwegian QC and annotation lead Annotation resources represent a scalable production capacity that can be expanded in line with demand, without compromising quality or control. Personalities: High integrity, confidentiality, and genuine commitment to excellence Why You'll Love Working Here We offer: Flexitime account Competitive salary package, 13th month bonus Growth opportunity and hands on experience Experience exceptional Norwegian business culture rooted in trust and openness Excellent staff retention International yet close knitted work environment Central location
benefits: We offer: Flexitime account Competitive salary package, 13th month bonus Growth opportunity and hands on experience Experience exceptional Norwegian business culture rooted in trust and openness Excellent staff retention International yet close knitted work environment Central location

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us AI-first company shaping the future of fitness Join a passionate global team across VN, US, & UK Collaborative team valuing joy & creativity The Job About Everfit At Everfit, we're on a mission to build the future of personalized fitness. We connect coaches and clients seamlessly through a global wellness marketplace where anyone can find the perfect coach - regardless of budget, goals or location. With nearly 280,000 coaches in 200+ countries, our platform supports not only personal trainers, but Olympic athletes, military trainers, celebrity coaches, cancer rehab specialists, and everyday heroes transforming lives through fitness. We're not just helping people get stronger—we're helping coaches build thriving businesses that make a real impact. From workouts and nutrition to habit coaching, payments, and client communication, Everfit brings it all together with a powerful layer of automation to help coaches scale their impact and grow their business. We're integrating next-gen AI sidekicks - smart assistants that help coaches program and unlock deep health insights in real time. Imagine if Jarvis from Iron Man doubled as your personal fitness strategist! Position Overview: We are looking for a Tech Lead to anchor the technical direction of Everfit's Core squad, the most used, most business-critical part of our platform. This is primarily a technical leadership role. Roughly 80% of your time will be on technical direction, architecture decisions, system design, code reviews, and mentoring engineers across Core's sub-squads. Around 20% will be hands-on coding, focused on the most complex and highest-stakes parts of the system. What makes this role unique is breadth. Core's teams span backend, frontend, mobile, and DevOps, and you'll need to provide meaningful technical oversight across all of them. You don't need to be an expert in every discipline, but you should be fluent enough to guide architecture decisions, challenge technical trade-offs, and earn the trust of engineers regardless of their stack. Your primary depth is backend — that's where the hardest system design problems live. But your awareness of how mobile, frontend, and DevOps connect to the backend is what makes you effective as the technical anchor for Core. We operate with an AI-first engineering mindset. You'll champion AI tools across the squad, helping engineers move faster, write better code, and ship with more confidence. We're also building AI features into the Core product itself, so you'll help shape how AI integrates with the coaching workflows coaches rely on every day. Your impact Technical Direction & Architecture Own the architectural patterns and technical standards for Core's backend systems — workout programming engines, scheduling logic, nutrition tracking, multi-tenant platform infrastructure, notification pipelines, and third-party integrations. Drive solution design for complex features: new product areas, cross-squad integrations, platform-level changes, and performance-critical systems. Make architectural decisions that balance delivery velocity with long-term maintainability — Core is a high-frequency product and tech debt accumulates fast. Define and uphold engineering standards across all six Core sub-squads: API design, data modeling, testing practices, code review culture, and documentation. Proactively identify and lead reduction of technical debt in coordination with Engineering Management and Product. Hands-on Engineering (~20%) Stay in the code on the most critical work — core platform infrastructure, high-risk migrations, cross-squad technical foundations, and architectural proof-of-concepts. Review pull requests across sub-squads with depth and speed, giving feedback that helps engineers grow — not just ships. Set the standard for what good code looks like across Core: observable, testable, maintainable, and scalable. AI-First Engineering Champion AI-assisted development across all Core sub-squads — from code generation and test writing to automated documentation and PR reviews. Collaborate with the AI squad on integrating AI features directly into Core workflows: smart programming suggestions, automated progress summaries, AI-powered onboarding. Help engineers build practical AI fluency through pairing, demos, and shared tooling workflows. Mentorship & Team Growth Mentor and coach engineers across Core sub-squads — raising the technical bar through code reviews, architectural guidance, and technical pairing. Run regular technical discussions and design reviews that help engineers grow as system thinkers, not just feature builders. Contribute to hiring across Core: design technical assessments and conduct engineering interviews calibrated to the Core domain. Cross-functional Collaboration Be the primary technical voice in product discovery across Core — shaping what's feasible, what's scalable, and what will cause pain six months from now. Partner closely with Core PMs, BAs, QA Lead, and Design to ensure technical decisions translate cleanly into user-facing product quality. Align with Tech Leads in other squads (Marketplace, Payment, AI) on shared infrastructure, platform standards, and cross-squad integrations. Represent Core Engineering in cross-functional leadership discussions, communicating system decisions with clarity to non-technical stakeholders. Your Skills and Experience Must-Have 5+ years of software engineering experience with a strong backend foundation, plus 2+ years in a Tech Lead, Senior Lead, or equivalent technical leadership role. Deep backend expertise: system architecture, API design, data modeling, async and event-driven processing, performance optimization, and distributed systems. Solid understanding of frontend engineering (React or similar) — enough to review architecture decisions, guide performance trade-offs, and provide meaningful technical direction to FE engineers. Solid understanding of mobile engineering (iOS or cross-platform) — enough to assess architectural quality, review technical decisions, and collaborate effectively with mobile engineers. Comfortable with DevOps fundamentals — CI/CD pipelines, containerization, cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred), and deployment practices — so you can oversee and guide the full delivery lifecycle. Experience building or scaling complex SaaS products with multiple feature areas — ideally platforms with high user frequency and diverse product surfaces (scheduling, tracking, integrations, notifications). Proven ability to set and uphold engineering standards across a cross-discipline team — not just within a single stack. Excellent English communication skills — able to lead technical discussions, write clear architectural decisions, and align non-technical stakeholders on trade-offs. High ownership mindset: you take problems end-to-end, proactively surface risks, and drive them to resolution. AI-first engineering mindset: you actively use AI tools to work smarter and help your team do the same. Nice to Have Hands-on production experience across multiple disciplines — shipped both backend and mobile or frontend features in the same product. Familiarity with our stack: Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, React.js, iOS (Swift) — or equivalent experience with comparable technologies. Experience building domain-specific engines: scheduling systems, rule engines, workflow automation, or data-heavy tracking features. Background in fitness tech, health tech, coaching tools, or any high-frequency B2B SaaS product. Experience working with distributed engineering teams across Vietnam, US, or UK time zones. Hands-on exposure to AI feature integration — LLM-powered suggestions, AI-assisted workflows, or personalization systems. Why You'll Love Working Here Compensation & Benefits: Full social insurance coverage and premium healthcare benefits. Competitive salary with 13th-month pay and performance bonus. Paid leave: vacation, sick leave, and maternity leave Build Your Career with Impact: Be part of a mission-driven company that’s transforming human potential. Empower over 200,000+ coaches in more than 200 countries - including Olympic athletes, military trainers, rehab specialists, and celebrity coaches. Make a global impact while building a meaningful, purpose-driven career. Continuous training, mentoring. 1-2 performance reviews annually. Work Environment: English-speaking, international environment promoting open communication and collaboration. Work alongside world-class talent from companies like Apple, Meta, Uber, Patreon, and Nike, united by a shared passion for impact and excellence. International team for global career growth. State-of-the-art equipment provided. Beautiful working environment near Danang's city center (Dragon Bridge) and Hanoi office. Health & Wellness: PVI health insurance program and annual health check-ups. Active sports clubs (football, badminton, pickleball) and company retreats. A modern pantry designed for relaxation and social connection. Monthly wellness and learning workshops to recharge and grow.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Global growth with experienced engineers Innovative, balanced, creative culture Competitive salary, benefits, training The Job About Scandinavian Software Park Scandinavian Software Park is Monterro’s tech hub in Hanoi, home to 150+ software engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Founded in 2021, the park connects outstanding Vietnamese engineers with Scandinavia’s market-leading software companies. Monterro is a Stockholm-based private equity firm managing EUR 2.85bn, specializing exclusively in Nordic B2B software. We’re building a dedicated AI team called InFuse AI to accelerate AI adoption across our portfolio – and it starts right here in Hanoi. Is this you? You can’t stop exploring agentic coding. Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, the latest open-source agent frameworks. You try them all, you compare them, you have opinions. Not because someone asked you to, but because you couldn’t resist. You read the changelogs. You follow the people building these tools. When something new drops, you’re already testing it. Maybe you’ve built side projects just to see what’s possible. Maybe you’ve automated parts of your own workflow that nobody asked you to automate. Maybe you spend your evenings thinking about how AI changes the way developers work, not the models themselves, but what they mean for how software gets built. That’s the kind of curiosity we’re looking for. You’re the person your colleagues come to when they want to understand what AI can actually do for their code. And you enjoy that. You like showing people, not just telling them. You’ve shipped production software for 5+ years. You know what it’s like to maintain a legacy codebase, wrestle with technical debt, and deliver under pressure. That experience matters, it’s what gives you credibility when you sit down with a developer and say “let me show you something.” Note: This role requires a strong software development background but the job itself is coaching and enabling other developers, not writing production code day to day. We’re looking for someone who builds with agentic coding tools, not someone who builds AI/ML models. If your background is mainly in machine learning, data science, or AI research, this probably isn’t the right fit. Your English is strong. You communicate clearly and ask good questions. If this sounds like you, keep reading. What do you do? Roughly 80% of your time: help developers get good at AI coding . The other 20% is technical assessment work for investment decisions. But this split isn’t fixed, it will shift based on what’s needed. Coach and enable developers. Scandinavian Software Park has 150+ engineers working for 13+ Nordic B2B SaaS companies. Many of them haven’t yet integrated AI into how they code. Your job is to change that. You’ll work together with them directly in their codebases — not with slides and theory, but with real code and real problems. Pair programming, workshops, hands-on sessions. You’ll help teams find the workflows that actually work for them, at their level, in their stack. What this looks like day to day: Sit with developers and show them how to use AI tools effectively on their actual tasks Run workshops tailored to each team’s tech stack and experience level Help teams build habits — from spec-driven development to effective agent workflows to knowing when AI helps and when it doesn’t Support portfolio company teams based in Hanoi with agentic coding training Help with legacy modernization projects where AI-assisted development can make a real difference Create practical guides and share what works across teams You never work in a vacuum. Every engagement is coordinated with the Swedish AI team and/or the engineering leader at the portfolio company. You’ll always have someone to discuss approach with and learn from. You don’t need to have been a professional trainer. But you need to be the kind of person who genuinely likes helping others figure things out and who is patient enough to meet people where they are. Support investment decisions through technical assessment . When Monterro evaluates a company for acquisition, you’ll help answer: how hard is this to build? You do this by trying to replicate the target company’s solution using AI tools. The outcome is always useful: If it’s easy to replicate – that tells us the solution has limited technical moat If it’s hard – we learn more about what’s difficult, which informs both the investment decision and where to create value afterwards You’ll also use AI to review code quality, technical debt, and architecture in target companies and feed your findings into the investment process. Your team: You’ll be part of Monterro’s AI team, Infuse AI – a small, senior team based in Stockholm that works across the entire portfolio. You report to the AI Lead for reviews and development, but your daily work is closely coordinated with our senior agentic coding specialist. Expect daily standups, weekly team meetings (remote) and a lot of autonomy in between. You’re the team’s presence in Hanoi. That means you’ll build relationships with developers and team leads at the park, and be the bridge between what’s happening on the ground and the AI team’s broader strategy. Your Skills and Experience Your technical foundation 5+ years shipping production software – web apps, backend systems, APIs. You understand developer problems because you’ve had them yourself Strong in one or more of: C#, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, Python Hands-on, daily use of agentic coding tools. You should know your way around Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot or similar You understand spec-driven development, agent workflows and how to get reliable results from agentic coding tools Comfortable with modern development practices: CI/CD, code review, testing, version control You can pick up a new codebase quickly and form a view on its architecture and quality Your obsession You follow agentic coding closely – new tools, new workflows, new ways of working with AI. If we ask you “what changed in this space this week?” you should have plenty to say You think about how AI is changing the developer role, not just the tooling, but how teams work, how code gets reviewed how architecture decisions shift You’ve built things with agentic tools on your own initiative – side projects, experiments, automations. Not because it was assigned but because you wanted to You can talk about what you’ve tried, what worked, what didn’t and what you’d do differently Bonus: You do this on your own time too, not just at work Your people skills You’re a clear communicator in English, written and spoken You enjoy teaching and coaching and people tend to trust you quickly You can adjust how you explain things depending on who you’re talking to You’re comfortable presenting to small groups and larger workshops alike You have the patience to help a skeptical developer see the value, and the enthusiasm to keep going How you work Based in Hanoi, working from Scandinavian Software Park Flexible with time zones when coordinating with Nordic teams Comfortable switching between different companies, stacks, and contexts You prefer showing results over making plans. Quick wins first You’re comfortable with ambiguity. This role is still being shaped, and you’ll help shape it Nice to have Consulting experience or a background working across multiple organizations Solutions architecture background Experience calling LLM APIs to build product features (not training or fine-tuning models) Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) What Success Looks Like We don’t define success for you, that gets set together with the CTOs and team leads at each portfolio company, based on where their teams are and where they want to go. But broadly, after 12 months you should have: Helped the majority of developers at the park actively use AI in their daily work Built practical resources and guides that teams actually refer to Completed several AI replication assessments for Monterro’s deal team Become someone developers at the park trust and seek out Contributed to at least one legacy modernization project How to apply: Send your CV in English to us through the Monterro talent portal. In your application, tell us: What’s the most interesting thing you’ve built or explored with AI coding tools recently? Describe a time you helped another developer learn something new. What did you do, and what made it work? Why You'll Love Working Here Why this role is interesting: You get to explore AI coding tools as your actual job and help others discover what you’ve found. Full access to the best AI tools – Cursor, Anthropic (Claude Pro/API), OpenAI and whatever else comes next. We provide all the subscriptions and API access you need. No personal budget worries, no waiting for approval. You’ll work across 13+ different tech stacks and companies, not just one. You’ll see inside many different software businesses through the DD work. You’re part of building something new. Monterro’s AI practice is in its early stages. Scandinavian work culture: trust, autonomy, and a sensible view on work-life balance. Modern office at Peakview Tower in central Hanoi. Competitive salary for the Hanoi market.

job_title: Business Analyst Product  Growth for Edtech project
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Salary negotiable based on performance bonus ++ Full insurances according to the Labor Law An ambitious and humane startup team The Job About TeenCare AI TeenCare builds the intelligence that helps teens thrive and parents make better decisions. We combine weekly 1:1 mentoring with AI-powered insights — turning real-life signals into clear, actionable guidance for families across Southeast Asia. As we scale, we are looking for a Business Analyst to help turn data and user insights into product and growth improvements. You will work across Product, Growth, and Operations to: understand user behavior identify problems propose solutions This role sits close to product execution and offers a path toward Product Owner / Product Lead . What You’ll Do 1. Analyze User Behavior & Performance Track and analyze key metrics across the funnel: onboarding engagement retention Identify patterns, drop-offs, and opportunities 2. Turn Data into Insights Work with Product, CS, and Growth teams to understand user pain points Analyze customer feedback, complaints, and usage data Translate findings into clear, actionable insights 3. Support Product & Growth Decisions Propose hypotheses and improvements based on data Support prioritization of product initiatives Work with teams to measure impact of changes 4. Bridge Teams with Clarity Help structure problems and break them down logically Communicate insights clearly across teams Ensure decisions are backed by data and reasoning Your Skills and Experience 1–3 years experience in Business Analysis, Data, Product, or similar roles Strong analytical and structured thinking Comfortable working with data (Excel/Sheets, basic SQL is a plus) Curious about user behavior and product performance Clear communication and logical reasoning Nice to Have Experience in startups or fast-paced environments Exposure to product or growth teams Interest in AI, education, or consumer products Why You'll Love Working Here Why Join Us Competitive salary with 4 salary reviews/year Work closely with Product and Growth teams High learning curve with real business impact Clear path toward Product roles Fast-moving, execution-focused environment Reality Check (for candidates) This role is best suited for people who: enjoy solving real problems using data want to move beyond analysis into product impact are comfortable in fast-changing environments

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Sự nghiệp thăng tiến rõ ràng & thu nhập cạnh tranh Môi trường đổi mới sáng tạo & chuyên nghiệp Gia nhập tập đoàn với tầm nhìn toàn cầu. The Job Tại ExcelTech, Senior BA không chỉ là cầu nối mà còn là đối tác chiến lược của khách hàng. Bạn sẽ làm việc trực tiếp với ban lãnh đạo doanh nghiệp (trong các lĩnh vực nông nghiệp, y tế, sản xuất, bán lẻ…) để thấu hiểu tận gốc bài toán nghiệp vụ, từ đó kiến tạo các giải pháp công nghệ mang lại giá trị thực tiễn và có thể đo lường được. Chúng tôi tập trung vào các dự án trọng điểm với cam kết chất lượng tuyệt đối. Do đó, năng lực phân tích và tư duy giải pháp của bạn ở giai đoạn đầu rất quan trọng đối với sự thành bại của dự án. Một Senior BA xuất sắc sẽ là nhân tố then chốt giúp ExcelTech giữ vững và mở rộng vị thế tiên phong trong lĩnh vực giải pháp công nghệ cho doanh nghiệp trong khu vực. Your Skills and Experience 1. Khám phá & Thẩm định Tiềm năng Ứng dụng Chủ trì Discovery Workshop: Trực tiếp dẫn dắt các phiên làm việc chiến lược với C-suite (CDO, CTO, CIO) của khách hàng. Chủ động nhận diện và khai phá các quy trình có thể được tối ưu hóa bằng công nghệ, vượt ra khỏi việc "ghi chép yêu cầu" thuần túy để thực sự tư vấn giải pháp. Thẩm định toàn diện: Phân tích và đánh giá từng Use case dựa trên 4 trụ cột: Giá trị kinh doanh tiềm năng, Mức độ sẵn sàng của dữ liệu (Data readiness), Tính khả thi công nghệ và Độ phức tạp khi thay đổi hệ thống (Change management). Lượng hóa giá trị kinh doanh: Đưa ra các con số thuyết phục về thời gian tiết kiệm, chi phí cắt giảm, doanh thu tăng trưởng và rủi ro giảm thiểu – kèm theo các chỉ số dữ liệu cụ thể để thuyết phục khách hàng. Xây dựng bài toán đầu tư: Lập bảng tính ROI (ROI Calculator) và Business Case cho từng Use case; tự tin bảo vệ đề xuất trước ban lãnh đạo cấp cao của khách hàng, đối tác. Hoạch định Lộ trình: Đề xuất chiến lược triển khai hiệu quả, cân bằng giữa những thắng lợi ngắn hạn (Quick wins: 3-6 tháng) và các mục tiêu chiến lược dài hạn (Strategic bets: 12-18 tháng). 2. Phân tích Yêu cầu & Thiết kế Giải pháp Tài liệu chuẩn Enterprise: Xây dựng tài liệu Yêu cầu Kinh doanh (BRD) chất lượng cao, không chỉ dừng ở đặc tả chức năng (Functional specs) mà phải bao hàm bối cảnh nghiệp vụ, các tiêu chí thành công (Success metrics) và đánh giá rủi ro. Chuẩn hóa yêu cầu: Viết user stories với acceptance criteria theo tiêu chuẩn SMART và phân loại mức độ ưu tiên theo nguyên tắc INVEST. Quản lý và duy trì chặt chẽ Ma trận Truy xuất Yêu cầu (RTM). Tối ưu giải pháp: Phối hợp sát sao với Solution Architect để đảm bảo giải pháp giải quyết đúng "nỗi đau" của doanh nghiệp. Trực quan hóa: Trực tiếp thiết kế Prototype/Mockup (qua Figma, v0…) giúp khách hàng hình dung rõ nét về giải pháp trước khi code, giảm thiểu rủi ro ngay từ giai đoạn sớm (De-risk early). Kiểm soát lợi nhuận l à chốt chặn cuối cùng, chịu trách nhiệm chốt nghiệm thu phạm vi yêu cầu với khách hàng trước khi chuyển giao cho Development, đồng thời bảo vệ biên lợi nhuận của dự án. 3. Am hiểu Nghiệp vụ & Tư vấn Chuyên ngành Chuyên gia theo ngành: Sở hữu chuyên môn sâu sắc trong 1-2 lĩnh vực trọng điểm: Nông nghiệp, Y tế, Sản xuất, Bán lẻ/E-commerce. Cập nhật kiến thức vĩ mô: Liên tục nắm bắt các khung pháp lý (Basel III, HIPAA, GDPR…), xu hướng thị trường, đối thủ cạnh tranh và best practices để đưa ra những lời khuyên sắc bén nhất. Dẫn dắt Tư tưởng: Đóng góp xây dựng và xuất bản các case study, bài viết chuyên sâu trong lĩnh vực chuyên môn. Đại diện ExcelTech tham gia các sự kiện ngành, hội thảo chuyên gia. Đào tạo nội bộ: Dẫn dắt và chuyển giao kiến thức nghiệp vụ cho đội ngũ nội bộ, hướng tới việc xây dựng các Business Unit của ExcelTech trở thành những "Vertical Experts" thay vì chỉ là Generalists. 4. Làm chủ Công nghệ & Trí tuệ Nhân tạo Chuyên gia Kỹ nghệ: Không chỉ dừng lại ở việc sử dụng AI cơ bản, ứng viên cần có khả năng thiết kế các prompt phức tạp trên các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLMs) hàng đầu như Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT . Ứng dụng LLM để xử lý dữ liệu phi cấu trúc, bóc tách insight từ tài liệu ngành, và tăng tốc độ viết các tài liệu phức tạp (BRD, User Stories). Trực quan hóa với Generative AI: Tiên phong trong việc ứng dụng các công cụ thiết kế tích hợp AI (như Figma AI, v0.dev ) để tạo wireframe, mockup và biến ý tưởng thành giao diện trực quan với tốc độ thần tốc, giúp khách hàng "chạm" vào giải pháp ngay từ khâu ý tưởng. Tự động hóa & Khung tác tử AI: Có tư duy hệ thống và hiểu biết về cách ứng dụng các framework AI Agents hoặc các công cụ tự động hóa luồng công việc. Nhạy bén trong việc đề xuất tích hợp AI để giải phóng sức lao động cho cả quy trình nội bộ lẫn hệ thống của khách hàng. Quản trị Tri thức & Hiệu suất: Thành thạo việc xây dựng không gian làm việc, kết nối hệ thống tài liệu và quản lý dự án bằng các nền tảng số hiện đại có trợ lực AI (như ClickUp, Obsidian , Notion AI), đảm bảo thông tin dự án luôn minh bạch và dễ dàng truy xuất xuyên suốt vòng đời phát triển. Cập nhật hệ sinh thái công nghệ: Có đam mê thử nghiệm các công cụ AI mới. Hiểu được ranh giới giữa những gì AI "có thể làm tốt ngay lúc này" và "những rủi ro tiềm ẩn" để tư vấn giải pháp an toàn, khả thi nhất cho doanh nghiệp. Why You'll Love Working Here 1. Thu nhập cạnh tranh & đãi ngộ xứng đáng Lương thưởng minh bạch, xét thăng tiến công bằng với cơ hội tăng lương 1-2 lần/năm. Thưởng tháng 13 hấp dẫn, chia sẻ thành quả từ sự phát triển của công ty. Thường hiệu quả công việc cộng thêm tháng 14, 15, 16… 2. Chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn diện Khám sức khỏe tổng quát định kỳ hàng năm để luôn an tâm và khỏe mạnh. Cung cấp Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe toàn diện cho bạn và người thân. 3. Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp & năng động Cộng sự tài năng: Làm việc cùng đội ngũ kỹ sư, chuyên gia trẻ, sáng tạo và đầy đam mê. Dự án đột phá: Trực tiếp tham gia vào những dự án công nghệ tiên phong, định hình xu hướng thị trường. 4. Lộ trình phát triển cá nhân Tham gia các khoá Đào tạo định kỳ từ Công ty và Tập đoàn tổ chức. Cơ hội thăng tiến rõ ràng, được thiết kế riêng cho từng cá nhân. 5. Cân bằng cuộc sống & gắn kết Teambuilding, du lịch hàng năm và các sự kiện văn hóa, thể thao sôi động. Tham gia hoạt động trong các Nhóm văn nghệ và thể thao để thỏa sức đam mê và kết nối. Hỗ trợ tối đa với đầy đủ các loại phụ cấp (ăn trưa, xăng xe, đi lại...).

job_title: Senior Golang Developer Backend, AWS, MySQL
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us No.1 Construction Tech company in Japan Hybrid working environment Attractive salary and Macbook Pro The Job We are looking for a Senior Golang Engineer who can join our team and develop the application in cooperation with the product manager. Working in the form of Squad, a small team can quickly and consistently engage in everything from designing to development, testing and operations. Also, there are a lot of opportunities to work with new languages ​​and FWs other than the main language in an international environment . ■ Job Scope Design and implementation function of the product in charge using Golang Refactoring existing products for microservices Requirements definition and specification formulation in collaboration with product managers and designers Architecture design based on requirements Measurement of effects for quality improvement and implementation of service improvement measures ■ Development environment Infrastructure: AWS, GCP CI/CD: Circle CI/ Codebuild DB: Amazon Aurora (MySQL compatible edition), Elasticsearch, DynamoDB Configuration management: Ansible Deploy/ Build: CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CircleCI, GitHub Actions IaC: Packer, Terraform Monitoring: Datadog, Bugsnag Others: Swagger, Docker, ZenHub, Figma, Slack/Jira Your Skills and Experience Must have: Empathy for Andpad's mission and values 5+ years of experience in developing and operating Web services using Golang, AWS, gRPC Experience as a technical lead throughout the full project development lifecycle Experience in developing and operating Web applications using frameworks Experience in schema design such as RDBMS and KVS and design of optimal query Have knowledge of Web application security Experience Test code implementation (Unit Test) Good at English communication Nice to have: Experience of discovering problems from logs and solving problems Experience in developing systems using container technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes Experience in designing architecture based on application requirements and selecting middleware Experience of publishing and contributing OSS External technical output experience (writing, technical blog, stage, etc.) Context Engineering: Experience in how to provide the right context to AI agents, structuring codebases for AI readability, and reducing hallucinations. Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary package, including full insurance coverage Annual performance review: twice/ year Year-end Bonus Remote/ Hybrid working 12 days of annual leave and maximum of 6 days for New Year's Leave Premium Healthcare Insurance Package starting from day one Annual Health Check-up Excellent career development opportunities, with exposure to and experience in the latest technologies Patents and Inventions bonus Company trip, Year-End Party, Gifts for Tet/ Holidays MacBook Pro/ Laptop is provided

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Global product & excellent team Focus on quality & personal growth 3 remote days per week The Job We are looking for a Senior full-stack web developer with NodeJS/ Python and ReactJS with a strong background in API design, databases, performance, scalability, security, etc to join our team. You will be working across a range of projects and industries, building scalable and high-performance web solutions. Requirements Location: Ho Chi Minh, Da Nang, Hanoi What You’ll Be Doing Working on Web and Mobile products for diverse clients and industries. Working and pair programming with other developers to build applications with Python/Node.JS and ReactJS. Designing & implementing back-end API using Python/Node.JS Working with Product Owners to convert business requirements into technical designs. Cooperating with UI designers to implement modern minimalist designs into production. Applying proven technologies and best practices to level up your technical skills: NestJS, Redux Learning new languages and frameworks to improve yourself and stay current in an ever-changing environment. Your Skills and Experience Must have 6+ years of experience in backend development using Python/ NodeJS 3+ years of experience in frontend development using ReactJS or similar frameworks (Vue, Svelte, Angular) Proven expertise in designing and implementing RESTful APIs, scalable web architecture, and deploying to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) Experience integrating AI/ML solutions into web applications Strong working knowledge of relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server) Familiarity with Extreme Programming (XP) practices such as Test-Driven Development (TDD), Continuous Integration (CI), and code refactoring Experience working within Agile/Scrum teams Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal Experience leading project teams through the full life cycle of software development Experience supporting other team tasks such as mentoring, creating proposals, designing architecture for a project, etc. Nice to have Experience with serverless architecture, e.g., AWS Lambda, GCP Cloud Function, etc. Experience with security, performance, and scalability. Experience with NoSQL and Message Queue. Why You'll Love Working Here Who We Are CodeLink is an innovative and design-focused development agency. We focus on user-centric design and agile development to bring the product vision of our clients to life. We handle the end-to-end development of products, developing the product vision through product understanding, designing experiences through UX design, refining these flows with modern UI design, and developing products through iterative agile development. We work with both early-stage product teams and teams with existing products from a wide range of countries and industries. We focus on modern technologies and work directly with our clients. We design using design-thinking principles on tools such as Sketch, Figma, Zeplin, and more, and develop products leveraging our tech stack of React, React Native, Rails, Python, and Node.JS. Our Core Values 1. Take full ownership of delivery We take ownership of our client projects and ensure that we deliver what we are in charge of to the best possible outcome. 2. Deliver our highest level of quality We take pride in the high quality that we deliver and work at a sustainable pace to ensure we can always deliver on that quality. 3. Stay consistent in plans and processes We keep open and transparent communication with our teammates and our client whilst following agile development practices. 4. Have empathy for all those we work with We show empathy and respect to all those we work with to gain a deeper understanding without any judgment or assumption. 5. Continuously improve and grow We aim high with a growth mindset and see every day as an opportunity to develop ourselves, our processes, and our products. Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Use cutting-edge & proven technologies Work directly with international clients Open environment with a focus on learning Why You’ll Love Working With Us We work hand-in-hand with our clients to fully invest in their product development and build solutions together for their target market. We fully invest in our team, we will help you build yourself up in any area you feel you need development, be it in English, learning a new design tool, developing your design thinking, and more. We want to make sure that you’re always learning and developing yourself whilst a part of our team. We respect both Product and Technology equally, ensuring all of the Products we work on have features with true market potential and ensuring all of the team contribute to, understand, and believe in what they are developing. We are very selective with our clients, we only work on awesome products we believe in and that show strong market potential. We respect you and your personal hours, we keep a sustainable pace by working standard 8 hour days from Monday to Friday, ensuring we only plan for what we can achieve. We are fully agile and only work with Clients who work the same, working with set sprint goals and working at our rate of velocity. You will have ownership over your role, giving you the opportunity to experiment and try new processes to better improve your day-to-day responsibilities. We are always open to improving our processes. Company Benefits An open and dynamic working environment with no dress code and the freedom to be yourself . Modern open-space office with comfortable workspace , a PS4 games room , and chill-out areas. Salary review twice a year with opportunities for promotions and spot awards . Yearly Training Budget up to 5 million VND per staff. Culture of recognition with monthly rewards for those with the most kudos. All office benefits and full salary during probation. Flexible starting time up to 10 AM working Monday - Friday with no overtime and a long lunch break . Two days remote every week taken on any days you choose so you can work from wherever you like. Full Vietnamese holidays off with 12 annual leave days per year with all days not taken paid out in cash . Yearly company trip , monthly team all-hands activities, welcome lunches for new members, the monthly budget for team celebrations . Celebrations for special days in the year, such as Women’s Day, YEP, Christmas. Gold level Health Insurance coverage from Bao Viet Insurance and a yearly complete Health Check . Employee-led clubs within the company; games teams, sports teams, etc. Buddy system, tech, and product talks, mentoring , and paid-for training for any skills you’d like to develop. Weekly agile sessions and professional coaching . Meal allowance, parking allowance, petrol allowance, and unlimited snacks and coffee every day . Options for a full MAC or PC set-up are completely provided. Where We Work HCMC Head Office : Level 8, Vina Building, 131 Xo Viet Nghe Tinh, Ward 17, Binh Thanh District, HCMC Hanoi Office: Ba Dinh District, Ha Noi City Da Nang Office: Level 8, Bach Dang Complex, 50 Bach Dang, Hai Chau Ward, Da Nang City

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Hybrid working; Flexible time; Macbook Pro L&D programs; 17 days off 13.7 million B2C users; 140,000+ business customer The Job Position Overview CLWeb is a multi-tenant banking web platform provided to financial institutions, supporting secure and reliable operational workflows across multiple tenants. In the AI era, the QA Engineer role is evolving from a traditional test executor into an AI-enabled Quality Engineer who accelerates delivery while building the safeguards needed for a complex, high-trust product domain. This role is responsible for protecting release quality across web UI, backend APIs, and related integrations by combining risk-based manual testing, stable automation, AI-assisted quality workflows, strong release judgment, and practical data validation. The role partners closely with product, engineering, and QA members to improve both speed and safety while ensuring that business-critical workflows, tenant boundaries, and customer operations remain reliable. Key Responsibilities Quality Assurance & Test Strategy Design and execute test strategies, plans, and cases for functional, regression, smoke, integration, exploratory, and release validation testing , with strong acceptance criteria and release safeguards. Perform hands-on manual testing for high-risk or judgment-heavy scenarios, and protect quality across a large-scale product domain using risk-based testing and sound release judgment. Analyze failures across UI, API responses, logs, reports, and test data to distinguish product defects from test issues or environmental instability and drive issues to closure. Automation, AI & Data Validation Design, develop, and maintain automated test suites for E2E, API, and critical business workflow testing , while improving frameworks, reusable utilities, fixtures, and test data handling within the existing Playwright + TypeScript ecosystem. Use AI tools effectively to accelerate test design, test case generation, test data preparation, automation authoring, and defect investigation, and where AI-enabled capabilities are introduced, perform prompt testing, response evaluation, edge case validation, and consistency checks . Perform API testing and validate data integrity across UI, APIs, databases, and connected systems, including SQL- or DB-level validation where needed. Integrate and optimize automation in CI/CD pipelines using the current workflow based on GitHub Actions , improving execution reliability, coverage, and quality signals while reducing flaky tests. Collaboration & Process Improvement Collaborate closely with product, engineering, and QA members to improve shift-left quality practices , including testability, observability, regression safety, and practical quality standards for AI-enabled delivery. Support test case and automation traceability in Zephyr , define and monitor quality metrics, and contribute to broader quality initiatives such as standards, coverage planning, release evidence quality, and process improvement. Your Skills and Experience Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field , or equivalent practical experience. 5+ years of QA automation / SDET / hybrid QA experience, including strong hands-on manual testing for web applications. Strong programming/scripting skills in TypeScript , plus practical experience in Python for data validation, utilities, or investigation workflows. Experience with Java is a plus. Experience with Playwright, Cypress, Selenium , or similar tools, with Playwright preferred , plus solid experience in API automation using Playwright API, Postman/Newman, or equivalent. Practical experience with AI coding/testing assistants , Generative AI , or LLM-based workflows for test generation, debugging, and QA productivity improvement, with sound human review. Strong knowledge of SQL, data validation techniques, test design, exploratory testing, defect investigation, release validation , and core concepts such as test pyramid, risk-based testing, mocking, assertions, negative testing, and boundary testing . Understanding of machine learning concepts, AI system behavior, prompt engineering, or AI evaluation methods for assessing output quality, consistency, and edge cases. CI/CD experience with GitHub Actions / Jenkins / GitLab CI / Azure DevOps , along with experience using Git, code reviews, logs, API responses, SQL checks, and test reports to investigate failures effectively. Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work cross-functionally, translate high-level product requirements into practical quality approaches, and balance speed and robustness in a complex product environment. Conversational English proficiency for technical discussions and documentation with global teams. Nice to Have Working knowledge of MySQL , database seeding, or DB-level validation for automated tests. Experience with Docker/Kubernetes , AWS , distributed systems, multi-tenant or regulated products, and integration-heavy business workflows. Experience testing AI systems, LLM applications, chatbots , or supporting data pipeline / dataset quality validation. Experience with Zephyr or similar test management tools, improving automation frameworks, reducing flaky tests, mentoring QA members, or communicating in Japanese. Key Skills Hybrid QA: manual + automation Playwright + TypeScript test automation API testing , SQL , and data validation Risk-based testing and release judgment AI-assisted test design and prompt / output evaluation CI/CD quality integration and defect investigation Success Metrics Improved protection of critical business workflows and release confidence. Increased automation coverage for high-risk UI, API, and workflow scenarios. Reduced defect leakage , flaky tests, and noisy CI quality signals. Faster, higher-quality test design, investigation, and issue detection across AI, data, and regression areas. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary package Flexible working culture Global environment with international project The Job We are seeking a Technical Lead to drive the architecture and development of high-performance, low-latency backend systems built with Golang/Java. The role emphasizes secure networking, real-time event streaming, and hybrid cloud/on-premise architectures. You will be responsible for leading engineering teams to design and scale distributed services that operate under massive concurrency, while ensuring performance, resilience, and security across environments. Key Responsibilities Lead the design and implementation of distributed backend services in Golang. Build systems with advanced networking, routing, and encryption capabilities using modern protocols. Define and evolve system architecture for multi-region, highly available deployments across AWS and on-premise infrastructure. Deliver performant APIs and control systems for secure, large-scale connectivity and real-time workloads. Design for high Concurrent User (CCU) loads, focusing on throughput, latency reduction, and horizontal scalability. Leverage Redis for caching, distributed coordination, and Pub/Sub messaging. Use Kafka for scalable event streaming, log aggregation, and operational analytics. Conduct performance tuning, load testing, and fault injection to validate system resilience. Embed strong cryptographic and secure communication practices (key exchange, rotation, encryption in transit and at rest). Collaborate with security stakeholders to align with compliance standards (SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR). Implement CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible), and GitOps workflows. Manage Kubernetes clusters (AWS EKS and on-prem) for containerized workloads, ensuring scalability and high availability. Drive observability with metrics, logs, and traces (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry). Provide hands-on technical leadership and mentor engineering team members. Guide design reviews, enforce coding standards, and foster a culture of technical excellence. Partner with Product and Operations teams to translate requirements into scalable solutions. Your Skills and Experience Must Have Expertise in Golang, including concurrency, networking, and performance profiling. Strong understanding of WireGuard protocol and modern secure networking approaches. Advanced experience with Redis (caching, Pub/Sub, clustering, distributed locks). In-depth knowledge of Kafka (streaming pipelines, consumer group management, schema evolution). Proven experience with Kubernetes (EKS, on-premise clusters) and AWS cloud services (VPC, EC2, IAM, MSK, ElastiCache). Background in large-scale distributed systems handling thousands of concurrent connections. Strong DevOps mindset with automation, observability, and reliability engineering practices. Nice to Have Knowledge of Linux networking internals (iptables, nftables, routing, namespaces). Experience with additional messaging systems (e.g., RabbitMQ). Security certifications or expertise in cryptography and access management. Exposure to real-time systems or high-frequency transaction processing. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent experience. 9+ years in backend engineering (Golang) with 3+ years in a Tech Lead. Why You'll Love Working Here What we offer Competitive salary package aligned with your experience and market standards Performance-based reviews and clear growth opportunities A global working environment with exposure to international teams and projects Opportunities for personal and professional development, including training and new-skill learning Flexible working culture, built on trust and responsibility Supportive, open-minded team culture, where your ideas and contributions are valued Chances to travel or collaborate across offices, depending on project needs And more benefits tailored to help you thrive at Secuwall

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Hybrid working; Flexible time; Macbook Pro L&D programs; 17 days off 13.7 million B2C users; 140,000+ business customer The Job Overview At Money Forward Inc., we are dedicated to transforming financial services through advanced technology. With over 50 services for individuals and businesses—including products such as Money Forward ME and Money Forward Cloud—we help users better understand and manage their finances. Our platform leverages industry-leading account aggregation technology to turn financial data into meaningful insights. Within the Money Forward Business Segment (MFBS), Money Forward Cloud is a component-based cloud ERP composed of multiple service groups. While this modularity provides flexibility, developing services in isolation can lead to data silos, inconsistent user experiences, and reduced development efficiency. The Business Platform Development (BPD) division addresses this by building the shared foundations that unify services across the platform. We develop and operate common microservices and backend systems that power workflows and platform functionality throughout Money Forward Cloud. Our mission is to standardize capabilities, reduce technical friction, improve scalability, and enable product teams to move faster with confidence. We are looking for a senior, execution-oriented engineering leader who combines strong hands-on engineering skills with a high sense of ownership. In this role, you will drive complex backend initiatives end-to-end, contribute code where it has the most impact, and help teams turn ambiguity into clear, executable work. Rather than focusing on ceremonies, you will lead through technical direction, decision-making, and presence—supporting both delivery and the people doing the work while aligning priorities and unblocking execution. This role offers the opportunity to create outsized impact across Tokyo and Vietnam teams by stabilizing execution, raising engineering standards, and strengthening the reliability of Money Forward’s common platform services. Responsibilities and Duties Take end-to-end ownership of backend initiatives, from problem definition through delivery and follow-up. Drive execution by turning ambiguous goals into clear, actionable work with defined ownership. Design, implement, and review scalable backend systems and services, contributing hands-on where it has the highest impact. Use AI to rapidly transform the requirements into a functional reality. Ultra-fast prototyping and initial production deployment within a matter of days, leveraging generative AI. Instantly identifying technical flaws in AI-generated code or UI, and then correcting and improving them. Identify technical, delivery, and organizational blockers early and push initiatives past them. Act as a technical and execution anchor for engineers across Tokyo and Vietnam. Provide technical guidance, code reviews, and mentorship to raise engineering quality, ownership, and team confidence. Support planning and delivery by helping teams scope work realistically, surface dependencies, and maintain momentum. Serve as a key technical contact point between engineering teams, product, and leadership to ensure alignment and visibility. Improve team processes pragmatically, focusing on outcomes rather than ceremonies. Support engineers through mentorship, coaching, and timely feedback—helping individuals grow confidence, ownership, and execution capability. Foster a culture of ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement. Your Skills and Experience Qualifications Practical background in software engineering or a related field (technical institution that enables you to build things on your own). A basic understanding of and familiarity with the B2B business domain. 6+ years of professional software development experience with strong hands-on backend skills. Proven experience leading technical initiatives without formal authority (e.g., senior IC, staff engineer, or tech lead role). Strong understanding of backend system design, APIs, data stores, and distributed systems. Comfortable operating in environments with ambiguity and changing priorities. Clear communicator who can explain technical decisions, trade-offs, and risks to both engineers and non-engineers. Strong sense of ownership — drives progress instead of waiting for instructions. Nice-to-Haves Experience with Go and/or Java in production systems. Experience with distributed systems, message queues, or event-driven architectures. Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP), containerization, and infrastructure as code. Experience working with multi-national, cross-timezone teams. Pragmatic exposure to architecture patterns (DDD, clean architecture, etc.) without dogmatism. Language Skills Business level English proficiency (TOEIC score of 700 or above equivalent). Japanese proficiency is not required, but a plus. Those Who Thrive Engineers who naturally take ownership when something has no clear owner. People who enjoy turning messy problems into executable plans. Senior ICs who prefer impact and responsibility over titles. Engineers who respect process but are not blocked by it. Leaders who create stability and trust through clarity, calm judgment, and follow-through. Those aligned with Money Forward’s Mission, Vision, and Values, and motivated to build durable platform foundations. Technology Stack Language: Go, Java Database: MySQL, DynamoDB, Redis Infrastructure/Middleware: Terraform, Kubernetes, AWS (EKS, ECR, RDS, S3, SQS, SNS, etc…), GCP, Docker, Kafka, NginX, Consul Tools Used Communication: Slack, Notion, Zoom Monitoring: Datadog, Rollbar, Sentry Repository Management: GitHub CI/CD: Argo CD, Circle CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions Ticket Management: Jira Security: Dependabot, Sonarqube AI-Assisted Development Tools: Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding / productivity tools Why You'll Love Working Here Caring Mental & Physical Recreation: Hybrid working Full salary in probation & 13th month salary Social insurance on full salary from probation Premium Health insurance from probation Flexible start 8AM-9AM from Mon-Fri 16 days off annually + 1 Birthday Leave Paternity leave extra 5 days Annual company trip; Quarterly team building activities Club activities Annual health check Caring Career & Development: Clear Career path Foreign language & International technology-related certifications sponsoring Well-equipped facility: Macbook pro, additional monitor,.. Soft skill workshops Tech seminars Monthly and biannually Recognition Awards Performance review twice/year

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive Salary and Benefits Amazing Clients Product driven company The Job At OL Vietnam , we have worked alongside our parent company, Orange Logic LLC, to support some of the world’s largest enterprises with their digital asset management needs. Orange Logic provides a premier Digital Asset Management (DAM) platform that streamlines workflows, enhances collaboration, and ensures compliance across complex digital ecosystems, empowering any team working with digital content the ability to efficiently create, manage, and distribute their content at scale. WHAT DIFFERENTIATES OL VIETNAM We are trusted by global leaders to work with over 100 customers, including many of the world's most recognized brands. Our business is strong and resilient, even in the face of economic challenges. During the Covid economic downturn, we did not implement layoffs or reduce compensation. Instead, we continued to grow, consistently expanding our team and adding dozens of talented members to our R&D department each year. You’ll work with top engineers and team members who are passionate about building flexible, scalable, and streamlined systems that will define the future of business management. MISSION Job Summary: We’re seeking a Demo Operations Specialist who is a key contributor within the Demo Operations function, supporting Solutions Engineers by building, configuring, and maintaining high-quality demo environments used in sales engagements. While aligned to the Implementation team, this role operates in close partnership with Pre-sales to ensure demo environments are delivered accurately, consistently, and on time. This role is highly execution-focused and process-driven, responsible for translating defined requirements into fully configured environments. Responsibilities include structuring content, applying metadata, configuring UI elements, and enabling workflows that support compelling, repeatable demo experiences. In addition to core demo builds, this role also supports proof of concept environments and maintains shared demo systems used across teams. Essential Functions: Demo & POC Environment Setup Configure demo and proof of concept environments based on detailed briefs from Solutions Engineers, including folder structures, metadata schemas, and content organization aligned to specific use cases and customer scenarios. Asset Management & Tagging Source, upload, and organize assets using customer-provided content, stock libraries, or curated examples; apply metadata and taxonomy with a high degree of accuracy and consistency. UI Configuration Configure user interfaces including homepages, navigation, collections, and forms to support guided demo flows, POC use cases, and role-based experiences. Automation & AI Services Execute AI-driven tagging and metadata enrichment processes; configure basic automation workflows to support demo and POC functionality. Workflow Support & Testing Assist in building and validating simulated customer workflows; execute QA processes, complete environment checklists, and ensure readiness prior to handoff to Solutions Engineers. Shared Demo System Support Maintain and update shared demo environments used across Presales and other internal teams, ensuring consistency, usability, and alignment with evolving product capabilities. Collaboration & Documentation Partner with Solutions Engineers, Implementation, and Product teams to deliver environments on schedule; maintain internal documentation, templates, and best practices to support scalability and repeatability. The above statements outline what are generally considered the principal and essential functions of this role. Specific responsibilities may vary based on business needs. Your Skills and Experience Key Qualifications: 1–3 years of experience in system configuration, digital asset management, or related technical support roles Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Digital Media, or a related field preferred Strong attention to detail and ability to execute within structured, repeatable processes Comfortable working independently with clearly defined requirements and timelines Familiarity with DAM systems or similar enterprise platforms is a plus Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across distributed, cross-functional teams Why You'll Love Working Here You would love to work and find those values with us: Distributed decision making: We also allow each employee to directly weigh in on our priorities. Transparency: We value transparency, openness, and accountability, whether it is with our customers or internally. Meritocracy: Employee's recognition and advancement is based purely on their individual and collective achievements. Deep work: We do everything we can to let you focus deeply on your work. Our benefits include: Attractive salary package. 100% Gross Salary in the probation period. 13th-month salary. 18 days of annual leaves (cashback allowed if not used). 4 days for an overseas company trip. Multiple allowances (Lunch, Gym, Parking, Birthday/Tet/Wedding voucher... ). Full social, health, and unemployment insurance. Premium healthcare insurance for you and coverage for 1 extra family member.
