NHIỆM VỤ, TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH: Cộng tác với các đơn vị nghiệp vụ, bao gồm kiến trúc sư phần mềm, quản lý sản phẩm, các đơn vị kinh doanh, thiết kế để phát triển các ứng dụng Java. Thiết kế và triển khai ứng dụng bằng ngôn ngữ Java hiệu quả và đáng tin cậy, đảm bảo hiệu suất và bảo mật. Thực hiện đánh giá mã nguồn để duy trì chất lượng và tuân theo các tiêu chuẩn mã hóa. Gỡ lỗi, khắc phục sự cố và giải quyết các nhược điểm và sự cố phần mềm, đảm bảo độ tin cậy của ứng dụng. Tham gia phân tích yêu cầu và thảo luận thiết kế phần mềm để đề xuất các giải pháp sáng tạo. Phát triển và duy trì tài liệu kỹ thuật để tham khảo và báo cáo. Cập nhật thông tin về xu hướng công nghệ liên quan đến Java, các cách thực hành tốt nhất và tiêu chuẩn ngành. Xác định tầm nhìn kỹ thuật cho việc phát triển phần mềm, phù hợp với mục tiêu kinh doanh và thực tiễn tốt nhất của ngành. Cộng tác với các nhà phát triển khác để xây dựng các giải pháp phần mềm có thể mở rộng và hiệu quả. Góp phần vào toàn bộ vòng đời phát triển phần mềm, từ khái niệm và thiết kế đến thử nghiệm, triển khai và hỗ trợ. Your Skills and Experience Bằng cử nhân về Khoa học máy tính, Kỹ thuật phần mềm hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan trở lên. Đã có kinh nghiệm tương đương trong vai trò kỹ sư cao cấp phát triển phần mềm với ngôn ngữ Java Ưu tiên am hiểu lĩnh vực tài chính ngân hàng, hệ thống LOS. Thông thạo các nguyên tắc phát triển phần mềm, lập trình hướng đối tượng và các cách thực hành tốt nhất của Java. Kỹ năng thiết kế cơ sở dữ liệu và SQL (ví dụ: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle). Kỹ năng phát triển ứng dụng web (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). Thành thạo quy trình kiểm thử, gỡ lỗi và khắc phục sự cố phần mềm. Kỹ năng về các công nghệ container hóa và điều phối quy trình (ví dụ: Docker, Kubernetes). Thành thạo hệ thống kiểm soát phiên bản (ví dụ: Git). Thành thạo về BPMN, DMN, lược đồ cơ sở dữ liệu, giao thức truyền thông hệ thống như HTTP, Restful API, Dịch vụ web. Có kinh nghiệm với các nền tảng và dịch vụ đám mây (ví dụ: AWS, Azure) là một lợi thế. Khả năng làm việc theo nhóm / tổ chức. Khả năng làm việc hiệu quả trong sự thay đổi. Khả năng lập kế hoạch và tổ chức. Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề. Why You'll Love Working Here Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, cởi mở, chú trọng 5 giá trị cốt lõi: “Thông minh – Chính trực – Dũng cảm – Thân thiện – Hợp tác” Thời gian làm việc từ thứ 2 – thứ 6 (40h/ tuần); Chế độ làm việc Hybrid dành riêng cho CBNV khối Công nghệ; Đồng nghiệp thân thiện, cởi mở với tư duy đề cao sự phát triển của mỗi cá nhân; Văn phòng làm việc với không gian mở, rộng rãi, được cung cấp đầy đủ các trang thiết bị để phục vụ cho công việc. Quan tâm đặc biệt đến nhân viên: Gói đãi ngộ cạnh tranh; Hỗ trợ ăn trưa 1.200.000 VND/tháng; Hỗ trợ gửi xe 200.000 VNĐ/ tháng; Quyền lợi chăm sóc sức khỏe đặc quyền bảo hiểm sức khỏe toàn diện SHBFC Care; Nghỉ phép ngày sinh nhật; Khám sức khỏe thường niên tại bệnh viện hàng đầu Việt Nam cùng các chế độ BHXH theo quy định của nhà nước; Du lịch thường niên, hoạt động team building năm; Tập trung hỗ trợ sự phát triển cá nhân: Được tư vấn, đồng hành và hỗ trợ phát triển sự nghiệp cùng các cấp quản lý tài năng, giàu kinh nghiệm; Cơ hội tham gia các dự án lớn, đi đầu trong lĩnh vực tài chính tiêu dùng; Chính sách hỗ trợ các hoạt động học tập, trao đổi, chia sẻ kiến thức, giao lưu văn hoá (Training, Seminar...).

company_name: NGÂN HÀNG THƯƠNG MẠI TNHH MTV KỶ NGUYÊN THỊNH VƯỢNG (GPBANK)
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job I. OVERVIEW OF GPBANK On January 17, 2025, GPBank was converted into a single-member limited liability Commercial Bank with 100% capital owned by VPBank. From October 8, 2025, GPBank officially launches a new brand identity, marking a comprehensive transformation with the new name Generation of Prosperity Bank - symbolizing the journey towards an era of prosperity and sustainable development. At the same time, GPBank is the pioneer bank in Vietnam to implement a completely new Core Banking system, built on China’s modern OneConnect Core platform. This strategic move reflects the bank’s ambition to become a technology-driven digital banking leader, not only rebuilding its entire system from scratch but also laying the foundation to replicate and transfer this model to other member units within the VPBank ecosystem. II. JOB RESPONSIBILITIES Analyze business requirement and identify scope of work related to Micro-service and API Design technical integration between core systems and external/internal platforms Create detail design for identified Micro-service Create specification for identified API Support to deploy Micro-service and API into production Support to resolve incident/problem on production Review and accept Micro-services design documents and source code delivered by partners. Research and improve the Micro-service and API development framework/standard Training for other team members Your Skills and Experience III. JOB REQUIREMENTS Relevant Knowledge / Expertise Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or related field of study: or equivalent education, training & experience 8+ years’ experience in full-stack application development (backend and frontend). 8+ years designing and building Java applications with Spring/Spring Boot and relational/NoSQL databases (MS SQL, MySQL, MongoDB). Strong ability to analyze and design systems, and to code/debug single-page applications using React or Angular. Proven experience delivering responsive, cross-platform web apps and collaborating on UI/UX to ensure accessibility and usability API-first architecture; DDD-based microservices; event- and message-driven systems Familiar with CI/CD tools and practices (e.g., Jenkins, Git, Maven/Gradle, or equivalents). Experience deploying applications with Docker/containers. Proficient with source control (e.g., Git, SVN). Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments. Experience deploying and operating applications on public cloud platforms. Ability to develop mobile applications with Flutter. AWS experience/certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Solutions Architect, AWS Certified Developer) or equivalent cloud credentials. Skills Ability in English reading and writing, and speaking, listening (mandatory). Can work as individual or as a team member, under stressful conditions, good teamwork attitude Self-development. Ability to communicate clearly and concisely, both orally and in writing, as an advocate for technological solutions. Being able to understand and catch-up quickly with new technology Experience of supervision of a development team Relevant Experience Banking Domain experience Agile/Scrum experience Why You'll Love Working Here IV. ATTACTIVE BENEFITS & COMPENSATION PACKAGE Career Opportunities & Projects Join one of Vietnam’s largest Core Banking Transformation Projects , handling up to 1 billion transactions per day . Work in a modern, technology-driven environment leveraging Cloud-native, DevOps, Microservices, and CI/CD practices. Learn directly from international technology experts and participate in strategic digital banking initiatives . Enjoy a clear career development roadmap with opportunities to advance to Leader or Expert roles in the Digital Banking domain . Compensation & Benefits Competitive salary package : Upto 65M x 14–15 months/year. Performance-based bonuses : business results, individual performance, innovation, responsibility Health insurance & wellness : GPBankCare package (provided by Bao Viet Insurance ) extended to employees and family members. Learning & Development : support for professional training courses and international certification exams . Annual company trip and vacation allowance : up to 6M/year . Holiday & special occasion bonuses (National holidays: Sept 2nd, Apr 30th, Hung Kings’ Festival, birthdays, weddings, etc.) V. WORKING HOURS AND LOCATION Working Hours: Standard working hours : Monday – Friday (flexible start time: 8:00 / 8:30 / 9:00 ) and 2 Saturday mornings per month (8:00–12:00).

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Phân tích, thiết kế và phát triển các tính năng cho sản phẩm/hệ thống. Thiết kế, tối ưu phần mềm nhằm nâng cao hiệu năng và khả năng tương thích phần cứng. Thực hiện lập trình, unit test, integration test và xử lý lỗi hệ thống. Phân tích yêu cầu kỹ thuật, triển khai và tối ưu các module hiệu năng cao, đảm bảo tính ổn định. Nghiên cứu, phát triển các module giao tiếp phần cứng/phần mềm và công cụ phân tích hệ thống. Viết tài liệu phân tích, thiết kế và bảo trì phần mềm. Chủ động nghiên cứu, cập nhật và thử nghiệm công nghệ/framework mới để nâng cao hiệu quả hệ thống. Hỗ trợ đào tạo, hướng dẫn các thành viên junior khi cần. Thực hiện các công việc khác theo phân công. Your Skills and Experience Tốt nghiệp ĐH các ngành CNTT, Kỹ thuật máy tính, Hệ thống thông tin, Điện tử viễn thông hoặc liên quan. Tối thiểu 4 năm kinh nghiệm (Senior) hoặc 1 năm (Junior) trong lĩnh vực CNTT; ưu tiên ứng viên có thành tích các cuộc thi CNTT. Nắm vững OOP, Database, Data Structure & Algorithm. Có khả năng thiết kế class/object và cơ sở dữ liệu quan hệ cho từng tính năng/yêu cầu cụ thể. Hiểu biết tốt về web, bảo mật web và áp dụng vào thực tế. Thành thạo SOLID, hiểu và vận dụng Design Pattern. Có kinh nghiệm với Microservices và một trong các công nghệ: Java, Python, NodeJS, Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch, ELK,... Có khả năng xử lý cả Backend và Frontend. Có khả năng nghiên cứu, học nhanh công nghệ mới. Kỹ năng phân tích, giải quyết vấn đề logic và có cấu trúc. Giao tiếp, thuyết trình tốt; phối hợp hiệu quả với các bên liên quan để chuyển đổi yêu cầu thành thiết kế hệ thống. job_title: FPT401- Embedded Software Developer Java, C++, Python
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Thông tin tuyển dụng Công ty onsite: FPT Software Korea Co., Ltd. Vị trí: Lập trình viên Phần mềm Nhúng (Embedded Software Developer) Số lượng tuyển: 5 người Thời gian tuyển dụng: Nửa cuối năm (H2) Mô tả công việc 1. Trách nhiệm chính Tham gia chương trình đào tạo 3–6 tháng về công nghệ phần mềm trong lĩnh vực Ô tô (Automotive – Infotainment, v.v.). Học và thực hành theo các tiêu chuẩn, quy trình ngành như Agile, ASPICE, ISO 26262. Tham gia các dự án mô phỏng và dự án thực tế dưới sự hướng dẫn của các kỹ sư giàu kinh nghiệm. Giao tiếp và phối hợp làm việc với đồng nghiệp và khách hàng bằng tiếng Hàn và tiếng Anh. Sau khi hoàn thành chương trình đào tạo, trở thành kỹ sư chính thức tham gia các dự án Automotive toàn cầu. Your Skills and Experience Yêu cầu ứng viên Tốt nghiệp đại học hoặc mới ra trường các ngành Công nghệ Thông tin, Khoa học Máy tính, Điện tử, hoặc liên quan. Trình độ tiếng Hàn (TOPIK cấp 4 trở lên hoặc tương đương) là một lợi thế lớn. Có nền tảng lập trình tốt (Java, C/C++, Python hoặc tương đương). Kỹ năng làm việc nhóm, tư duy logic và tinh thần học hỏi cao. Không yêu cầu kinh nghiệm – phù hợp mới ra trường. Ưu tiên (không bắt buộc) Ứng viên mới tốt nghiệp muốn phát triển sự nghiệp trong lĩnh vực phần mềm ô tô. Ứng viên Việt Nam có khả năng tiếng Hàn và định hướng làm việc lâu dài. Why You'll Love Working Here Mức thù lao cạnh tranh dựa trên kinh nghiệm và kỹ năng. Đóng bảo hiểm xã hội đầy đủ cho các hợp đồng từ 1 tháng trở lên theo Luật Lao động Việt Nam. Làm việc tại không gian co-working dùng chung tại Quận 7, TP. HCM.

job_title: Senior Java Developer Spring Boot, MySQL, Docker
company_name: CÔNG TY TNHH DỊCH VỤ GIÁ TRỊ GIA TĂNG GOLDENGATE
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Thu nhập hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh Tăng lương theo kinh nghiệm và thâm niên công tác Có BHXH, BHYT, chế độ nghỉ phép đầy đủ theo quy đị The Job Phát triển hệ thống, phần mềm có tính mở rộng cao, tính sẵn sàng cao, khả năng chịu lỗi nhưng vẫn duy được hoạt động, xử lý hàng chục triệu giao dịch trên ngày. Thuật toán & DSA: tư duy phân tích vấn đề, ước lượng độ phức tạp, cấu trúc dữ liệu phù hợp; kỹ năng debug mạnh. job_title: Team Lead/Technical Lead  Java Fullstack Spring Boot
location: Hồ Chí Minh, Hồ Chí Minh
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary and attractive benefit package Total Health Care Insurance Many training opportunities in Vietnam and Oversea The Job We are looking for a hands-on Team Lead / Technical Lead who will guide a team of developers while actively contributing to the design and implementation of Java-based full-stack web applications. This person will ensure the team's technical alignment, support best practices, and collaborate with cross-functional teams in an Agile environment. Lead and mentor a team of developers to deliver high-quality software. Design and develop scalable, maintainable full-stack applications using Java Spring Boot and ReactJS or Angular. Own and review technical architecture and implementation approaches. Work closely with Product Owners, QAs, DevOps, and UI/UX designers to clarify requirements and drive technical solutions. Actively participate in code reviews and help improve team coding standards and practices. Support the team in breaking down tasks, planning sprints, and removing blockers. Identify areas for improvement in the development process and propose solutions. Contribute to CI/CD pipeline setup and improvements (Jenkins, Docker, etc.). Support the onboarding of junior developers and foster a culture of knowledge sharing Your Skills and Experience Required skills/Experience: 07+ years of experience in software development, with at least 2 years in a technical/team leadership role. Proficient in Java Spring Boot, RESTful API development. Solid front-end experience with ReactJS or Angular. Strong understanding of OOP, SOLID principles, and software architecture patterns. Experience working with SQL databases and performance tuning. Hands-on experience with version control systems (Git), CI/CD tools (Jenkins, Docker), and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP is a plus). Excellent communication skills and ability to work with international stakeholders. Experience in Agile/Scrum environment. Good English communication (TOEIC 700+ or equivalent). Years of experiences: At least 07+ years Why You'll Love Working Here Working in an international, dynamic and professional environment with many opportunities to develop career Having opportunities of being trained oversea and working directly with oversea customer A stable and rewarding position where your long-term commitment will be highly valued Technical & Soft skills internal training courses Many company activities (Sport and music festival, TMA Futsal league …) are held annually Competitive salary and bonus Total Health Care Insurance Loan Fund Team Building Fund

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job A strategic Solution Architect to lead the architecture and solution design for large-scale digital banking and financial transformation initiatives . The successful candidate will have extensive experience in designing, implementing, and modernizing banking systems , ensuring the architecture supports the evolving needs of financial institutions, along with the ability to lead solution discussion and communicate confidently with client stakeholders to deliver scalable, secure and high-quality system solutions. In today’s engineering ecosystem, AI assistants are integral to the Software Development Lifecycle. Engineering, including this role, are expected to leverage AI tools for design analysis, code generation, test creation, and refactoring guidance , while focusing their expertise on architecture, system thinking, solution validation, security, quality assurance, and strategic technical decisions. Key Responsibilities Solution Architecture & System Design Design and implement end-to-end solution architectures for banking transformation and modernization initiatives. Evaluate existing banking systems, identify limitations, propose scalable, sustainable and secure architectural solutions. Create high-level and detailed architecture blueprints , covering application architecture, integration, data flows, and infrastructure considerations. Ensure architectural integrity and consistency across the entire banking ecosystem Identify, communicate, and mitigate Risks, Assumptions, Issues, and Decisions (RAID) throughout the project lifecycle. Leverage AI-assisted tools to analyze architecture options, improve design documentation, and support engineering productivity. Technical Leadership Provide technical leadership in defining best practices and frameworks for banking transformation. Guide teams in translating architectural designs into practical implementation strategies , ensuring consistent implementation of architecture standards. Support teams in solving complex technical challenges , particularly in distributed systems, integration, and large-scale financial platforms. Banking & Financial Platform Architecture Design systems and integration approaches supporting core banking capabilities, financial transactions, payment processing, and digital banking services . Ensure architectures comply with financial industry standards, regulatory requirements, and security frameworks . Collaborate with domain experts to translate banking business capabilities into technical architecture solutions . Client Collaboration & Delivery Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, and subject matter experts to define solution blueprints. Lead architecture discussions, design workshops, and solution alignment sessions with client teams. Communicate architecture decisions, trade-offs, risks, and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Support delivery teams to ensure solutions are implemented according to the intended architecture and quality standards. Your Skills and Experience Technical Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field. 10+ years of experience in software engineering or platform development . 4+ years of experience in a Solution Architect, or similar architecture leadership roles . Proficiency in developing and deploying applications in a microservices architecture and event driven architectures, especially strong in Java (Java, OOP, Kafka, Spring boot, etc.), with a focus on scalability, reliability, and performance optimization. Expertise in enterprise architecture, software design patterns, and API-driven architectures . Hands-on experience with integration frameworks and legacy modernization approaches in banking. Experience working with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) . Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and modern engineering workflows . Excellent problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and strong interpersonal skills . Strong ability to work in a fast-paced, high-impact environment and lead technical discussions. Specific Qualifications Experience working in banking, fintech, or financial services technology environments . Strong understanding of core banking, card, payment systems, or related financial systems . Knowledge of financial industry security standards and regulatory frameworks (e.g., PCI-DSS). Hands‑on exposure to AI‑assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, or similar). Ability to write effective prompts and context for AI generation across design, coding, testing, and documentation workflows . Ability to evaluate AI-generated solutions, architecture suggestions, and generated code for correctness, security, and scalability . Nice-to-Have Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) . Experience with enterprise architecture frameworks (e.g., TOGAF or similar). Experience supporting banking digital transformation or core system modernization initiatives . Why You'll Love Working Here Our client is a prominent European-based technology consultancy with over 30 years of global expertise in digital transformation. They specialize in engineering next-generation core systems and high-scale data solutions for industry leaders within the Financial Services, Insurance, and Manufacturing sectors. Operating a robust network across more than 20 countries, the firm is at the forefront of integrating advanced automation and modern engineering workflows into the software development lifecycle. With a strong commitment to technical excellence and a distributed global delivery model, they offer senior experts the chance to lead complex modernization initiatives. This is an ideal environment for those looking to influence the future of digital banking and large-scale enterprise architecture. Why You'll Love Working With Us Global Innovation Hub: Be part of a prestigious European technology firm with a 30-year legacy, working on large-scale digital transformation projects for top-tier global financial institutions. Cutting-Edge Tech Stack: Engage with an AI-centric environment where you are encouraged to leverage advanced AI-assisted development tools (like GitHub Copilot and Claude Code) to redefine engineering productivity. Expert Collaboration: Work alongside some of the industry's brightest minds in an international setting that fosters professional growth and cultural exchange. Continuous Upskilling: Access specialized training programs, including professional English courses and advanced certifications in Cloud, Architecture, and emerging technologies like Smart Contracts. Competitive & Transparent Rewards: Enjoy a robust compensation package featuring a guaranteed 13th-month salary, performance-based bonuses, and premium health insurance for your peace of mind. Work-Life Balance: Benefit from a flexible Hybrid working model and extensive annual leave, allowing you to balance professional excellence with personal well-being. High-Impact Projects: Direct your expertise toward modernizing next-generation core systems that power the daily lives of millions in the banking and fintech sectors.

job_title: Senior Fintech / Payment Engineer Java, Spring Boot
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary package Comprehensive health and accident insurance Full salary during probation The Job Thiết kế và phát triển Payment Processing Engine: transaction routing, clearing, settlement, reconciliation Xây dựng E-Wallet core: account management, fund transfer, top-up/withdrawal, transaction history Tích hợp với hệ thống thanh toán quốc gia (NAPAS, VietQR) và payment networks (Visa/Mastercard) Thiết kế Ledger System đảm bảo tính chính xác tuyệt đối (double-entry accounting, immutable audit trail) Implement Fraud Detection rules engine và real-time transaction monitoring Xây dựng KYC/eKYC flow: identity verification, document OCR, liveness detection integration Đảm bảo PCI-DSS compliance trong code và architecture design Xử lý các challenges đặc thù fintech: idempotency, exactly-once processing, distributed transactions (Saga pattern) Your Skills and Experience Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, trong đó ít nhất 3 năm trong Fintech/Banking/Payment Thành thạo Java/Spring Boot hoặc Go; job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job THÔNG TIN CHUNG/ GENERAL INFORMATION Tên vị trí / Position: Technical Lead Phòng ban/ Department: Kỹ thuật/ Engineering Báo cáo cho/ Report to: CEO / CTO Số lượng/ Headcount: 1 Cấp bậc/ Level: Lead / Principal MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC/ JOB PURPOSE Chịu trách nhiệm kiến trúc tổng thể hệ thống MDM, dẫn dắt đội ngũ phát triển, đưa ra quyết định kỹ thuật chiến lược và đảm bảo sản phẩm MDM đạt chất lượng tương đương Scalefusion, MobiStyle trên thị trường. Responsible for the overall system architecture of the MDM (Mobile Device Management) platform. This role involves leading the engineering team to drive product development, making strategic technical decisions, and ensuring the product achieves market-leading quality comparable to industry benchmarks like Scalefusion and MobiStyle. TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH/ KEY RESPONSIBILITIES Thiết kế kiến trúc hệ thống MDM: backend API, mobile agent, admin console, push notification System Architecture Design: Define the architecture for the MDM ecosystem, including Backend APIs, Mobile Agents, Admin Consoles, and Push Notification services. Lựa chọn công nghệ stack phù hợp và xây dựng coding standards cho toàn bộ dự án Tech Stack & Standards: Select appropriate technology stacks and establish coding standards and best practices for the entire project Phân chia module, lập sprint plan và assign task cho Sub Lead và Senior Developers Decompose modules, facilitate Sprint Planning, and assign tasks to Sub-Leads and Senior Developers. Code review, đảm bảo chất lượng code, bảo mật và performance của hệ thống Conduct Code Reviews to ensure system integrity, security, and high performance. Thiết kế hệ thống MDM protocols: device enrollment, policy enforcement, remote commands MDM Protocol Design: Design and implement core MDM protocols, including Device Enrollment, Policy Enforcement, and Remote Commands Xây dựng CI/CD pipeline, quy trình deploy, monitoring và incident response Build CI/CD pipelines, deployment workflows, system monitoring, and incident response strategies. Nghiên cứu và tích hợp các tính năng MDM nâng cao: Kiosk mode, Geofencing, App Management Research and integrate advanced MDM features such as Kiosk Mode, Geofencing, and Mobile Application Management (MAM). Phối hợp với BA để chuyển đổi yêu cầu nghiệp vụ thành thiết kế kỹ thuật Collaborate with Business Analysts (BA) to translate business requirements into robust technical specifications Your Skills and Experience YÊU CẦU/ REQUIREMENTS Học vấn: Cử nhân CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc tương đương Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field. Kinh nghiệm: 5-8 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, 2+ năm ở vị trí lead. Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm MDM/EMM Experience: 5–8 years in software development, with 2+ years in a leadership role. Previous experience with MDM/EMM (Enterprise Mobility Management) is highly preferred. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật Technical Skills Backend: Golang, Java, Node.js/Python/Go, RESTful API, GraphQL, Microservices Mobile: Android (Kotlin/Java), iOS (Swift), Device Admin API, MDM protocols Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, IoT Core), Docker, Kubernetes Database: PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, Elasticsearch Security: OAuth 2.0, JWT, End-to-End Encryption (E2EE), certificate management Kỹ năng mềm Soft Skills Khả năng lãnh đạo kỹ thuật, mentoring và phát triển đội ngũ Tư duy kiến trúc hệ thống, ra quyết định kỹ thuật chiến lược Giao tiếp hiệu quả với cả team kỹ thuật và non-tech stakeholders Giao tiếp Tiếng Anh tốt - Proven technical leadership, mentoring, and team growth capabilities. - Strong architectural thinking and strategic decision-making. - Excellent communication skills with both technical teams and non-technical stakeholders. - Good in English communication KPI ĐO LƯỜNG HIỆU QUẢ/ KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs) KPI 1: Uptime hệ thống MDM ≥ 99.5% System Uptime ≥ 99.5%. KPI2: Thời gian response API trung bình < 200ms Average API Response Time < 200ms. KPI 3: Code coverage ≥ 80% cho các module core Code Coverage ≥ 80% for core modules KPI 4: Sprint velocity ổn định, hoàn thành ≥ 85% story points mỗi sprint Stable Sprint Velocity, completing ≥ 85% of committed Story Points per sprint KPI 5: Số lượng critical bugs trên production < 2/tháng Fewer than 2 critical production bugs per month CÔNG CỤ SỬ DỤNG/ TOOLSTACK Cursor Pro + GitHub Copilot — AI-assisted coding Claude Pro / Claude API — AI assistant cho kiến trúc và code review GitHub Team — Source control, PR review, CI/CD (GitHub Actions) Jira — Sprint planning, task management, backlog grooming AWS Console — Quản lý hạ tầng cloud Docker + Kubernetes — Container orchestration Postman — API design và testing Datadog + Sentry — Monitoring và error tracking SonarCloud — Code quality và security scanning Why You'll Love Working Here Lương/ Salary: Thỏa thuận từ 50.000.000 đồng/ Negotiable from VND 50,000,000 Đóng BHXH – BHYT – BHTN đầy đủ Lương tháng 13... Các quyền lợi khác sẽ được nêu rõ khi phỏng vấn Thời gian làm việc: từ thứ 2 đến thứ 7, 8h00 đến 17h00 Insurance: Full Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance coverage as per labor laws. Bonuses & Leave: 13th-month salary and 12 days of annual leave upon signing the official labor contract. Other Benefits: To be discussed in detail during the interview. Working Hours: Monday – Saturday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM.

Không rào cản ngôn ngữ (No English/Japanese Required) Tại Rakus, "Code" là ngôn ngữ duy nhất. Chúng tôi không yêu cầu kỹ năng tiếng Anh hay tiếng Nhật. Bạn chỉ cần tập trung vào chuyên môn kỹ thuật. Mọi rào cản ngôn ngữ đã có đội ngũ Comtor hỗ trợ. 2. 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm Chúng tôi trân trọng thời gian bạn dành cho gia đình. Ngoài kỳ nghỉ Tết Âm lịch, công ty chủ động thiết lập các kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt vào dịp Golden Week (tháng 4-5) và Năm mới Dương lịch (tháng 12-1). Mỗi dịp này bạn sẽ được nghỉ liên tục 9 ngày. Bạn có thể thoải mái du lịch hay về quê mà không cần dùng đến phép năm! Tổng số ngày nghỉ lễ trong năm lên đến hơn 30 ngày. 3. Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x Công nghệ AI (Github Copilot, v.v.) Chúng tôi phát triển sản phẩm SaaS ổn định được hơn 10.000 doanh nghiệp Nhật Bản tin dùng, nhưng quy trình làm việc luôn được cập nhật mới nhất. Cấp tài khoản GitHub Copilot bản quyền cho toàn bộ kỹ sư. Cấp tài khoản Devin, Claude Code cho những ai có nhu cầu. Bạn sẽ phát triển thành một "Hybrid Engineer" – vừa có nền tảng Backend vững chắc, vừa thành thạo các công cụ AI hiện đại. ** Rakus Việt Nam là công ty 100% vốn đầu tư từ RAKUS Co., Ltd. - công ty nổi tiếng hàng đầu tại Nhật Bản cung cấp các dịch vụ đám mây (SaaS), giúp các doanh nghiệp điều hành hoạt động của mình một cách nhanh chóng, tiện dụng nhất. **Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng 2 Java Senior/Principal Software Engineer: LÀM VIỆC OFFLINE FULLTIME TẠI VĂN PHÒNG HEADOFFICE QUẬN 12: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý chi phí và chi phí đi lại trong nội bộ Doanh nghiệp ; đang được sử dụng bởi hơn 20,000 Doanh nghiệp khách hàng tại Nhật Bản với hơn 1.7 triệu end-users. Nếu: ・Bạn đang là Java Developer và muốn thăng tiến đến vị trí cao hơn ・Bạn mong muốn phát triển Career path theo hướng Techlead/Solution Architect trong tương lai ・Bạn mong muốn môi trường làm việc lâu dài (ít nhất 3 năm trở lên) ・Bạn có năng lực tập trung và thích tìm hiểu sâu về 1 hệ thống. Hãy gia nhập đội ngũ phát triển series sản phẩm "Rakuraku" – SaaS chiếm thị phần số 1 tại Nhật Bản. Phát triển: Thiết kế, triển khai và kiểm thử các tính năng mới sử dụng Java (Spring, Springboot). Quy trình AI: Tận dụng các công cụ AI mới nhất để tăng tốc độ coding, refactoring và tự động hóa kiểm thử (test automation). Tư duy sản phẩm: Tập trung vào chất lượng code (Quality) và khả năng bảo trì dài hạn (Maintainability). Your Skills and Experience Yêu cầu cơ bản: Có ít nhất 5 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên về kiến thức và đam mê lập trình ứng dụng web với: - Ngôn ngữ: Java - JavaScript, jQuery. - PostgreSQL, MySQL ... - các Frameworks như Spring, Springboot hay Struts, Seasar2, Hibernate ... Có kinh nghiệm Automation test: Jmeter, JUnit, Selenium Có kinh nghiệm DevOps: Git, GitHub, Jenkins, Docker Có khả năng tạo/trình bày tài liệu kĩ thuật ở giai đoạn upstream một cách dễ hiểu. Có khả năng research để giải quyết các vấn đề về kĩ thuật. Ưu tiên: Sử dụng hiệu quả các công cụ AI như Github copilot, Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT, ... Tài chính gia đình bạn luôn được đảm bảo. Xét tăng lương: 2 lần/năm. Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, cấp trên sẽ hỗ trợ bạn thăng cấp để đạt mức lương cao hơn. Công ty đóng BHXH ở mức 100% lương gross. 100 % lương trong thời gian thử việc. 🛡️ Sức khỏe & Gia đình (Health & Family Care) Bảo hiểm đặc biệt: Chi phí y tế của bạn được chi trả phần lớn bởi gói bảo hiểm cao cấp do công ty đài thọ. Hỗ trợ người thân: Hỗ trợ thủ tục để vợ/chồng và con cái tham gia gói bảo hiểm nhóm của công ty (tự nguyện). Nghỉ phép siêu linh hoạt: 12 ngày phép năm có thể chia nhỏ để nghỉ theo "đơn vị 30 phút". job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Lương và chế độ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn. Môi trường làm việc cởi mở, năng động. Có cơ hội phát triển, thăng tiến. The Job Frontend (60% Focus) Tham gia phát triển và bảo trì hệ thống web sử dụng Vue 3 + TypeScript. Thiết kế và xây dựng các component UI phức tạp, có khả năng tái sử dụng cao dựa trên Vuetify. Thiết kế và tối ưu quản lý trạng thái (state management) với Pinia. Tối ưu hiệu năng Frontend và cải thiện trải nghiệm người dùng (UX). Đảm bảo chất lượng code qua việc thực hiện Clean Code và tham gia Review code. Backend (40% Focus) Phát triển và duy trì hệ thống Web-based sử dụng Java (Spring Boot). Xây dựng và tối ưu RESTful APIs để tích hợp mượt mà với Frontend. Làm việc với multi-threading / concurrency để xử lý các tác vụ hiệu năng cao. Tham gia phân tích yêu cầu và thiết kế kỹ thuật (technical design, database design). Xử lý bug, troubleshoot các vấn đề trên môi trường production. Tham gia cải tiến quy trình phát triển (CI/CD, coding convention). Your Skills and Experience Must-to-have Có ít nhất 4 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực phát triển phần mềm (Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm thực chiến cả FE và BE). Frontend: Thành thạo Vue 3 (Composition API) và TypeScript. Nắm vững HTML5, CSS3/SCSS và thư viện Vuetify. Hiểu rõ State management (Pinia) và Routing (vue-router). Backend: Thành thạo Java & Spring Boot (bắt buộc). Có kinh nghiệm với JPA/Hibernate, MyBatis và Spring Security. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với CSDL: PostgreSQL. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với multi-threading / concurrency. Hiểu rõ về OOP, Design Patterns và tối ưu hóa database (query, caching, indexing). Thành thạo Git, Docker. Am hiểu về RESTful API design (versioning, error handling). Có tư duy viết code sạch (Clean Code), dễ bảo trì và khả năng mở rộng hệ thống. Nice-to-have: Biết sử dụng các AI tools để tăng tốc độ phát triển, refactor code hoặc viết tài liệu/test. Có tinh thần ownership, chủ động trong công việc và kỹ năng làm việc nhóm tốt. Why You'll Love Working Here Môi trường làm việc cởi mở, năng động: Làm việc với những đồng nghiệp thân thiện, vui vẻ, hòa đồng luôn giúp đỡ nhau Tôn trọng ý kiến cá nhân, đề cao sự sáng tạo. Văn phòng làm việc rộng rãi, trang phục tự do. Có cơ hội phát triển, thăng tiến: Được đào tạo thêm nghiệp vụ, công nghệ mới và ngoại ngữ giao tiếp. Có nhiều hoạt động nâng cao chuyên môn (Seminar, Workshop,Techtalk...) Hỗ trợ thi chứng chỉ năng lực chuyên môn. Chế độ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn: Review lương: 2 lần/ năm; Thưởng: 2 lần/ năm; Thưởng doanh thu dự án theo quý. Thử việc 100% lương - Bảo hiểm full lương 12 ngày nghỉ phép, 3 ngày nghỉ hè và 4 ~ 5 ngày nghỉ có lương của riêng công ty/ năm. Tham gia hoạt động câu lạc bộ: Bóng bàn, bơi, bóng đá, đọc sách, E-sports (PES, AOE, CS, LOL)... Được tôn vinh nhân viên xuất sắc hàng tháng/ quý/ năm. Mỗi tháng sẽ có ít nhất một sự kiện dành cho nhân viên (Du lịch công ty, Sport Day, Family Day...). Được tham gia 6 lần teambuilding trong 1 năm (theo dự án và theo section). Chế độ thâm niên. Chế độ chăm sóc phụ nữ: nghỉ sau sinh cho nhân viên nữ có con dưới 1 tuổi: 1h/ngày.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job A strategic Solution Architect to lead the architecture and solution design for large-scale digital banking and financial transformation initiatives . The successful candidate will have extensive experience in designing, implementing, and modernizing banking systems , ensuring the architecture supports the evolving needs of financial institutions, along with the ability to lead solution discussion and communicate confidently with client stakeholders to deliver scalable, secure and high-quality system solutions. In today’s engineering ecosystem, AI assistants are integral to the Software Development Lifecycle. Engineering, including this role, are expected to leverage AI tools for design analysis, code generation, test creation, and refactoring guidance , while focusing their expertise on architecture, system thinking, solution validation, security, quality assurance, and strategic technical decisions. Key Responsibilities Solution Architecture & System Design Design and implement end-to-end solution architectures for banking transformation and modernization initiatives. Evaluate existing banking systems, identify limitations, propose scalable, sustainable and secure architectural solutions. Create high-level and detailed architecture blueprints , covering application architecture, integration, data flows, and infrastructure considerations. Ensure architectural integrity and consistency across the entire banking ecosystem Identify, communicate, and mitigate Risks, Assumptions, Issues, and Decisions (RAID) throughout the project lifecycle. Leverage AI-assisted tools to analyze architecture options, improve design documentation, and support engineering productivity. Technical Leadership Provide technical leadership in defining best practices and frameworks for banking transformation. Guide teams in translating architectural designs into practical implementation strategies , ensuring consistent implementation of architecture standards. Support teams in solving complex technical challenges , particularly in distributed systems, integration, and large-scale financial platforms. Banking & Financial Platform Architecture Design systems and integration approaches supporting core banking capabilities, financial transactions, payment processing, and digital banking services . Ensure architectures comply with financial industry standards, regulatory requirements, and security frameworks . Collaborate with domain experts to translate banking business capabilities into technical architecture solutions . Client Collaboration & Delivery Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, and subject matter experts to define solution blueprints. Lead architecture discussions, design workshops, and solution alignment sessions with client teams. Communicate architecture decisions, trade-offs, risks, and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Support delivery teams to ensure solutions are implemented according to the intended architecture and quality standards. Your Skills and Experience Technical Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field. 10+ years of experience in software engineering or platform development . 4+ years of experience in a Solution Architect, or similar architecture leadership roles . Proficiency in developing and deploying applications in a microservices architecture and event driven architectures, especially strong in Java (Java, OOP, Kafka, Spring boot, etc.), with a focus on scalability, reliability, and performance optimization. Expertise in enterprise architecture, software design patterns, and API-driven architectures . Hands-on experience with integration frameworks and legacy modernization approaches in banking. Experience working with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) . Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and modern engineering workflows . Excellent problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and strong interpersonal skills . Strong ability to work in a fast-paced, high-impact environment and lead technical discussions. Specific Qualifications Experience working in banking, fintech, or financial services technology environments . Strong understanding of core banking, card, payment systems, or related financial systems . Knowledge of financial industry security standards and regulatory frameworks (e.g., PCI-DSS). Hands‑on exposure to AI‑assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, or similar). Ability to write effective prompts and context for AI generation across design, coding, testing, and documentation workflows . Ability to evaluate AI-generated solutions, architecture suggestions, and generated code for correctness, security, and scalability . Nice-to-Have Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) . Experience with enterprise architecture frameworks (e.g., TOGAF or similar). Experience supporting banking digital transformation or core system modernization initiatives . Why You'll Love Working Here Our client is a prominent European-based technology consultancy with over 30 years of global expertise in digital transformation. They specialize in engineering next-generation core systems and high-scale data solutions for industry leaders within the Financial Services, Insurance, and Manufacturing sectors. Operating a robust network across more than 20 countries, the firm is at the forefront of integrating advanced automation and modern engineering workflows into the software development lifecycle. With a strong commitment to technical excellence and a distributed global delivery model, they offer senior experts the chance to lead complex modernization initiatives. This is an ideal environment for those looking to influence the future of digital banking and large-scale enterprise architecture. Why You'll Love Working With Us Global Innovation Hub: Be part of a prestigious European technology firm with a 30-year legacy, working on large-scale digital transformation projects for top-tier global financial institutions. Cutting-Edge Tech Stack: Engage with an AI-centric environment where you are encouraged to leverage advanced AI-assisted development tools (like GitHub Copilot and Claude Code) to redefine engineering productivity. Expert Collaboration: Work alongside some of the industry's brightest minds in an international setting that fosters professional growth and cultural exchange. Continuous Upskilling: Access specialized training programs, including professional English courses and advanced certifications in Cloud, Architecture, and emerging technologies like Smart Contracts. Competitive & Transparent Rewards: Enjoy a robust compensation package featuring a guaranteed 13th-month salary, performance-based bonuses, and premium health insurance for your peace of mind. Work-Life Balance: Benefit from a flexible Hybrid working model and extensive annual leave, allowing you to balance professional excellence with personal well-being. High-Impact Projects: Direct your expertise toward modernizing next-generation core systems that power the daily lives of millions in the banking and fintech sectors.

job_title: Senior Application/ Support Engineer Java, AWS
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Global impact with diverse teams and projects Work-life balance with flexibility Empowering tools and competitive benefits The Job You will use your skills in incident management processes and tools, application monitoring metrics and tooling to generate reports and take corrective actions. You will understand complex application systems and find your way through them to debug a business impacting issue. You will follow standards and best practices to bring operational efficiencies, stability and availability of the system. You will use continuous delivery practices to evolve, support and deliver high-quality software, as well as value to end customers, as early as possible while working in a collaborative, value-driven teams to build innovative customer experiences for our clients. You will leverage your knowledge regarding the different logging techniques (various levels) and use them for alerting, monitoring and identifying the root cause of incidents. You will efficiently use DevOps tools and practices to deploy and run software. You will act as a mentor for less experienced peers through both your technical knowledge and leadership skills. You will apply the latest technology thinking from our to solve client problems. Your Skills and Experience Technical Skills Modern Application Development: You are proficient in object-oriented programming, with strong experience in Java/Spring Boot or Kotlin and related Java ecosystem frameworks. Additionally, you are familiar with popular authentication protocols like Oauth2, OpenID Connect, or Azure SSO. Database Management: You have experience working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL/MySQL . Cloud Platforms: You have an understanding of AWS services (including EC2, ECS, CloudWatch, RDS, and S3, etc) as multiple core systems are hosted on AWS. CI/CD & Scripting: Proven experience utilizing scripting languages like Shell script or Python to automate manual deployment and build processes. Familiarity with Jenkins or comparable Continuous Integration (CI) tools is also required. Debugging & Architecture: You must possess strong debugging and triaging skills to troubleshoot code in both monolithic and N-tier desktop/service architectures. Observability Tools: You have familiarity with monitoring tools such as Newrelic/Sumologic or AWS CloudWatch (at least one of them) to manage logs and alerts. Proficiency with AWS CloudFormation or Terraform. An AWS certification is highly desirable (Nice to have). Demonstrated ability to enhance productivity by utilizing AI-powered coding assistance tools (Nice to have). Professional Skills You are willing to be part of a rotation- and need-based 24x7 available team with L3 support . You enjoy influencing others and always advocate for technical excellence while being open to change, when needed. You have good communication and articulation skills. You have a presence in the external tech community and willingly share your expertise with others via speaking engagements, contributions to open source, blogs and more. You are resilient in ambiguous situations and can approach challenges from multiple perspectives. You advocate for and implement cloud best practices in the areas of resource optimization, monitoring and alerting. You advocate for security best practices and implementation of the same. You can guide and mentor junior-level consultants. Other things to know Learning & Development There is no one-size-fits-all career path at Thoughtworks: however you want to develop your career is entirely up to you. But we also balance autonomy with the strength of our cultivation culture. This means your career is supported by interactive tools, numerous development programs and teammates who want to help you grow. We see value in helping each other be our best and that extends to empowering our employees in their career journeys. Why You'll Love Working Here At Thoughtworks, we believe technology can be a powerful force for good. That's why our purpose is to create an extraordinary impact on the world through our culture and technology excellence. This isn't just a slogan, it's the core principle guiding every decision we make. We achieve this through a relentless pursuit of excellence and a culture built around these five core values: Be an awesome partner for clients and their ambitious missions: We believe in building strong, collaborative relationships with our clients, helping them achieve their most ambitious goals. Revolutionize the technology industry: We're constantly pushing boundaries and innovating, aiming to make a lasting impact on the entire tech landscape. Amplify positive social change and advocate for an equitable tech future: Technology should be a force for good. We actively promote positive social change and fight for an inclusive and equitable tech industry. Foster a vibrant community of diverse and passionate technologists: Our diverse and passionate teams are our greatest asset. We foster a collaborative and inclusive environment where everyone feels valued and empowered to thrive. Achieve enduring commercial success and sustained growth: A healthy and sustainable business allows us to continuously invest in our people, technology and social impact initiatives. This commitment to our purpose is matched by a commitment to our people. As Thoughtworkers, you'll be empowered to focus on what you do best – creating positive change through technology – because we offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support your well-being and career development. Here's how we support our team: Health & wellness: Health insurance for employees and their immediate family, mental health support and annual check-ups. Work-life balance: Flexible work arrangements on a hybrid work model, maternity/paternity leave, sabbatical leave. Financial security: Competitive salaries, referral bonuses, and laptop buyback programs. Professional growth: Training allowances and personal development budgets. Technology & equipment: Top-tier MacBooks and allowances for work-from-home setups. Connectivity : Monthly communications allowance to stay connected at home and on the go. Fun & camaraderie: We organize engaging social activities like running clubs, nature outings, annual events and monthly Town Halls to foster connections and a positive work environment. Ready to break free from the ordinary and achieve the extraordinary? Explore our open roles!

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Highly competitive salary and benefits package Excellent environment and team to help you grow. We are Singapore's leading car portal The Job We are looking for a Junior Android Developer to join our growing Motorist Vietnam team. You will help design, optimize, and enhance the Motorist mobile application — one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms — using the latest Android technologies to deliver the best experience for drivers across Southeast Asia. 1. Education ● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field. ● Final-year students or fresh graduates with strong Android project portfolios are also welcome to apply. 2. Responsibilities ● Design, build, and maintain advanced features for the Motorist app using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. ● Implement modern architectures using MVVM, Hilt/Dagger (Dependency Injection), and Coroutines. ● Work with frameworks and libraries such as Retrofit2 + OkHttp3, Realm, RxJava, and Firebase Crashlytics / Analytics. ● Collaborate closely with backend developers, designers, and QA testers to ensure smooth, high-performance user experiences. ● Debug, refactor, and continuously optimize the Motorist app for reliability and scalability. ● Conduct research and apply emerging Android technologies to improve performance and user satisfaction. ● Participate in sprint planning, code reviews, and team knowledge sharing sessions. Your Skills and Experience Technical Experiences Must Have ● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field. ● Understanding of Java/Kotlin, Android Studio, and Android SDK fundamentals. ● Familiar with SOLID principles, OOP, data structures, and clean architecture (MVVM). ● Experience working with databases such as SQLite, Room, and Realm. ● Understanding of RESTful API integration and JSON data handling. ● Proficient understanding of code version control tools, such as Git. ● Strong attention to detail and analytical problem-solving mindset. Nice to Have ● Exposure to Jetpack Compose, Retrofit2 / OkHttp3, RxJava, or Google Maps SDK. ● Basic understanding of Firebase Messaging, Crashlytics, or Remote Config. ● Familiarity with Material 3 Design, Coroutines Flow, or JUnit / Espresso testing. ● Appreciation for clean, maintainable, and well-structured code. ● Collaborative mindset and a reliable team player who takes ownership of their work. Language Skills ● Able to communicate and collaborate in English (written and spoken). ● Willing to learn and improve communication when working with Singapore HQ and other markets. Flexible Points We welcome engineers who: ● Are passionate about Android development and eager to grow in a professional environment. ● May not have long working experience but can demonstrate strong fundamentals and self-learning ability. ● Want to master Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Coroutines, and Clean Architecture. ● Are not yet fluent in English but are motivated to practice and improve daily. ● Enjoy solving problems and building high-quality apps that users love. Notice Candidates are required to provide reference information after passing the interview round. At Motorist , we believe in work hard, play hard. You’ll be part of an energetic and collaborative team that encourages creativity, learning, and ownership. Join us to grow your career and help build one of Singapore’s leading automotive platforms. job_title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer Java, ReactJS, JavaScript
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Personal Development Opportunities Attractive Salary & Seniority Bonus (3/5/7 years) Premium Private Health Care(employee & dependents) The Job About the Role: We are seeking a highly proactive Senior Full-Stack Engineer (5+ years of experience) with a strong frontend focus to join our team. You will be instrumental in building scalable user interfaces using React, powered by a purely Headless Magnolia CMS backend. We operate in a fast-paced, modern environment and are actively embracing AI-assisted development. We are looking for a self-starter —someone who doesn't wait to be told what to do, actively identifies and solves blockers independently, and communicates effectively across the team. Key Responsibilities Frontend: Drive the development of robust, high-performance UIs using React, seamlessly consuming REST APIs from our Headless Magnolia setup. Backend Integration & Support: While the immediate focus is on the frontend, you will work with Java to configure Magnolia, expose RESTful services, and maintain backend stability. Autonomous Execution: Take ownership of your deliverables. Proactively identify blockers, propose solutions, and independently drive tasks forward while maintaining tight, continuous alignment with our PM, Architects, and Leads to shape epics and clear dependencies. Agent-Assisted E2E Delivery: Go beyond basic code completion. We expect you to actively leverage agentic AI workflows (using tools like Gemini, Claude) across the entire product lifecycle. From shaping epics and brainstorming architecture with the PM, to automating complex development tasks, testing, and streamlining our go-to-market deployment—you will use AI to reduce cognitive load, stay unblocked, and boost your efficiency. Collaborate & Communicate: Maintain clear communication in English regarding project status, technical hurdles, and architectural decisions, which is critical for our team's success. Your Skills and Experience 5+ Years of Experience: Proven track record as a Senior Full-Stack Engineer or a Frontend Engineer with solid backend capabilities. React Expertise: Deep knowledge of React and the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem. Java: Solid proficiency in Java. Autonomy: A demonstrable history of taking initiative, self-managing, and driving projects forward independently in a remote environment. Language Skills: Excellent command of written and spoken English is a must have. Forward-Thinking: A strong curiosity and willingness to adopt AI tools to accelerate your development speed. Why You'll Love Working Here Personal Development Opportunities: We believe in nurturing individual growth and happiness. As part of our commitment, we provide a range of indoor and outdoor training activities, including technical courses, English classes, and soft skills training. Comprehensive Health Coverage: Your well-being and that of your family are paramount to us. We cover 100% of healthcare premiums for all employees and their dependents, ensuring you can access quality medical care without financial worries. Employee and Family Care: At Magnolia, we extend our care beyond the workplace. From health insurance to organizing summer vacations and family events like Family Day, Children's Day, and the Mid-Autumn Festival, we prioritize the well-being and happiness of our employees and their families. Additionally, enjoy recreational activities such as football, swimming, bowling, cinema, and more. Competitive Salary and Benefits: Your hard work deserves recognition. Our compensation package includes: An attractive salary, a 13th-month salary, seniority bonuses, and opportunities for career advancement. Annual leave of up to 21 days; Opportunity for the exchange programs to Switzerland. Flexible Working Hours: We understand the importance of work-life balance. Enjoy flexibility in your schedule. Employee Perks: Your comfort and satisfaction matter to us. Our office is stocked with beverages, fruits, and snacks, and we provide meals every evening. Join us on "Whoopee Fridays" for team-building activities, knowledge exchange sessions, and lively conversations.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Very attractive salary package and Bonus Technical trainings and certifications Global career opportunity The Job Job Purpose: As a DevOps Manager, you will oversee and enhance our IT infrastructure's robustness, scalability, and security. Your role involves strategic planning, team leadership, and ensuring that our technology framework aligns with the organization’s objectives. You will be responsible for managing the infrastructure team in different locations, driving innovative projects, and fostering a culture of continuous improvement. Responsibilities: Strategic Infrastructure Planning • Develop and implement strategies to enhance IT infrastructure. • Align infrastructure initiatives with the organization’s strategic goals. • Oversee infrastructure architecture to ensure scalability and efficiency. Team Leadership and Development • Lead, mentor, and develop the infrastructure team. • Set clear goals and expectations for team members and provide regular performance evaluations. • Foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and continuous improvement. Project and Task Management • Oversee all infrastructure projects from conception to completion. • Ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget. • Coordinate cross-functional teams and stakeholders to achieve project objectives. Platform Engineering • Oversee the design, development, and maintenance of scalable and secure platforms. • Ensure high availability and optimal performance of all platform services. • Drive the adoption of best practices in platform engineering. DevOps and Automation • Champion DevOps principles to increase the ability to deliver applications and services at high velocity, enhance reliability, and streamline workflows. • Architect and implement CI/CD pipelines for efficient deployment processes. • Identify and lead automation initiatives to enhance system reliability and performance. IT Operations Management: • Oversee day-to-day IT operations to ensure stability and efficiency. • Manage incident and problem resolution processes to maintain high uptime and availability of all systems to maintain business continuity. • Ensure compliance with IT policies and procedures. • Manage the server room, ensuring the health and maintenance of network devices and servers. • Oversee all hardware, software, licenses, subscriptions, and related assets. Security and Compliance • Ensure the security of IT infrastructure and compliance with relevant regulations. • Maintain and enhance ISO27001 certification through robust security policies. • Conduct regular audits and risk assessments to identify and mitigate security risks. Vendor and Stakeholder Management • Manage relationships with technology vendors and service providers. • Negotiate contracts and ensure third-party solutions meet organizational needs. • Collaborate with senior management and other stakeholders to align IT initiatives with business goals. • Manage relationships with technology vendors and service providers. • Collaborate with the Purchasing team to negotiate contracts, costs, service levels; and ensure third-party solutions meet organizational needs. • Work with senior management and other stakeholders to align IT initiatives with business goals. Budget Management: • Prepare and manage the budget for IT infrastructure expenditures. • Ensure optimal use of resources and cost-effective solutions. • Capable of estimating infrastructure costs to support accurate project budgeting. Innovation and Continuous Improvement: • Stay abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends. • Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance IT infrastructure performance. • Encourage and implement innovative solutions to business challenges. and other responsibilities as assigned. Your Skills and Experience Qualifications: • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field. • Minimum of 7-10 years’ experience in IT infrastructure management, with a proven track record in leading teams and managing large-scale projects. • Strong knowledge of DevOps principles, CI/CD methodologies, and automation tools (e.g., Gitlab, Ansible, Terraform, Kubernetes). • Extensive experience with cloud technologies and services (AWS, M365, SaaS). • Practical experience with ITIL management principles or equivalent processes / frameworks. • In-depth knowledge of Information Security Management System (ISMS) and ISO27001 standards. • Experience with hybrid cloud environments and multi-cloud strategies. • Proficiency in disaster recovery planning and business continuity management. • Demonstrated ability to lead and manage projects involving cross-functional teams. • Excellent problem-solving skills, with a strategic mindset and attention to detail. • Strong communication and leadership skills, capable of motivating teams and driving change. • Fluent in English, both oral and written form. As an Associate Software Architect , you’ll play an important role in shaping the solutions behind Hansen’s utility billing and customer platforms. This is an early‑career architecture role designed for technologists who want to grow their solution design and systems thinking capability while working on real, large‑scale enterprise systems. Working alongside experienced Solution Architects and senior engineers, you’ll help translate business needs into clear, practical solution designs that support cost‑effective billing, reliable operations, and positive customer experiences—often in modern, cloud‑based environments. Your contributions will help ensure Hansen’s solutions are robust, scalable, secure, and ready to support critical services for utilities and communities around the world. *Note: This is 5-day office-based job in Thao Dien, D.2 What You’ll Do Support the design of software solutions under the guidance of Solution Architects and senior engineers. Assist with requirements discovery, clarification, and documentation (e.g. user stories, acceptance criteria, functional specs). Contribute to solution and integration designs, including process flows, APIs, data considerations, and interface definitions. Help analyse non‑functional requirements such as performance, security, reliability, and maintainability. Contribute to cloud‑based and platform modernisation initiatives, including API‑driven and containerised architectures. Collaborate closely with developers, QA, DevOps, and delivery teams throughout the project lifecycle. Your Skills and Experience What You Bring A degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). A foundational understanding of software development and integration principles (e.g. OOP, APIs, relational databases). Exposure to cloud‑based architectures (ideally AWS), including APIs and containerised workloads. Familiarity with at least one enterprise technology or language (e.g. Java, .NET, SQL/PLSQL). Awareness of non‑functional requirements and an interest in design trade‑offs and system quality. Strong communication skills, with the ability to document and explain technical concepts clearly. A collaborative mindset, curiosity, and a strong desire to learn and grow as a solution architect. Nice to Have Exposure to Agile or Scrum delivery environments. Familiarity with architecture or design standards (e.g. UML, C4, ArchiMate). Any experience in utilities, energy, billing, or customer platforms. Interest in using AI‑assisted tools (e.g. Copilot) to improve analysis, documentation, and delivery quality. Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive Market Rate Salary - full salary (including SI contribution) during the probation period and 13th-month salary Twice yearly salary review Full participation in the annual Hansen Profit Share Program Great Leave Options – including 12 days annual leave during Year 1, increasing to 15 days annual leave and 12 days paid sick leave per year). Premium healthcare for employee and dependents (spouse and {all} children and support for parents). Also, free comprehensive annual check-up for employees. High-speed Internet credit: VND 5,5million/year Wellness benefit: VND 2million annually for fitness package/devices Free lunch, snacks, and drink in our new modern offices, which have a cool open atmosphere with an outdoor cafe, bar, and recreation area in District 2 – including free scooter parking Continuous Learning and Development, including personalised Udemy Business – online learning platform. Reward and Recognition - Company sponsored trips and events, tenure milestones and global recognition program. New, modern developer laptop, 2 large monitors, and headset. An international work environment, highly skilled colleagues to learn from both locally and globally where you can develop your IT career and English skills.

Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng các công nghệ sau: Database: Oracle / PostgreSQL / MongoDB/ Đồng bộ DB: Data Guard / Golden Gate / CDC (Change data capture) OS: Linux, Windows Backend Service: Spring Boot 3.x (Java 17/21) Frontend: Spring MVC (Java) / Angular (Typescript) / NextJS (Javascript) BFF Gateway: Nginx / Spring Cloud Gateway Giao thức kết nổi: cần đáp ứng HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, SFTP, Messaging Chuẩn kết nối: Restful, gRPC, File, JMS (IBM MQ)/Kafka/AMQP Chuẩn message: JSON, Protobuf Message Broker: RabbitMQ / Kafka/ IBM MQ + Distributed Cache: Redis / Infinispan / HazelCast + Local Cache: Caffeine / Guava Authentication / Authorization (optional): Keycloak / Spring Authorization Server Central Configuration (optional): Vault / Spring Cloud Config Server Container platform: K8S / Openshift Observability: ELK, Prometheus, Grafana API Management: OpenAPI 3 DevSecOps Tool: Gitlab, Jenkins, Sonarqube, Nexus Artifact Repo, JIRA, Confluence. Container Tools: Docker Desktop / Minikube + Unit/Integration Test: JUnit Performance Test: K6, JMeter Why You'll Love Working Here Lương: 40.000.000 – 70.000.000đ Thời gian làm việc: thứ 2 đến thứ 6, 08h30 đến 17h30. Chế độ nghỉ mát, du xuân, liên hoan cuối năm cho nhân viên và gia đình. Các hoạt động giao lưu bóng đá, golf, văn nghệ... Chính sách đào tạo về chuyên môn, nghiệp vụ và kỹ năng cho nhân viên. Hỗ trợ 100% kinh phí học và thi các chứng chỉ chuyên môn.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are building a modern IoT and IP camera platform for the Vietnam and US markets. The mobile team works closely with the backend and device teams to deliver real-time features for smart camera systems, including live streaming, device management, notifications, and cloud-based services. Our applications communicate with backend services through REST/gRPC APIs and real-time technologies such as MQTT, WebSocket, and WebRTC. The team focuses on performance, scalability, and delivering a smooth user experience across Android and iOS platforms. You will collaborate with experienced engineers working on cloud-native systems, real-time communication, and smart device ecosystems. Your Skills and Experience Responsibilities * Develop and maintain mobile applications using Flutter (Android & iOS) * Collaborate with Backend and UI/UX teams to build high-quality products * Implement UI based on design tools (Figma, Adobe XD, etc.) * Optimize application performance and ensure smooth user experience * Integrate APIs (RESTful, WebSocket, etc.) * Maintain and enhance existing projects * Debug and fix issues during development * Write clean, maintainable, and scalable code following best practices Requirements * At least 1 year of experience with Flutter * Strong knowledge of Dart and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) * Experience with State Management (Provider, Riverpod, Bloc, etc.) * Experience working with RESTful APIs * Familiar with Git * Basic understanding of mobile UI/UX principles * Experience handling asynchronous programming (Future, Stream) * Ability to debug and optimize app performance Nice to Have * Experience with: * Firebase (Authentication, Firestore, Push Notifications) * MQTT, WebSocket, or real-time data handling * Bluetooth * Native development (Java/Kotlin/Swift) * AI Model for Mobile is a plus * Experience publishing apps on App Store or Google Play Why You'll Love Working Here Flexible working hours Hybrid working model Work on real-world products at scale. Dynamic, tech-driven environment with growth opportunities. Exposure to advanced technologies in camera, P2P streaming, and cloud-native systems. Friendly and collaborative team environment Opportunity to work on an innovative product with a significant impact in the Vietnam market Join us and be a part of a dynamic team that is setting new standards in the IP camera industry.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Tech savvy working environment Attractive benefits Training and developing opportunities The Job Job Description: We are looking for a talented DevOps Engineer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing our AWS EKS infrastructure, monitoring system backends, creating new microservices, and ensuring the security of our infrastructure. This role requires a high level of technical expertise and attention to detail. Responsibilities: Monitor system backend including CPU, RAM, and POD in AWS EKS. Manage AWS EKS's UAT and PRO, including upgrading EKS versions as required. Create new microservices, deploy, and update images to AWS EKS. Identify and fix vulnerabilities to ensure the security of our infrastructure. Manage infrastructure on AWS, including ALB, EC2, RDS, Network, and Security Group. 6. Work with Kubernetes (K8S) for automating deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications. Collaborate with the development team to improve system efficiency, enhance the user experience, and ensure system uptime. Implement automation tools and frameworks (CI/CD pipelines). Conduct systems tests for security, performance, and availability. Develop and maintain design and troubleshooting documentation. Your Skills and Experience Proven experience as a DevOps Engineer or similar software engineering role. Proficient with AWS services including EKS, ALB, EC2, RDS, VPC, and Security Group... Experience with system monitoring tools: Grafana, Promethues, Cloudwatch Knowledge of Kubernetes (K8S) and containerization technologies. Experience in managing and deploying microservices. Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Excellent understanding of security vulnerabilities and remediation techniques. Strong communication skills and the ability to work well in a team. Knowledge of coding languages and shell scripting; Python, Java, or Ruby is a plus. Education: A bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent experience Nice to Have: Experience working with Oracle Database and PostgreSQL for payment systems. Experience in load testing and performance optimization of transaction systems. Experience applying AI/automation tools to improve system monitoring and operations efficiency. Experience participating in WAY4 version upgrades and migration projects . Operate and maintain the WAY4 Core Card system and its satellite systems in production and UAT environments. Why You'll Love Working Here See yourselves in a new light In essence of joining our company, you will be given the scope to seize every opportunity and helped to acquire specific competencies you’ll need to succeed either you wish to go wide or go deep. Our company prides ourselves on our underpinned principle of nurturing people in not only HR policies but also in our culture. We value innovations and we need people to work on initiatives and carry on our business vision of operating excellence and market leadership. Alongside with these, we believe our staff members deserve a good working condition, so that in addition to social health insurance you will be accessible to health and accident insurance and will be eligible to join in team building every year. We also value your efforts; for this reason, we give you both financial and non-financial rewards such as: KPI bonus, Best Initiatives, Best performer or Best manager of the year, etc. Company's Benefits Financial support: Probation with full salary Lunch allowance Wedding support Family funeral support 13th month salary + KPIs bonus Performance rewards and awards Healthcare Insurance Events and activities: Christmas Year End party Team Building Family Day Sport Day

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job THÔNG TIN CHUNG/ GENERAL INFORMATION Tên vị trí / Position: Senior Developer Phòng ban/ Department: Kỹ thuật (Engineering) Báo cáo cho/ Report to: Tech Lead / Sub Lead Số lượng/ Headcount: 4 Cấp bậc/ Level: Senior MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC/ JOB PURPOSE Phát triển các tính năng backend, frontend và mobile cho sản phẩm MDM, đảm bảo code chất lượng cao, hiệu năng tốt và bảo mật. Fix bugs, optimize performance và xử lý technical debt Fix bugs, optimize performance, and resolve technical debt. Prior experience in mobile development is preferred. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật Technical Skills Backend: Golang, Java, Node.js/Python, RESTful API, SQL/NoSQL databases Frontend: React.js/Vue.js, TypeScript, responsive design Mobile: Android (Kotlin/Java) or iOS (Swift), React Native is a plus Cloud: AWS cơ bản (EC2, S3, Lambda), Firebase Cloud Messaging Tools: Git, Docker, CI/CD, Agile/Scrum methodology Kỹ năng mềm Soft Skills Tự chủ trong công việc, chủ động tìm giải pháp Tinh thần học hỏi, cập nhật công nghệ mới Làm việc nhóm tốt, sẵn sàng hỗ trợ đồng đội Kỹ năng giao tiếp Tiếng Anh Self-reliance: High level of autonomy and proactive problem-solving. company_name: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members 16++ days of paid leave per year The Job Are you a highly talented Senior OutSystems Developer looking for a challenging opportunity to join OutSystems Workflow platform team? We are seeking a candidate with a strong technical background in OutSystems, a good product mindset to join our global product team. As a Senior OutSystems Developer at Bosch, you are responsible for the development and maintenance of mobile and web-based applications assigned and ensure that the applications are in working well, supporting both internal and external stakeholders in any errors or bugs in the applications. Your main responsibilities · Design, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack applications using OutSystems, with integration of previous experience in .NET or Java. Lead the architecture, development, and optimization of both web and mobile applications, ensuring clean, efficient, and maintainable code across the stack. Develop and maintain complex business logic, custom UI components, and database layers, using relational and non-relational databases like SQL, NoSQL, MongoDB, and Elasticsearch. Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, Design, DevOps) to translate business requirements into technical solutions and ensure seamless integration across front-end, back-end, and databases. Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve application errors, ensuring high availability and performance for users. Participate in agile teams, contributing to backlog refinement, sprint planning, and continuous delivery pipelines, ensuring high-quality and timely releases. Define and optimize data models, ensuring data integrity, scalability, and performance across SQL and NoSQL databases. Implement REST and SOAP APIs, as well as other third-party integrations, to support the full functionality of applications. Provide guidance and mentorship to junior developers, promoting best practices in coding, testing, and application security. Stay updated on the latest technology trends in OutSystems, full-stack development, and database management, recommending new tools and methodologies to enhance the development process. Your Skills and Experience Must Have Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer/Software Engineering, Information Technology, or equivalent practical experience. Experience: 7+ years of experience in OutSystems development. OutSystems certs: Professional/Expert Web (Traditional/Reactive), Architecture; ODC certs. Solid back-end development skills: data modeling, advanced SQL (e.g., MSSQL or Oracle), and performance tuning. Workflow/process development experience (e.g., BPT, case/process management, asynchronous processing, timers/queues). Front-end development proficiency with UX/UI best practices; strong HTML/CSS/JS. Integrations: REST/SOAP, API design, auth, error handling, resiliency. OutSystems architecture best practices (layered, modular, dependencies); code quality/reviews. DevOps/release: LifeTime/environment management, deployments, versioning, basic CI/CD. Security: RBAC, SSO, secure integrations, data protection, OWASP. Troubleshooting/performance: caching, query tuning, aggregates, pagination, logging/monitoring. Strong communication, stakeholder collaboration, mentoring; Agile/Scrum. Proficient in written and spoken English. Nice to Have Platform tools: AI Mentor, Service Center, LifeTime Analytics/APM. Advanced architecture: DDD, lean, microservices/SOA. CI/CD beyond LifeTime: Azure DevOps/GitHub Actions/Jenkins/GitLab CI. Cloud (Azure/AWS/GCP) and integrations: Azure AD/Entra, API Management. Extensions via Integration Studio (C#/.NET or Java); building/exposing services. Event/messaging (Kafka, RabbitMQ); enterprise integration patterns. ODC experience: migration from OS11 (Reactive to ODC). Mobile: offline sync, native/Cordova plugins, push notifications, app store releases. Observability/reliability: centralized logging/monitoring (App Insights, ELK), alerting, incident response. Why You'll Love Working Here Private Health Insurance (Generali) : Covered by company Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract) 12 days annual leave

Identify, log, track, and retest defects using defect tracking tools. Collaborate with Business Analysts, Developers, Project Mangers, Product Owners and Test team. Provide effort estimations sprint wise for testing tasks in Jira. Experience in writing and executing test cases and test scenarios Experience working with test management and defect tracking tools such as (JIRA, Azure DevOps, or similar) Ability to create and manage test data for various testing scenarios. Basic SQL knowledge for manipulating test data and validate. Strong analytical and communication skills. Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments. Nice to Have : Experience in the Insurance domain (Policy Administration, Claims, Billing). Basic knowledge of Java to run and support automation test scripts. Experience in GW PC is nice to have. Exposure to Automation Testing tools (Selenium or similar). API Testing experience (Postman, REST). Understanding of Non-Functional Testing concepts such as performance, Recovery & security testing. Test scheduled jobs and batch process, including data preparation. Why You'll Love Working Here Life at Capgemini is dynamic and fun, a place where people love to work.
