We strive to make sure our employees achieve a healthy, happy work-life balance. 8.Count on us for career growth We’re always growing and so should you. We prioritize the personal development of our team members with our Capgemini Group University. 9.Your Love for Travel We have 300 offices in 40 countries around the world. You’ll have opportunities to travel or work in different locations. 10.Dig in your first day Whether you join us as a recent graduate or a seasoned professional, you’ll start to work directly on challenging projects from day one.

job_title: Senior Engineer - Security Platform SOC/Blue team
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Production systems operate at large scale. Problems are owned end to end. Changes enable systems behind core operations. The Job Chúng tôi đang xây dựng một SOC platform nội bộ thế hệ mới , tập trung vào: xử lý và truy vấn log ở quy mô lớn xây dựng detection & alerting pipeline tự động hóa Incident Response (SOAR) Vị trí này dành cho những kỹ sư muốn build security systems thực sự — từ ingestion → detection → response — thay vì chỉ vận hành SOC. Bạn sẽ làm việc ở giao điểm giữa distributed systems, security detection và automation , với định hướng ứng dụng AI để giảm noise và tăng tốc độ xử lý sự cố. 🧠 What You’ll Do Xây dựng và tối ưu hệ thống giám sát, phát hiện và cảnh báo bảo mật Thiết kế và phát triển pipeline xử lý log quy mô lớn (ingestion → detection → alerting) Phát triển detection logic và cải thiện chất lượng cảnh báo Xây dựng và tự động hóa quy trình Incident Response (SOAR) Tối ưu lưu trữ, truy vấn và hiệu năng xử lý dữ liệu bảo mật Nghiên cứu và tích hợp các giải pháp open-source trong SOC ecosystem Thiết kế kiến trúc và chiến lược thu thập log (Kubernetes, VMs, Cloud) 🚀 Key projects Xây dựng hệ thống SOC nội bộ theo hướng end-to-end (ingestion → detection → response) Ứng dụng AI/ML để cải thiện detection và giảm false positives Tối ưu hiệu năng và khả năng mở rộng của hệ thống xử lý log Your Skills and Experience 🌟Must-have Kinh nghiệm xây dựng hoặc vận hành các hệ thống liên quan đến logging, monitoring, security, SOC Kinh nghiệm làm việc với distributed systems hoặc high-throughput backend Thành thạo Golang và/hoặc Java trong môi trường production 🧩Nice to Have Kinh nghiệm với SIEM/SOAR /EDR hoặc SOC thực tế Hiểu và áp dụng MITRE ATT&CK trong detection Kinh nghiệm xử lý log lớn (ELK, ClickHouse, Kafka…) Có kinh nghiệm hoặc quan tâm đến ứng dụng AI/ML trong security Why You'll Love Working Here Inside our lean engineering team: We work on large and complex systems, with a focus on ownership and continuous learning. We work within existing constraints and improve systems incrementally. We value strong fundamentals and the ability to reason through unfamiliar or complex systems. Collaboration is direct, and discussions focus on solving problems and delivering results. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us A very clear, global mission A product already in use across in 190+ countries Hybrid work, 25 days holiday + 6 weeks remote! The Job Our mission is to become the global standard for addressing. Street addresses weren’t designed for 2026. They aren’t accurate enough to specify building entrances, and they don’t exist for parks, rural areas and many parts of the world. This makes it hard to find places and causes problems and inefficiencies on a global scale. That’s why we created what3words. We divided the world into 3m squares and gave each square a unique combination of three words. It’s the easiest way to find and share precise locations. Over the last year, what3words has been used in 193 countries, and our monthly active users continue to grow at an impressive pace. Our tech is used by emergency services, delivery companies, eCommerce businesses, ride-hailing apps and NGOs, and is integrated into the navigation systems of millions of cars around the world. The role: You’ll be joining our fast-growing tech team, focusing on mobile applications for iOS, Android mobile, and integrated in-car systems. You’ll be responsible for designing and implementing robust, scalable automation in Java using Appium to ensure our mobile users have a seamless, high-performance experience. Your rigorous attention to detail and excellent communication skills will be essential. If you are passionate about quality and have a proven competence in automating test cases for mobile applications, we’d like to hear from you. Responsibilities: Build and maintain mobile test suites in Appium and CI/CD pipelines for our core applications. Ensure consistent functionality and UI/UX integrity across various device types, OS versions, and screen resolutions. Conduct a mix of manual exploration and automated regression to find and report mobile-specific bugs, from memory leaks to broken gestures. Collaborate with Software Engineers and Product Managers to develop effective strategies and test plans for our Mobile Apps. Find and isolate bugs in backend services and determine their impact on the product or release. Help troubleshoot issues in production and staging environments. Conduct post-release/post-implementation testing including regression, performance, and integration testing for backend systems. Your Skills and Experience Essential Skills: Education: BSc/BA in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. Mobile Automation: Experience building robust mobile automation frameworks from scratch using open-source tools (e.g., Appium, Espresso, or XCUITest ), with a focus on cross-platform functional testing. Mobile CI/CD Integration: Experience integrating mobile automated test suites into build pipelines, specifically handling mobile-specific challenges like device clouds or emulator/simulator orchestration. Java Proficiency: Strong Java programming skills with expertise in JUnit or TestNG to drive mobile test scripts. DevOps Ecosystem: Experience with build and configuration tools such as GitHub Actions and CircleCI . Device & OS Savvy: A keen eye for mobile-specific nuances, including UI/UX consistency across different screen sizes, OS versions (Android/iOS), and hardware constraints. Soft Skills: Excellent communication in spoken and written English, paired with a high-quality "mobile-first" mindset and rigorous attention to detail. Extra credit if you: Have worked with Revenue cat or other services that handle in app subscriptions for Apple’s Appstore and Android’s Play store. Experience working with backend services. Experience with BDD and implementing Cucumber for automation. Have worked on native frameworks (XCUITest, Espresso or UIAutomator) Are able to understand the business context of what you’re doing – understand the value your work creates. The role is based in our Ho Chi Minh office (at ///become.outlooks.rising). While you can work from the office five days a week if preferred, our Engineering team can choose to work up to two days a week from home. We also offer a six-week remote-work allowance; for up to six weeks a year, you can work from anywhere in the world (as long as you’ve got great WiFi and are happy to work on the HQ timezone). Diversity & Inclusion Our mission is to help everyone talk about everywhere, and we believe diverse perspectives make for a better company and better products too. We strongly encourage applications from underrepresented groups and are committed to equality and inclusivity in our hiring processes and company culture. Why You'll Love Working Here Our team is a group of talented people from all over the world on an unprecedented journey. Every day brings new challenges and we are always learning. You will be proud to see your individual and team contributions making a real difference. 🙂 Benefits We offer the following benefits to all permanent employees of what3words: Competitive salary Flexible working 6 week remote working (work from anywhere) policy 25 days holiday: plus the option to buy more! Share options Private health insurance Wellbeing Days Generous parental leave policies Family friendly policies Employee Assistance Programme (EAP) Lunch & learn sessions Team social budget

Sioux has been recognized as an employer of choice, including awards such as Best ICT Company to Work For and Great Place to Work. In addition to our strong presence in Europe, Sioux is rapidly expanding in Asia, with offices in Vietnam, China, Singapore, and India. With a strong heritage and a diverse international team, Sioux is proud of our core values: Own it and make it happen, Grow and innovate together, and Surprise customers. If these values resonate with you, we would love to welcome you to our team. WE ARE LOOKING FOR A SENIOR AUTOMATION TESTER IN DANANG/HCM TO JOIN US! As Automation Tester, you ability to develop, implement and refine testing strategies ensures that quality and performance standards are consistently met. Thriving both independently and within a collaborative team, you navigate international and dynamic settings with ease. This role involves developing automation tests to ensure high-quality equipment control software across the semiconductor equipment control software stack. If you don’t have prior experience in this field but are excited to take on the challenge, don’t hesitate to join us - you will receive training in related domain knowledge . Your responsibilities include: Collaborating with customers/stakeholders to define test architecture Analyzing customer needs in software requirement engineering Analyzing, designing, implementing, testing to control software on unit, integration, and system level Executing manual testing (functional, regression, exploratory) when automation is not feasible Conducting peer reviews to ensure product quality Working as an integral part of a Scrum team and handling user stories dedicated to quality assurance Developing functionality using Agile practices, emphasizing speed and quality Maintaining clear test documentation (test plans, reports, automation guidelines) Your Skills and Experience QUALIFICATIONS Technical: Bachelor degree in Information Technology or Computer Science or related fields 4+ years of experience in creating and running automated tests Solid testing experiences (test strategy, test approach, test plan, test techniques included black box, risk-based, exploratory, Non-UI testing, etc.) specifically for embedded systems and complex software development life cycles Proficiency in C#/Java programming for automated test development Hands-on experience with test automation frameworks (NUnit, Cucumber) At least 2 years of experience in test automation for desktop applications (Windows, WPF/WinForms) is required for the senior level. Proven experience integrating automated tests into CI/CD pipelines (GitLab preferred) and working in an Agile/Kanban development process Working knowledge of Git workflows and version control Understanding of software testing principles (test design, regression, integration, performance) Soft skills: Ability to self-learn and quickly adapt to new technologies Good command of both English speaking and writing skills in order to fluently communicate with international colleagues and customers Good sense of teamwork, high responsibility & commitment Strong logical thinking, proactive and open-minded Passionate and eager to develop skills through projects in equipment, semiconductors, and related fields Nice to have: ISTQB certificate and SQL skill Familiarity with desktop UI automation tools such as FlaUI is a plus A background in the semiconductor, or analytical domain Experience with test automation scripting in Python (e.g., data validation, CI/CD tooling, API tests) days per year, for every 3 work years, +1 day to annual leave Well-being Sioux Care Package: Each employee is eligible for an assigned package (based on grade and length of service) up to VND 30,000,000/employee/year for well-being benefits, including Premium insurance for employee and family, Annual Health Check, Personal Development, Children’s Education, Support subscription & WFH job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Advance your career in the gaming industry Take ownership and grow with global talents Build games played by millions worldwide The Job Design, deploy, and automate infrastructure (on-prem and cloud: AWS/GCP/VNG Cloud) with a focus on availability, scalability, cost efficiency, and security. Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) to streamline deployment workflows and accelerate software delivery. Manage and optimize Kubernetes and Docker environments for mission-critical services. Implement monitoring, logging, tracing, and alerting solutions to deliver observability, reliability, and SLA/SLO compliance. Apply cloud security and compliance best practices aligned with industry standards (e.g., ISO27001, SOX404, ITGC). Continuously improve DevOps workflows, scalability, and reliability, automation, and development productivity. Strong coding skills (Python, Go, or Java) and scripting expertise (Bash, Python) for automation and tooling. Hands-on experience with AWS/GCP proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible). Solid understanding of TCP/IP, DNS, load balancing, firewalls, databases Solid experience with Linux system administration and troubleshooting. Strong expertise in Docker and Kubernetes, including deploying, scaling, monitoring, and troubleshooting large-scale production environments. Hands-on experience implementing reliable CI/CD pipelines, automation, and deployment strategies with Jenkins, GitLab CI, Argo CD, or similar platforms. Knowledge of security best practices and the ability to implement security controls at the infrastructure level Strong problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills, with the ability to mentor and guide junior engineers Nice to Have: Hands-on experience with multi-cloud or hybrid-cloud infrastructure. DevSecOps practices: integrating security into CI/CD pipelines (SAST, DAST, dependency scanning, secrets management, container security, compliance tools). job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary. Healthcare insurance package. 13th month and productivity bonus. The Job An Internal Developer Platform (IDP) Testing Engineer is responsible for ensuring the quality, reliability, and security of the internal tools and workflows that make up an IDP. This role involves designing and executing test plans, identifying and documenting bugs, and verifying that the IDP provides a seamless, self-service experience for development teams by automating common tasks and abstracting away infrastructure complexity. Collaborate with software developers and quality assurance teams to understand project requirements and functionality Design, develop, and execute automated test scripts using industry-standard automation tools Identify and report software defects in a clear and concise manner Work closely with cross-functional teams to analyze test results and troubleshoot issues Contribute to the continuous improvement of the automation testing process Your Skills and Experience You properly are a potential candidate for this position, if you have: Bachelor degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field 3+ years of experience or more in relevant positions Proficient in at least one programming language (e.g., Java, Python,…) Familiarity with automation testing tools such as Selenium, Robot Framework, or similar Basic knowledge of version control systems (e.g., Git) Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills Strong understanding of software development life cycle and testing methodologies English proficiency at B1+ CEFR level or above (or equivalent) is required. You will be a strong candidate if you have some of these Experience in working with Azure DevOps or CI/CD pipelines. Familiarity with containerization and orchestration technologies, such as Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform or similar platforms. Knowledge of API testing and tools (e.g., Postman, RestAssured) Why You'll Love Working Here Why You‘ll Love Working Here Competitive Income: Attractive salary, 13th-month bonus, year-end performance bonus Comprehensive Healthcare: PVI insurance, full social insurance, 24/7 accident insurance, annual health check-ups Training & Development: English courses, LinkedIn Learning, MiTek University, overseas training opportunities Leave Policy: 12 annual leave days, Christmas holiday Recognition of Achievements & Contributions: Employee of the Month/Year, Platinum Star Award, VIP trip for employees with 3 years of service Modern Facilities: Designed to support learning, working, and development Benefits: Free diverse lunch options, team-building activities, sports clubs (Badminton, Football, Swimming, Modern Dance, Yoga, Esports, Gym)

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến The Job 2025TD943 - (Middle, Senior) FullStack Developer - Phát triển, trực tiếp lập trình các hệ thống, ứng dụng của Ngân hàng, gồm các hệ thống nội bộ và ứng dụng dành cho khách hàng với quy mô 30 triệu khách hàng cá nhân và 300.000 khách hàng doanh nghiệp. - Phát triển hoặc phối hợp triển khai cùng các nhà cung cấp cho các giải pháp Công nghệ. - Quản lý, phát triển dịch vụ tích hợp với các hệ thống core như: T24, WAY4, BPM, CRM, CIC v.v - Quản lý, phát triển API trên API Gateway phục vụ tích hợp với các đối tác trong nước và quốc tế. - Nghiên cứu, thử nghiệm, triển khai áp dụng các xu hướng công nghệ mới vào việc phát triển: GraphQL, Docker Container (K8s), CICD, EventSourcing, CQRS, NoSQL ... - Tham gia phân tích nghiệp vụ, đề xuất giải pháp, phương án triển khai nhằm cải tiến, nâng cao hiệu quả của các dự án trong quá trình làm việc. - Lên timeline công việc, quản lý tasks cho các thành viên trong nhóm, giám sát và hỗ trợ các thành viên hoàn thành đúng cam kết. - Dẫn dắt nhóm 3-6 thành viên, đồng hành cùng các thành viên phát triển chuyên môn và hoàn thành công việc Your Skills and Experience - Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin và liên quan - Có kinh nghiệm làm việc thực tế tại các công ty hoặc dự án về lập trình Backend - Thành thạo 1 trong các ngôn ngữ BackEnd, ưu tiên Java hoặc Go - Thành thạo một trong trong các loại database: Oracle, Sqlserver, PostgreSQL, Mongodb. - Có kinh nghiệm trong domain tài chính, ngân hàng, chứng khoán hoặc các hệ thống có số lượng người dùng lớn là lợi thế - Với ứng viên Junior, Fresher: Ưu tiên các bạn xếp loại học tập loại Giỏi, Xuất sắc; GPA cao; đạt giải thưởng trong các cuộc thi chuyên môn, học sinh giỏi tỉnh, thành phố trở lên; có nghiên cứu khoa học được công bố tại các hội thảo, tạp chí quốc tế (ứng viên cần thể hiện nội dung về GPA, giải thưởng trong CV) MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau: - Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính - Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ - Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp - Kinh nghiệm làm việc - Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật - Nguồn Tuyển dụng Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng. - Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất. - Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn. Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage: - Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers - Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers - Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers Why You'll Love Working Here Trải nghiệm Thu nhập hấp dẫn với gói đãi ngộ toàn diện: Thưởng thành tích tháng 13; Thưởng thành tích theo kết quả công việc 06 tháng, 1 năm ; Thưởng các dịp lễ tết trong năm ; Thưởng theo danh hiệu cá nhân và tập thể… Du lịch nghỉ dưỡng hàng năm Khám sức khỏe định kì Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân (MIC) Quà tặng và ngày nghỉ sinh nhật hưởng nguyên lương Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân: Được thử sức với các nền tảng công nghệ mới, tham gia vào những dự án chuyển đổi lớn của ngân hàng Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng Được trải nghiệm các phương pháp học tập mới và phát triển năng lực theo lộ trình công danh. Hưởng các chính sách hỗ trợ, khuyến khích học tập, nâng cao trình độ và phát triển bản thân (chứng chỉ nghề quốc tế...) Môi trường làm việc lý tưởng với: Những người cộng sự thân thiện và tài năng Cơ sở vật chất, không gian làm việc xanh và hiện đại.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Healthcare plan for you and your family A work-life balance (Hybrid, Workation) Competitive package The Job We are seeking a highly motivated and enthusiastic Experienced QA Engineer to join our QE team. This role provides the opportunity to apply advanced software testing methodologies, tools, and best practices to enhance quality standards and continuously improve testing processes within a professional engineering environment. You will work closely with experienced QA Engineers and Development teams to ensure the quality and reliability of our products. Your day-to-day: Execute and participate in all testing activities including manual and automation tests to improve product quality, work closely with the team to deliver product success. Automate functional, regression, and/or performance testing to speed up product delivery cycle. Have complete responsibility to enhance end-to-end automated test coverage. Participate in the review of project requirements to understand test objectives, to provide input on the testability of requirements and estimation for the testing activities. Prepare detailed test reports and provide data-driven Sign-Off decisions. Your Skills and Experience Your qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field. 4-6 years of experience in software quality assurance and testing. Experience with manual testing to make sure that the product functionalities comply with business requirements is a MUST. Experience in building or maintaining automation testing frameworks for Web and API automation frameworks (e.g., Puppeteer, Playwright, Selenium). Strong experience of at least one modern programming language such as JavaScript, Java, Python,... with a strong base in object-oriented design and development. Strong English communication skills, both written and spoken. It's a big plus if you: ISTQB or other relevant testing certifications. Experience of using AI tools (GitHub Copilot, OpenAI api, etc.) or AI-based testing platforms to optimize the QA workflow. Proficiency in Korean (TOPIK certification) . Why You'll Love Working Here From solid welfare programs to autonomy over working time and place, we create the culture in which we work. By joining NAVER VIETNAM, you will be involved in: A work-life balance : Hybrid working model with modern city-center offices, 14 days of annual leave (increasing yearly) and an additional day off for your birthday. Competitive income package : Comprehensive package with full salary insurance, 13th-month salary, annual performance appraisals, and incentive bonuses. AI-powered development tools: Company-sponsored access to Claude Code Enterprise , empowering developers with advanced AI support to enhance productivity and accelerate development workflows. Learning and development opportunities : Monthly book allowance and an annual budget for online/offline courses (Udemy, Coursera, etc.) in tech, languages, and soft skills,... Protecting and enhancing healthcare plan for you and your family : Premium insurance for employees and 2 family members, plus annual health check-ups. Employee's engagement activities : Respectful, engaging culture with monthly team budgets, social clubs, and celebration gifts. Working environment: Driven by "Autonomy – Challenge – Teamwork" values, with talented colleagues, supportive leaders, and modern devices supported such as Macbook Pro 14, Macbook Air M4, Dell 7450 Ultra 7,... Dedication bonus: Recognizing your commitment and contributions with special bonuses and benefits at key work milestones. Other benefits : Home office setup allowance, happy hours, attractive referral bonus, and more!

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job About Us AdvaHealth Solutions is a leading innovator in the medical imaging informatics sector, dedicated to transforming radiology image management and workflow optimization through advancements in cloud-native imaging. We pride ourselves on bridging the gap between complex software development and service delivery, ensuring that healthcare providers have the diagnostic tools they need at their fingertips. We are a global company with team members and clients across five continents. Our team is driven by a culture of precision, technical curiosity, and a commitment to streamlining the digital healthcare landscape for the modern era. We are currently looking for a Full Stack Developer who thrives in a dynamic environment and enjoys working across both frontend and backend systems. This role is ideal for engineers who take ownership of features end-to-end and are passionate about building scalable, high-quality products. What You’ll Do Design, develop, and maintain end-to-end features across frontend and backend systems Build responsive, high-quality user interfaces using React Develop and maintain backend services using Java (Spring Boot) Design and integrate RESTful APIs, ensuring scalability, performance, and reliability Work with PostgreSQL to design efficient data models and optimize queries Collaborate with FE, BA, Designer, and QA team to translate requirements into technical solutions Implement state management and API communication strategies, including caching mechanisms Apply established best practices in system design, security, and performance. Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving engineering standards Troubleshoot and resolve issues across the full stack Your Skills and Experience Required Skills 1. Strong experience with: Java (version 17+, preferably Java 21/25) Spring Boot PostgreSQL React 2. Solid understanding of: RESTful API design and integration System architecture and data flow across frontend and backend Web security principles (authentication, authorization, XSS, CSRF, etc.) Performance optimization across both frontend and backend 3. Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work across multiple layers of the system 4. Can communicate in English Nice to Have Cloud & Infrastructure: Experience with AWS (cloud services, deployment, and scaling) Frontend Ecosystem Experience with Vite (modern build tools) Experience with Lexical (rich text editor frameworks) Experience with React Table or similar data grid libraries Healthcare / Imaging Domain Familiarity with DICOM standard Experience with dcm4che (DICOM toolkit) Preferred Candidate Profile A minimum of 3 years of full-stack development experience, primarily working with Java and React. Strong ownership mindset with the ability to deliver features end-to-end Comfortable working across both frontend and backend Product-oriented thinking with attention to user experience and system reliability Ability to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment Why You'll Love Working Here Mission-driven culture improving healthcare delivery Opportunity to work across the full stack on impactful products Collaborative, transparent, and flexible work environment Competitive salary with regular annual reviews to reflect performance and market rates We offer a hybrid work environment with a mix of work from our District One based office in HCM Vietnam and home
benefits: Mission-driven culture improving healthcare delivery Opportunity to work across the full stack on impactful products Collaborative, transparent, and flexible work environment Competitive salary with regular annual reviews to reflect performance and market rates We offer a hybrid work environment with a mix of work from our District One based office in HCM Vietnam and home

company_name: The Rep. Office of STYL Solutions Pte. Ltd. In HCMC
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 100% salary & social insurance during probation International environment 19 paid days off per year The Job About STYL Solutions: Ride on the wave of Industry 4.0! Join STYL Solutions in the forefront of using Fintech and IoT technologies for smart city/nation transformation. Headquartered in Singapore with an R&D center in Vietnam, STYL Solutions designs, develops, and supplies hardware, software, and integrated solutions for applications in payment, loyalty management, location tracking, self-service operation, and telemetry. Our market segment coverage extends from financial services, retail, mass transit, and education to social services markets in Singapore and South Asia Pacific. Our vision is to use Fintech and IoT to create smart and efficient cities that enhance Quality of Life through convenience and healthier living. We are looking for an Android Developer with experience to work with our passionate software team in building high-performing, scalable, enterprise-grade applications for our clients. Responsibilities: Your responsibilities will include, but are not limited to: Develops and maintain Android applications. Support the entire application lifecycle (concept, design, test, release, documentation and support) Promote robust and maintainable code, clear documentation, and deliver high-quality work on a tight schedule. Cooperate with other team member to complete projects on time Research the new technologies Communicate with customer to gather and analyze requirements Design application architecture Train Junior developers Your Skills and Experience Here at STYL Solutions, we encourage our employees to take initiative, propose ideas, and provide them with the opportunity to dive into multiple projects. We are looking for candidates who possess the following: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology or equivalent majors/ experience At least 4 years of hands-on experience in Android programming. Experience in working with database and server communication Strong understanding of software development principles, capabilities, and limitations of mobile platforms Good at UI/UX design Ability to understand and debug large and complex code bases Good team communication and collaboration skills Well-Knowledge in software development process Willing to work under high-pressure environment Preferred qualifications: Influent in writing and oral communication skills in English and Vietnamese. Experience in cross-platform mobile app development tools Why You'll Love Working Here STYL Solutions will give you the favorable conditions you need to tackle difficult problems and learn cutting-edge technologies: International working environment with friendly and passionate colleagues Onsite opportunity to Japan, and Singapore for training and supporting customer Meaningful work with experienced & strong technical veterans Flat structure, simple processes & transparency In addition to providing you with professional growth, STYL Solutions is also committed to taking care of our employees, personally. As a full-time employee, you are automatically enrolled in our benefits program, which includes: Attractive compensation, regular assessments, and salary reviews; 19 paid days off per year; 100% salary & full social insurance during probation period; Premium health care insurance; Free dinner, coffee and tea; Annual healthcare checkup; Outing/team-building activities (company trip, sport,..)

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job As a QA Automation Engineer in our camera systems group, you will play a crucial role in technically leading, designing, developing, and optimizing automated test solutions for intelligent embedded camera systems and user interfaces and evaluating Computer Vision and AI algorithms. You will be responsible for the full lifecycle of test automation development, from conceptualization to deployment, while also contributing to backend API test design and implementation. This position requires a deep understanding of modern UI frameworks, strong full-stack test automation principles, and experience with camera technologies or similar data-intensive applications. We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Quality Assurance Automation Engineer who can lead our Vietnam embedded automation efforts. The ideal candidate is passionate about leading successful deployments of commercial systems for the benefit of our customers. The Quality Assurance Automation Engineer will be responsible for guiding the development, and hands-on participation in the quality assurance activities for our Embedded AI platform that is the core intelligence of our security surveillance cameras, appliances, and cloud services. This engineer will help drive our releases, ensure smooth and timely deployment of new features and bug fixes, and work with a team of quality engineers to maintain the test automation framework and overall product quality. Job Description: Collaborate with a small team of Quality assurance engineers and Quality technicians. Ensure that the Motorola Solutions Embedded AI group produces the highest quality, smartest, easiest to use products in the surveillance industry. Help lead the design & implementation of a quality evaluation pipeline, workflows, and reporting service for automatically testing IoT devices code prior to release. Contribute to a comprehensive quality assurance strategy to ensure the reliability and performance of our edge-based video surveillance cameras and cloud-based services. Execute quality assurance testing strategies for OTA firmware releases for cameras and appliances Work with the quality team to develop an exhaustive test approach, including pass fail metrics, real and synthetic video datasets, and automation as part of a comprehensive test suite for each new feature. Collaborate with product management, embedded software developers, algorithm developers, data scientists, and user interface engineers to define system requirements and use-cases for each new analytics feature. Coordinate with software development teams to define release scope, objectives, and timelines. Develop and maintain quality metrics, reports, and documentation to track and communicate product quality improvements. Analyze test results, identify trends, and provide recommendations for process improvements. Stay up-to-date with industry best practices and emerging technologies related to quality assurance and AI-based video surveillance systems. Support our cross-team software escalation process, ensuring timely resolution of critical quality issues and effective communication with stakeholders. Identify and close testing holes in current test processes and automation Create and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts for both manual and automated testing. Conduct off-site outdoor field testing of analytics features on camera hardware Your Skills and Experience Bachelor of Science degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Robotics, Physics, or equivalent experience from a technical engineering discipline. Experience leading a small team, evaluating performance and managing direct reports successfully. 3- 8 years of experience in quality assurance automation engineering. Proven experience in designing, implementing, and managing comprehensive quality assurance strategies and automation frameworks for complex software and hardware systems. Expertise in developing and authoring Python, C++, and Javascript automation software to test individual software components, web-enabled embedded hardware, IoT, and/or Robotics. Strong background in cloud-connected applications with platforms such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, and integrating automated tests within CI/CD pipelines. Demonstrated ability to mentor young developers, fostering a culture of quality, innovation, and continuous improvement. Excellent communication, collaboration, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively engage with technical and non-technical stakeholders across all levels of the organization. Experience with AI, machine learning, and computer vision technologies, and their application in quality assurance. Ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues, think critically, and drive timely resolution of critical quality issues. Highly organized, creative, and curious, with the ability to multi-task and thrive in an autonomous, empowering, and exciting environment. Why You'll Love Working Here Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service … Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination Award for marriage, newborn We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,... job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us A leading Swiss product company An attractive compensation and benefit package A strong culture of growth, wellbeing and balance The Job Welcome to SMG Vietnam! SMG Swiss Marketplace Group simplifies lives with innovative online marketplaces in Automotive, Real Estate, General Marketplaces, and Finance & Insurance. As SMG’s innovation hub, SMG Vietnam develops cutting-edge solutions in a collaborative, empowering environment. Recognized among the 2023 Asia & Vietnam Best Workplaces, we attract top digital talent to create exceptional user experiences for Switzerland. Guided by our core values—Better Together, Aim High, and Act Responsibly—we drive innovation and meaningful change. This job refers to our Real Estate brands , Homegate and Immoscout24, the largest real estate portals in Switzerland, with more than 15 million visits per month and more than 100,000 listings. We provide all users looking for a property with a transparent overview of the entire range of listings without them having to tediously visit different platforms. In addition to great products such as the mortgage or price calculator, we also offer editorial articles on topics such as housing and financing. We are looking for a Mid/Senior Full-stack engineer (Python) to help us build the future of the Swiss real estate market by contributing to our cutting-edge, cloud-based technology stack. The platform's core function is to digitally connect tenants with landlords and property managers, streamlining the entire process from initial listings and managing viewing appointments all the way through to the submission of digital applications. Your work will contribute to making the rental process more efficient for all parties involved. You will get to collaborate and access the wealth of knowledge and experience from a community of amazing engineers who come from all parts of the globe and are ready to share their expertise and aid you in your path to fulfilling your potential. Join our dynamic team, located in six countries (Switzerland, Serbia, Vietnam, France, Germany, and India), where creativity thrives. Together, we tackle challenges, celebrate successes, and keep learning and growing. Our tech stack Our frontend services utilize a variety of technologies, including Vue.js and React, with Typescript as the language of choice. These services consist of a mix of client-side, server-side, pre-rendered, and hybrid web apps. Additionally, some services leverage Django templates for the frontend, often mixed with React written in Typescript. Our backend architecture utilizes a combination of technologies. We have services built with Node.js and Typescript, following a serverless and microservices pattern in AWS, leveraging services like Lambda, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and S3. Additionally, we have services built with Python and the Django Framework, running as a modularized monolithic architecture in Docker containers on on-premise servers. Our monitoring is done mainly through Datadog and Sentry. Our codebase and services are documented using Backstage. Your mission You will design, implement, test, and deliver new features that bring value to our users. You will encourage knowledge sharing and drive technical discussions within the team. You will translate high-level ideas and requirements into practical solutions. You will own your own services and be responsible end-to-end for everything from development and testing to delivery and monitoring. You will collaborate with other engineering teams as well as your existing team to ensure the stability of our microservices architecture. You will challenge the status quo and continuously aim to improve the architecture, code, and tools to ensure the delivery of high-quality software. Your responsibilities will evolve as we grow. Your Skills and Experience What will you bring to the ride? You are fluent in English, with written and verbal communication. You've got 3+ years of experience in web development, building user-facing products with end-to-end ownership across multiple layers of the stack. You've got 2+ years of experience with Python for backend development. You are proficient in working with databases. You are a creative, adaptable, and problem-solving individual who thrives in collaborative environments. You have a positive attitude and are a team player. You are open to change and able to propose solutions. It would be a big plus if you also have some of these: You have prior working experience with Django framework or similar. You have prior working experience with frontend frameworks like React or similar. You have prior working experience with JavaScript/Typescript and Node.js. You have prior working experience with APIs and microservices. You have prior working experience with cloud service providers like AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job IT Audit Execution & Risk Assessment Participate in the comprehensive planning and execution of IT audits in accordance with the annual audit plan. Perform thorough risk assessments and profiling of IT entities, including infrastructure, applications, and IT processes. Evaluate IT General Controls (ITGC), application controls, and cybersecurity measures to assess compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and international best practices. Identify emerging technology risks, assess their impact on operations, identify root causes of control weaknesses, and recommend effective corrective actions. Recommend audit ratings and appropriately escalate significant IT risks and control deficiencies to senior management. Data Analytics & Audit Innovation Apply advanced data analytics techniques and analyze large datasets to identify patterns, anomalies, and actionable insights. Develop and implement audit automation tools and interactive dashboards to facilitate continuous auditing. Utilize analytical programming languages (e.g., SQL, Python, R) and data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Qlik Sense) to drive audit efficiency. Reporting, Collaboration & Stakeholder Management Prepare clear, concise, and high-quality audit reports for both internal stakeholders and regulators. Effectively communicate audit findings to management, track issues, and follow up on unresolved findings. Collaborate closely with IT, Risk, Compliance, Operations teams, and other auditors to deliver highly integrated audit engagements. Support and participate in general internal audit activities (e.g., operational and compliance audits) as assigned by the Head of Internal Audit. Your Skills and Experience Must have Experience: Minimum 4 years of practical experience in IT audit, IT risk, or related roles. Education: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a closely related field. Technical Expertise: Strong foundational understanding of IT audit, ITGC, and cybersecurity frameworks. Practical knowledge of IT infrastructure (Windows, Unix, databases, networks, firewalls), data center operations, and digital banking systems. Analytical Skills: Proven proficiency in data analytics programming (SQL, Python, R, etc.), handling large datasets, and utilizing data visualization tools like Tableau or Qlik Sense. Domain Knowledge: Strong understanding of legal and regulatory requirements related to IT, internal controls, and risk management specific to the banking sector. Soft Skills: Fluency in English (both written and spoken). Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and report-writing skills, coupled with high integrity and professional skepticism. Must be highly adaptable in a fast-paced, multicultural environment. Nice to have Prior professional experience working within foreign banks or international financial institutions. Holding recognized professional certifications such as CISA, CIA, or CISSP. Hands-on experience in automation, continuous auditing, and familiarity with Machine Learning (ML) concepts. job_title: Senior Embedded SW Engineer Automotive SiL/ vECU
company_name: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members 16++ days of paid leave per year The Job Team Information Airbag team are growing in Vietnam. The Airbag team in Vietnam is a part of the Bosch Airbag Global team, responsible for SW development of Airbag Control Unit to leading Chinese, Japanese, and ASEAN car makers. We are looking for talented team members with passion in developing safety products that save lives. We offer a lot of training and practical hands-on in Automotive Embedded SW and Airbag system domain. Opportunity to work in an international environment with stakeholders and global experts. Join us: the Bosch AIRBAG global team which creates "EXPLOSIONS THAT SAVE LIFE" As a Software-in-the-Loop (SiL) Engineer, you will play a key role in shaping and advancing our SiL/vECU platform to support cutting-edge automotive software development and testing. Your main roles and responsibilities Requirements Engineering: Analyze and transform complex user requirements for SiL systems into detailed technical specifications and innovative solution designs. Architectural Design: Define, design, and evolve the SiL/vECU (virtual Electronic Control Unit) architecture, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability. Platform Development: Lead the development, implementation, and enhancement of the SiL platform, supporting advanced software development and comprehensive testing activities. Automation & Integration: Develop sophisticated automated test scripts and frameworks within the SiL environment, and seamlessly integrate SiL solutions into continuous integration (CI/CD) and continuous testing (CT) pipelines. Feature Customization: Design and implement specific SiL features and capabilities tailored to the unique requirements of diverse customer projects. Debugging & Optimization: Proactively identify, diagnose, and resolve complex issues within the SiL environment, implementing effective and robust solutions. Your Skills and Experience Mandatory Qualifications Education: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechatronics, Computer Science, or a closely related technical field. Experience: 3-7 years of progressive experience in the Automotive Embedded domain. 2-3 years of dedicated hands-on experience with Software-in-the-Loop (SiL) development and integration. Technical Expertise: AUTOSAR: Expert-level knowledge (L4) and practical experience with AUTOSAR framework, methodologies, and standards. Automotive Protocols: Strong understanding (L3) of key automotive communication protocols, including CAN, FlexRay, LIN, Ethernet, and SPI. Programming: High proficiency (L4) in programming languages such as C/C++ and Python. Problem-Solving: Exceptional logical thinking, analytical, and problem-solving skills, with a proven ability to tackle complex technical challenges. Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly to diverse audiences. Language: Fluency in English (both written and spoken) is mandatory. Nice to Have (Preferred Qualifications) Testing Methodologies: Experience with various software testing methodologies, including unit, integration, and system testing. Project Leadership: Prior experience in project management, technical lead roles, or coordinating cross-functional engineering efforts. Model-Based Design: Familiarity with Model-Based Design tools (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink) for automotive applications. Virtualization: Experience with virtual ECU (vECU) environments and associated tools. Cloud Integration: Exposure to integrating simulation environments with cloud-based platforms. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 12 days of annual leave + 2 floating holidays Public and private health insurance Lunches, snacks, happy hours, and sport activities The Job About DataXight At DataXight, we are committed to transforming life science and healthcare. We’re passionate about empowering our team to work on projects that not only push biomedical boundaries but also make a tangible difference in human health. Every day here brings new challenges and opportunities for impact. Are you ready to be part of something great? The Role We’re looking for a Senior IT & Security Engineer to strengthen the security and reliability of our client’s cloud platforms and internal systems. This is a high-autonomy role working across time zones. You’ll take ownership of security engineering, operations, and reporting - driving improvements with minimal supervision and strong written communication. What You’ll Do Implement and improve security controls across cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) Strengthen security across applications, infrastructure, and CI/CD pipelines Perform threat modeling and vulnerability identification Own security operations: reporting, dashboards, and process optimization Automate workflows to improve efficiency and reliability Analyze security data and translate insights into actionable improvements Document risks, propose solutions, and present/track for approval Support incident response and vulnerability management Collaborate asynchronously with global teams Your Skills and Experience Required Skills & Qualifications 3+ years in Security Engineering, DevSecOps, or Cloud Security Strong scripting/development skills (Python or Node preferred) Experience with version control systems such (e.g., GitHub), CLI tools, and modern development environments Experience with cloud platforms and CI/CD environments Familiarity with Terraform (Infrastructure as Code) Understanding of OWASP Top 10, CVEs, and security fundamentals Solid foundation in systems, networking, and security Familiarity with AI systems, especially those used for development and how to manage the risks they present to systems and data Strong written English communication Ability to work independently and deliver with minimal guidance Preferred Qualifications Experience working in SaaS, data platform, or healthcare environments Familiarity with AI/LLM security risks and mitigation strategies Exposure to security tooling, SIEM, or detection & response workflows Background in automating reporting or operational processes What Sets You Apart Highly autonomous and proactive Strong written communicator (clear, structured, and concise) Comfortable working asynchronously across time zones Analytical and data-driven mindset Ownership mentality with strong problem-solving skills Lifelong Skills Inquisitive Mindset : Demonstrates curiosity, constantly seeking to understand project details and underlying principles, indicative of a continuous learning approach. Clarity and Insight : Actively seeks clarity and understanding of project requirements to ensure accurate and effective implementation. Depth of Perception : Has talent for looking beyond initial requests, intuitively grasping and addressing the core needs and objectives underlying a project. Implementation Insight : Able to outline and describe the phases of project implementation, breaking down intricate tasks into manageable steps. Articulate Communication : Exhibits strong verbal and written communication Why You'll Love Working Here This is more than a support role - it’s an opportunity to become an essential pillar of our security and IT infrastructure, enabling secure innovation and seamless productivity across time zones. At DataXight, we foster a dynamic and collaborative environment where your contributions have real impact. We Offer: Competitive compensation. Flexible time off, including floating holidays. Private health insurance & full social, health, and unemployment insurance in line with Vietnamese labor law. Professional development support. Company-provided lunches along with a selection of coffee, tea, and snacks. Other employee benefits as stipulated in Vietnamese labor law, reinforcing our commitment to your growth and well-being. If you’re someone who thrives on solving complex problems and actively wants to transform healthcare, apply DataXight today. Send your resume, cover letter, and relevant work samples or GitHub profile to . We look forward to reviewing your application and potentially welcoming you to our globally connected team!

Job Purpose: Đảm bảo vận hành ổn định và hỗ trợ người dùng về các hệ thống công nghệ thông tin nội bộ, tối ưu hóa trải nghiệm người dùng và hiệu suất làm việc trên các nền tảng cộng tác doanh nghiệp (Microsoft 365, Atlassian) thông qua việc: Quản trị và tối ưu các nền tảng Microsoft 365 và bộ công cụ Atlassian. Hỗ trợ kỹ thuật (IT HelpDesk): Tiếp nhận và hỗ trợ người dùng về phần cứng, mạng, hệ điều hành (Windows/MacOS) và các thiết bị/phần mềm văn phòng. Tối thiểu 03 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực IT Support hoặc System Administration. Có kinh nghiệm thực tế về quản trị hệ thống trong môi trường doanh nghiệp. Có chứng chỉ Microsoft (Modern Desktop/Administrator) là lợi thế. Thành thạo quản trị Jira/Confluence: Có khả năng cấu hình workflow, có thể viết JQL và hiểu biết về phân quyền hệ thống. job_title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer Database  K8s
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary & benefits you'll love Building large-scale products Working in one of the best places to work in VN The Job Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm Senior Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) có kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu trong việc triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu các hệ thống Enterprise-Grade Database Clusters và Kubernetes (K8S) .Bạn sẽ đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc đảm bảo hạ tầng dữ liệu luôn ổn định, hiệu năng cao, có khả năng mở rộng, và được giám sát chủ động thông qua hệ thống quan sát (observability) hiện đại. Trách nhiệm chính Nghiên cứu, triển khai, quản trị và tối ưu các database systems (SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, v.v.). Vận hành, tối ưu và mở rộng hệ thống Kubernetes cluster. Thiết lập và quản lý các monitoring & alerting systems như Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, ELK, v.v. Define và tinh chỉnh metrics, alert thresholds, SLO/SLA, error budgets cho các dịch vụ database và hạ tầng quan trọng. Tham gia xử lý sự cố (incident response), điều tra nguyên nhân gốc rễ (root cause analysis) và thực hiện post-mortem để tăng độ tin cậy hệ thống. Tự động hóa quy trình vận hành (backup, failover, scaling, recovery, patching, CI/CD, etc.). Xây dựng, chuẩn hóa runbook / playbook / documentation giúp đội ngũ phản ứng nhanh và hiệu quả trong tình huống khẩn cấp. Phối hợp cùng team phát triển để cải tiến các sản phẩm database/big data. Your Skills and Experience Yêu cầu Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc ở vị trí SRE/DBA/System Engineer. Thành thạo việc triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu database systems (SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, v.v.) trên môi trường on-premise hoặc on-cloud. Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành Kubernetes trong môi trường on-premise hoặc cloud (EKS, GKE, AKS). Kinh nghiệm thiết lập metrics, alert thresholds, dashboards cho hệ thống database và hạ tầng. Có khả năng trực on-call, theo dõi cảnh báo và xử lý hoặc escalate kịp thời các sự cố hệ thống. Thành thạo các công cụ monitoring & logging như Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, Loki, ELK Stack,... Biết viết script tự động hóa bằng Python / Bash / Go. Kiến thức tốt về networking, storage, performance tuning, backup & recovery. Tư duy hệ thống mạnh mẽ, chủ động trong việc phát hiện và xử lý vấn đề. Điểm cộng Có kinh nghiệm vận hành các Enterprise-grade database cluster như SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB Enterprise là một lợi thế. Có kinh nghiệm vận hành distributed databases hoặc high availability clusters (Patroni, Galera, Sentinel, etc.) là một lợi thế. Kinh nghiệm với big data systems (Kafka, ClickHouse, Elasticsearch, etc.). Có chứng chỉ liên quan như MCSA/MCSE/Azure Database Administrator, Oracle Database (OCA / OCP), MongoDB Certified DBA / Developer, CKA/CKAD, AWS/GCP Certified hoặc DB Admin Certifications khác là một lợi thế. Why You'll Love Working Here .

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary & benefits you'll love Building large-scale products Working in one of the best places to work in VN The Job Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm Senior DevOps Engineer có kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu trong việc triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu các hệ thống Enterprise-Grade Database Clusters và Kubernetes (K8S) .Bạn sẽ đóng vai trò quan trọng trong việc đảm bảo hạ tầng dữ liệu luôn ổn định, hiệu năng cao, có khả năng mở rộng, và được giám sát chủ động thông qua hệ thống quan sát (observability) hiện đại. Trách nhiệm chính Nghiên cứu, triển khai, quản trị và tối ưu các database systems (SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, v.v.). Vận hành, tối ưu và mở rộng hệ thống Kubernetes cluster. Thiết lập và quản lý các monitoring & alerting systems như Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, ELK, v.v. Define và tinh chỉnh metrics, alert thresholds, SLO/SLA, error budgets cho các dịch vụ database và hạ tầng quan trọng. Tham gia xử lý sự cố (incident response), điều tra nguyên nhân gốc rễ (root cause analysis) và thực hiện post-mortem để tăng độ tin cậy hệ thống. Tự động hóa quy trình vận hành (backup, failover, scaling, recovery, patching, CI/CD, etc.). Xây dựng, chuẩn hóa runbook / playbook / documentation giúp đội ngũ phản ứng nhanh và hiệu quả trong tình huống khẩn cấp. Phối hợp cùng team phát triển để cải tiến các sản phẩm database/big data. Your Skills and Experience Yêu cầu Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc ở vị trí SRE/DBA/System Engineer. Thành thạo việc triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu database systems (SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, v.v.) trên môi trường on-premise hoặc on-cloud. Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành Kubernetes trong môi trường on-premise hoặc cloud (EKS, GKE, AKS). Kinh nghiệm thiết lập metrics, alert thresholds, dashboards cho hệ thống database và hạ tầng. Có khả năng trực on-call, theo dõi cảnh báo và xử lý hoặc escalate kịp thời các sự cố hệ thống. Thành thạo các công cụ monitoring & logging như Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, Loki, ELK Stack,... Biết viết script tự động hóa bằng Python / Bash / Go. Kiến thức tốt về networking, storage, performance tuning, backup & recovery. Tư duy hệ thống mạnh mẽ, chủ động trong việc phát hiện và xử lý vấn đề. Điểm cộng Có kinh nghiệm vận hành các Enterprise-grade database cluster như SQL Server, Oracle, MongoDB Enterprise là một lợi thế. Có kinh nghiệm vận hành distributed databases hoặc high availability clusters (Patroni, Galera, Sentinel, etc.) là một lợi thế. Kinh nghiệm với big data systems (Kafka, ClickHouse, Elasticsearch, etc.). Có chứng chỉ liên quan như MCSA/MCSE/Azure Database Administrator, Oracle Database (OCA / OCP), MongoDB Certified DBA / Developer, CKA/CKAD, AWS/GCP Certified hoặc DB Admin Certifications khác là một lợi thế. Why You'll Love Working Here .

job_title: Mid to Senior Fullstack Developer NodeJS/Javascript
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Profitable startup from Year 1! High pay, MacBook Pro, $1000 annual development Work with top talent on product changing industry The Job About the Opportunity We are looking for an elite Internal Tools Builder to act as the engine behind our company's operations. As we evolve into a full-funnel marketing platform serving over 600k+ verified users, our internal operations, ERP, and tooling need to scale just as fast. In this role, you will work directly with company leadership to identify operational bottlenecks and build custom internal systems from the ground up. You will not be handed a perfect ticket; you will be handed a business problem. We need a highly autonomous Fullstack Engineer with a relentless "builder mindset" who can lead the topic, architect the system, and collaborate with other engineers to get it across the finish line. What You Will Do You will not just "write code." You will own internal products end-to-end. Your core challenges will include: Build the Engine: Architect and build robust internal tools, ERP modules, and operational systems across the entire stack (Database -> API -> UI) to make our internal teams wildly efficient. Direct Collaboration with Leadership: You will work directly with leadership/the boss. You must be comfortable hopping on a call, translating a vague business problem into a technical roadmap, and executing it. Lead the Topic: You are the technical owner. You will drive the architecture, make the hard technical trade-offs, and push back when necessary to ensure we are building the right thing. Mentorship & Collaboration: You won't be doing it entirely alone. You will pair with and mentor a junior engineer—delegating tasks effectively, doing code reviews, and helping them level up their full-stack skills. Performance & Architecture: Balance speed with stability. Know when an internal tool just needs a quick MVP to save the team 10 hours a week, and when a system needs to be highly scalable to handle massive data throughput. Your Skills and Experience What You Need to Be Successful We hire for mindset first, technology second. 1. The Builder Mindset Idea to Reality: You thrive on ambiguity. You can take a vague request ("We are losing track of customer billing edge-cases") and independently architect the database, build the API, and craft the UI to solve it. Internal Systems Expertise: You have experience building internal tools, ERPs, CRMs, or admin dashboards. You know how to stitch together third-party APIs, webhooks, and internal databases. 2. Engineering Skills Deep Experience (5+ Years): You have a strong foundation in building complex, production-ready web applications. Fullstack Fluency: You are completely comfortable jumping between backend logic (API design, complex SQL/Database modeling) and the frontend (React, state management) without skipping a beat. 3. Communication & Leadership Exceptional Communicator: Because you work directly with leadership, your written and spoken English must be excellent. You can explain complex technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders clearly and confidently. Force Multiplier: You have the patience and communication skills to mentor a junior engineer, breaking down complex architectures into actionable tasks for them. Why You'll Love Working Here Impact: The tools you build will instantly become the backbone of how our company operates daily. Culture: We are a lean, fast-growing team that values Good Design, Trust, and Empowerment. We invest in our people and give them the autonomy to do their best work. Perks: Highly competitive salary + 13th-month bonus. Stock options for high contributors. Professional development package of up to $1,000/year. Modern office with top-notch equipment (MacBook Pro). Comprehensive healthcare package (Annual health check, Premium Health Insurance). Flexible working hours with a standard 5-day workweek

job_title: Milient - Senior Fullstack Developer NodeJS, MERN
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Global growth with experienced engineers Innovative, balanced, creative culture Competitive salary, benefits, training The Job Milient is a leading SaaS provider specializing in project management solutions, offering tools for timekeeping, resource planning and quality assurance to businesses across the Nordic region. With offices in Norway and Sweden, we are proud of being the Nordic region’s largest SaaS provider within project management, including timekeeping, resource planning, quality assurance, staffing, and recruitment. Milient is often used by architects, the staffing industry, advertising, engineering and IT. Milient aims to empower businesses by simplifying complex project management tasks, thereby enhancing productivity and project outcomes. We emphasizes the importance of its employees, fostering a collaborative environment that encourages professional development. Read more about us: We are hiring three Software Developers to join a growing product team based in our Hanoi office. You will work within a collaborative team that includes a Tech Lead and consultants based in Poland, contributing to both the maintenance and modernization of existing systems, as well as the development of new features on a MERN stack hosted in AWS. While the role is full stack in nature, frontend support is available within the broader organisation, so a stronger backend or full stack profile is equally welcome. A key workstream for this team is the identification and extraction of functional domains within the existing application, decomposing it into standalone, reusable modules that will underpin a broader product portfolio. This is a rare opportunity to combine legacy modernization with genuine greenfield architecture work. Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain features across the full stack primarily using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js. Contribute to the gradual migration of legacy frontend code (jQuery and related technologies) toward modern frameworks and best practices. Play an active role in identifying and decomposing functional domains within the existing application into standalone, reusable modules – combining legacy modernization with greenfield architecture work to support a growing product portfolio. Collaborate closely with the Tech Lead, Polish-based consultants, and cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software. Participate in code reviews, providing and receiving constructive feedback to uphold coding standards. Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code with appropriate test coverage. Identify and address technical debt as part of ongoing development work. Support deployment and monitoring of applications in AWS environments. Contribute to Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives. Your Skills and Experience Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). Proven experience as a Software Developer with deep proficiency in Node.js and server-side JavaScript; working knowledge of the broader MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React) is expected with Node.js being the primary focus Solid understanding of RESTful API design and integration. Familiarity with legacy frontend technologies, particularly jQuery. Experience with version control systems (Git) and collaborative development workflows. Comfortable using AI coding assistants (e.g. GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor) as part of your day-to-day development workflow Understanding of software testing principles and experience writing unit or integration tests. Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Good communication skills and ability to work effectively across distributed, multicultural teams. For Senior-level candidates, you should also have: Significant experience (typically 5+ years) delivering production software in full stack or backend-heavy roles. The ability to take ownership of complex technical problems and drive solutions with minimal guidance. Experience mentoring or informally supporting junior and mid-level developers. A track record of contributing to architectural decisions, technical documentation, and long-term code quality improvements. Preferred Qualifications Experience with AWS services (e.g.: EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS) and cloud-native development practices. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps tooling. Experience with Agile methodologies and tools such as Jira and Confluence. Prior exposure to frontend migration projects or modernization initiatives. Experience with domain-driven design, modular architecture, or application decomposition (e.g: microfrontends, service extraction). Knowledge of security best practices in web application development Experience with agentic coding workflows, such as using AI tools to scaffold features, generate tests or automate repetitive tasks. Why You'll Love Working Here What we offer: Challenging responsibilities, an entrepreneurial environment, and a supportive team. If you’re not a perfect fit but have what it takes, reach out. We value diversity. What will you get? Join our innovative and market-leading Scandinavian SaaS company and accelerate your growth alongside experienced software engineers from around the world. We value creativity, innovation, and work-life balance in our Scandinavian work culture, and offer a competitive salary with 100% official salary during the probation period, annual reviews, and 13th month salary. We prioritize the well-being of our employees with premium healthcare and accident insurance, as well as a wellness package to help you stay healthy and wealthy. You'll also have the chance to participate in exciting company outings, team-building activities, and on-site training opportunities in the Nordic region. Work in a modern and supportive environment where your individuality is valued, and collaborate with a talented team on a mission to become global players in the industry.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Giới thiệu Tại MobiFone Solutions, chúng tôi tập trung xây dựng và triển khai các nền tảng số phục vụ Chính phủ và doanh nghiệp lớn, trong các lĩnh vực như: Chính phủ điện tử (eGov), nền tảng dữ liệu & AI, hệ thống doanh nghiệp và các giải pháp tích hợp quy mô lớn. Với lợi thế về hạ tầng và hệ sinh thái dữ liệu, đây là môi trường phù hợp cho những chuyên gia công nghệ mong muốn: Làm việc với các hệ thống công nghệ quy mô lớn, có tác động thực tế tới hàng triệu người dùng. Làm việc với các bài toán kỹ thuật phức tạp (distributed systems, tích hợp đa hệ thống) Tham gia các dự án quy mô lớn (enterprise / cấp quốc gia) Phát triển theo định hướng kiến trúc hệ thống và giải pháp Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm Tech Lead đồng hành cùng đội ngũ trong việc thiết kế và triển khai các giải pháp công nghệ thế hệ mới. Tài liệu hóa hệ thống và training, transfer hệ thống, yêu cầu, nhiệm vụ cho đội ngũ developer. Xây dựng phần mềm với Nodejs, .NET, Reactjs; tích hợp với các giải pháp message queue, streaming data; sử dụng các database solution: Oracle, MongoDB, Postgresql ... cho các bài toán và nghiệp vụ cụ thể, đa dạng. Chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng và đảm bảo hệ thống xử lý traffic cao, đáp ứng yêu cầu an ninh bảo mật cấp độ 4; đảm bảo các cơ chế monitoring, alerting và observability toàn diện. Quản lý, xây dựng và mentor đội ngũ backend, frontend trong quá trình xây dựng sản phẩm, cải tiến performance. Thực hiện code review nghiêm ngặt; thiết kế, xây dựng quy trình làm việc, phát triển phần mềm. Mentor đội ngũ, xây dựng best practices Phối hợp chặt chẽ với stakeholder, PMO, BA và các team hạ tầng, security, triển khai vận hành để deliver sản phẩm. Your Skills and Experience Tối thiểu 7-10 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình, trong đó ít nhất 3 năm làm Techlead/SA Hiểu rõ công nghệ, kỹ thuật Nodejs, Reactjs, .NET. Có kinh nghiệm thực tế triển khai và vận hành các dự án production với quy mô lớn. Kinh nghiệm Kubernetes/Docker, CI/CD (GitOps, Helm), load testing (k6/JMeter), performance profiling. Tư duy hệ thống mạnh, có khả năng ra quyết định nhanh, có cơ sở. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ thống phức tạp, tích hợp kỹ thuật với nhiều hệ thống liên quan. Có khả năng lãnh đạo, mentor, chịu được áp lực cao và tinh thần làm việc nhiệt huyết Why You'll Love Working Here Lương: Upto 70.000.000 VNĐ Hỗ trợ: ăn trưa, xăng xe, điện thoại, đồng phục Lương tháng 13 + thưởng hiệu suất công việc 1 - 2 tháng lương (dựa vào kết quả sản xuất kinh doanh của công ty) Gói phúc lợi chung của tập đoàn: upto 25.000.000VNĐ/ năm (Lễ tết: 30/4, 1/5, 2/9, tết DL, tết AL,…) 12 ngày nghỉ phép/năm. Develop interactive and innovative digital experiences for advertising and marketing campaigns. Tối ưu hóa tốc độ tải trang và SEO cho các sản phẩm digital, đặc biệt sử dụng Next.js để đạt hiệu quả cao nhất. Optimize page load speed and SEO for digital products, especially using Next.js for maximum efficiency. Hiện thực hóa các ý tưởng thiết kế phức tạp từ đội ngũ Creative/Design thành các sản phẩm web hoạt động hoàn hảo. Translate complex design ideas from the Creative/Design team into perfectly functional web products. Tích hợp frontend với các hệ thống dữ liệu backend phức tạp thông qua GraphQL API và REST API. Integrate frontend with complex backend data systems via GraphQL API and REST API. Phát triển các tính năng tương tác đòi hỏi trao đổi dữ liệu liên tục như hệ thống bình chọn real-time, bảng xếp hạng, đăng ký sự kiện, tích hợp mạng xã hội. Xây dựng các trải nghiệm Web 3D sử dụng WebGL, Three.js, React Three Fiber, bao gồm không gian ảo, showroom ảo, và mô hình sản phẩm 3D tương tác. Triển khai các chiến dịch AR (Thực tế tăng cường) thông qua WebAR và phối hợp tạo filter mạng xã hội. Đảm bảo sản phẩm phát triển đáp ứng yêu cầu kinh doanh, có hiệu suất tối ưu và khả năng mở rộng. Ensure developed products meet business requirements, have optimal performance, and are scalable. Minimum 5 years of experience in IT roles: 3 years frontend - 2 years backend, with a preference for experience in a creative advertising agency environment Nắm vững và thành thạo HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Strong proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Có kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu với ReactJS và Next.js (bao gồm Server-Side Rendering (SSR) và Static Site Generation (SSG)). In-depth experience with ReactJS and Next.js (including Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and Static Site Generation (SSG). Extensive experience working with GraphQL API and REST API, including integration with Headless CMS (such as Strapi, Contentful) and handling multiple data sources. Có kiến thức và kinh nghiệm thực tế về 3D Web (WebGL, Three.js, React Three Fiber) để phát triển các trải nghiệm không gian ảo và mô hình 3D tương tác. Practical knowledge and experience with 3D Web (WebGL, Three.js, React Three Fiber) to develop virtual spaces and interactive 3D models. Hiểu biết sâu sắc về cách hoạt động của AR và có kinh nghiệm triển khai các chiến dịch WebAR cũng như filter mạng xã hội. Deep understanding of AR functionality and experience implementing WebAR campaigns and social media filters. Tư duy sáng tạo, khả năng giải quyết vấn đề vượt trội và khả năng biến ý tưởng phức tạp thành sản phẩm thực tế.
