job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary and benefits Comprehensive insurance coverage and allowances Generous leave: public + annual + 3 special days The Job About BeWao BeWao is the company behind WAO , an AI-powered nutrition and wellness platform built for the Vietnamese market. WAO helps users track meals, understand nutrition, and build healthier habits through a mobile-first product experience powered by modern backend services and AI-assisted workflows. We are at a stage where strong engineering decisions still have immediate product impact. We are looking for a Technical Lead who can raise the quality bar while staying close to delivery, product reality, and production outcomes. About the Role This is a hands-on technical leadership role focused primarily on React Native mobile development and backend service development . It is not a pure management role. We expect the person in this role to stay close to the code, own technical direction for critical product areas, and help the team deliver reliably in production. At WAO, we use AI-assisted development with a spec-driven workflow. Strong technical leadership here means defining clear problem statements, shaping implementation plans up front, and guiding the team to deliver in small, verifiable increments instead of relying on ad hoc coding. Because we are a startup, this role requires a strong production mindset. You should be comfortable making sound trade-offs between speed, quality, and cost, taking end-to-end responsibility from specification through release and operation, and keeping the team focused on business value without compromising reliability. What You’ll Do Lead technical direction for WAO's React Native mobile app and backend services. Stay very hands-on and personally contribute to critical implementation, debugging, and production issues across mobile and backend. Own features end-to-end from problem framing and specification to design, implementation, release, monitoring, and production follow-up. Drive spec-driven delivery by turning product ideas into clear specifications, technical plans, task breakdowns, and measurable acceptance criteria. Make pragmatic technical decisions that balance product speed, engineering quality, scalability, maintainability, and operational cost. Improve engineering workflows, testing strategy, observability, and release confidence. Review code and system design, mentor engineers, and raise technical standards through clear feedback and day-to-day guidance. Partner closely with Product and Design to clarify requirements, reduce ambiguity, and surface delivery risks early. Own technical decision-making in your area and communicate trade-offs clearly to cross-functional stakeholders. Help the team use AI coding assistants effectively within a disciplined workflow that prioritizes clarity, maintainability, and verification. Your Skills and Experience Technologies We Use Primary Product Stack: React Native, TypeScript, NestJS, GraphQL, PostgreSQL PlatformServices: Firebase, Typesense, Kafka, Clickhouse Supporting Systems: FastAPI, Strapi, React, Next.js Architecture & Infrastructure: Microservices, GCP, Serverless, Redis, Cloudflare Workers Required Skills & Experience We're looking for a technically strong, product-minded leader who thrives in a fast-moving startup environment. You should be: Experienced: 7+ years of professional software engineering experience , including meaningful ownership of production systems. Leadership-Oriented: 2+ years leading engineers , mentoring teammates, or driving technical direction for a team or product area. Deeply Hands-On: Strong hands-on ability in both React Native mobile development and backend service development. Architecturally Strong: Able to design scalable systems, evaluate trade-offs clearly, and guide implementation from high-level design to execution details. Spec-Driven: Strong at writing and reviewing specifications, implementation plans, task breakdowns, and success criteria before coding starts. Production-Minded: Thinks beyond shipping features and takes responsibility for reliability, maintainability, observability, and operational outcomes in production. Startup-Oriented: Comfortable operating with ambiguity, moving quickly, making practical trade-offs, and adapting as product priorities evolve. AI-Native: Comfortable using AI coding assistants in a disciplined workflow. Experience with AI-assisted engineering guided by strong specs and review standards is a strong advantage. Relevant Technically: Comfortable with GraphQL APIs, PostgreSQL data modeling, Firebase-based auth flows, and event-driven systems. Experience with Google Pub/Sub or Kafka is valuable. Product-Minded: Focused on solving user and business problems, not only writing code. Accountable: High ownership mindset with a willingness to surface risks early, make decisions, and stand behind outcomes. Communicative: Clear in technical and non-technical communication, with the abilityto align stakeholders and resolve ambiguity. Why You'll Love Working Here What Success Looks Like in the First 90 Days Build a solid understanding of WAO's mobile app, backend services, delivery workflow, and major production risks. Earn trust with Product, Design, and engineers while taking ownership of a high-priority mobile and backend initiative. Improve at least one key area of execution: specification quality, delivery predictability, code quality, or production reliability. Why Join Us? Opportunity to shape the core product and engineering culture of WAO at a stage where execution still compounds quickly. High ownership and visible impact on product direction, technical quality, and delivery standards. A startup environment that values product judgment, technical depth, and production accountability. Competitive salary and benefits. Generous leave policy: Public holidays 12 days annual leave 3 additional Company Holidays (Christmas, Vietnamese Family Day, Birthday leave) Comprehensive insurance coverage and allowances (parking). Performance-based annual 13th-month salary(may apply). Apply Now Join BeWao and help lead the team building WAO. If you want a role where technical leadership means staying close to the code, owning delivery, and improving how a startup ships in production, we'd like to hear from you.

Be part of a dynamic startup culture with open communication and strong teamwork. Experience the synergy of Japanese discipline and Vietnamese innovation . Collaborate closely with international teams and enhance your language and cultural fluency . Kubernetes experience is a plus) Cloud: AWS (required) – practical experience with core services (EC2, ECS/EKS, RDS, S3, IAM, CloudWatch, etc.) Strong problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills Working proficiency in English (Japanese is a plus for Japan-related projects) Nice-to-Have Experience with high-throughput, distributed systems Frontend knowledge (React / Vue / Angular) to enable full-stack collaboration Experience in AWS security design, performance tuning, and cost optimization Experience working in multicultural environments, especially Japan–Vietnam teams Why You'll Love Working Here What we offer: Benefit: At least 15 AL days /year (including 3 days for summer) +1 day AL for every work anniversary (maximum 5 days) Full salary insurance coverage with Private health insurance package Allowed flexible working hours with Flexible day-off request Salary review TWICE a year Equipment provided includes Macbook and widescreen monitor 13-month bonus + Tet bonus Annual heath check at D.Y.M Center Transportation fee per month Culture: Welcome gift with giftee T-shirt & stickers Ergonomic chairs applied to all employees Flexible working areas between office area & playing area Access to PS games/ board game during leisure time, free snack / tea/ coffee Oversea company trip / Monthly Company e-Gift / Birthday Gifts Monthly lunch / dinner / team gathering Development & Career Growth: Dev Training Benefit: AWS Sandbox environment for individual Company-sponsored professional training courses Opportunity to greatly improve English skills from joining weekly English classes & Japanese classes Dev-sponsored AI systems while working

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Lương thưởng, phúc lợi tốt Môi trường làm việc thoải mái Đánh giá tăng lương 1 lần/năm The Job Được thành lập từ 2008, VNPT EPAY được biết tới như một một đối tác uy tín, tin cậy với hơn 13 năm kinh nghiệm triển khai dịch vụ vụ viễn thông (Topup), cung cấp giải pháp thanh toán điện tử áp dụng công nghệ tiên tiến nhất. Năm 2017, VNPT EPAY được đầu tư nguồn vốn từ Hàn Quốc (70%) và được quản lý bởi tập đoàn UTC Investment với mục tiêu cung cấp dịch vụ trung gian thanh toán, ứng dụng công nghệ hiện đại nhất nhằm đáp ứng thị trường đang thay đổi không ngừng của Việt Nam. Với sứ mệnh tiên phong, VNPT EPAY đang ứng dụng công nghệ và dịch vụ trung gian thanh toán của Hàn Quốc ngày càng sâu rộng hơn tại thị trường Việt Nam. Các dịch vụ trung gian thanh toán tiêu biểu mà VNPT EPAY đang cung cấp tại thị trường Việt Nam gồm có: Dịch vụ Cổng thanh toán MegaPay tích hợp tất cả các phương thức thanh toán trực tiếp chính tại Việt Nam hiện nay, mức phí cạnh tranh và đa dạng các kênh thanh toán, quy trình kết nối và triển khai đơn giản; Dịch vụ thu chi hộ tiền mặt; Dịch vụ hệ thống mã nộp tiền (Deposit Code) và dịch vụ chi tiền nhanh liên ngân hàng (Firm Banking); Để đảm bảo kế hoạch phát triển 2026, VNPT EPAY đang tích cực tìm kiếm ứng viên cho vị trí PHP Developer với nhiệm vụ xây dựng và phát triển các tính năng cho dịch vụ của công ty với công việc và yêu cầu cụ thể như sau: CÔNG VIỆC Tham gia phát triển một trong các dịch vụ hiện tại của công ty như: Dịch vụ chi tiền liên ngân hàng Firm Banking, dịch vụ Cổng thanh toán hoặc dịch vụ Ví điện tử doanh nghiệp; Đóng góp ý kiến và xây dựng các tính năng vận hành hệ thống tự động giúp nâng cao chất lượng công việc; Xây dựng kế hoạch công việc, báo cáo công việc hàng ngày với Team Leader; Thực hiện các công việc khác liên quan khi được giao. Your Skills and Experience YÊU CẦU Có kinh nghiệm từ 2-3 năm cho vị trí PHP Developer ; Thành thạo ngôn ngữ lập trình PHP, framework Laravel hoặc Codeigniter; Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với Database Oracle là một lợi thế; Thành thạo công cụ quản lý source code Git; Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng Linux là một lợi thế; Cẩn thận, trung thực, trách nhiệm và làm việc có kế hoạch; Vui vẻ, hòa đồng, nhiệt tình; Đam mê với lập trình và ham học hỏi; Mong muốn được làm việc về Product với các sản phẩm về Trung gian thanh toán là một lợi thế. Why You'll Love Working Here QUYỀN LỢI Thu nhập từ 20-40 triệu/tháng; Lương tháng 13 và các khoản thưởng quý, thưởng dự án, thưởng định kỳ, thưởng lễ, Tết; Đánh giá tăng lương 1 lần/năm; Được hưởng các khoản phụ cấp ăn trưa, điện thoại, đi lại, công tác… theo yêu cầu công việc; Được hưởng chế độ bảo hiểm theo quy định nhà nước; Được mua bảo hiểm sức khỏe và chế độ khám sức khỏe chuyên sâu định kỳ 1 lần/năm; Được tham gia các hoạt động của công ty: Xem phim, teambuilding, company trip với chất lượng 5 sao và các hoạt động thể thao văn nghệ gắn kết khác của công ty; Được làm việc trong môi trường chuyên nghiệp, trẻ trung, năng động và cởi mở đồng thời các thành viên gắn kết như một gia đình. ĐỊA ĐIỂM VÀ THỜI GIAN Thời gian làm việc: 8:30 - 17:30, nghỉ trưa từ 12:00 - 13:00; Địa điểm làm việc: Tầng 14 Tòa nhà Handico, Đường Phạm Hùng, phường Từ Liêm, Hà Nội;

job_title: Senior PHP Software Engineer SaaS product
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us No English/Japanese Required 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x AI Tech The Job 🚀 3 Lý do bạn không thể bỏ lỡ Rakus Vietnam 1. Không rào cản ngôn ngữ (No English/Japanese Required) Tại Rakus, "Code" là ngôn ngữ duy nhất. Chúng tôi không yêu cầu kỹ năng tiếng Anh hay tiếng Nhật. Bạn chỉ cần tập trung vào chuyên môn kỹ thuật. Mọi rào cản ngôn ngữ đã có đội ngũ Comtor hỗ trợ. 2. 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm Chúng tôi trân trọng thời gian bạn dành cho gia đình. Ngoài kỳ nghỉ Tết Âm lịch, công ty chủ động thiết lập các kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt vào dịp Golden Week (tháng 4-5) và Năm mới Dương lịch (tháng 12-1). Mỗi dịp này bạn sẽ được nghỉ liên tục 9 ngày. Bạn có thể thoải mái du lịch hay về quê mà không cần dùng đến phép năm! Tổng số ngày nghỉ lễ trong năm lên đến hơn 30 ngày. 3. Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x Công nghệ AI (Github Copilot, v.v.) Chúng tôi phát triển sản phẩm SaaS ổn định được hơn 10.000 doanh nghiệp Nhật Bản tin dùng, nhưng quy trình làm việc luôn được cập nhật mới nhất. Cấp tài khoản GitHub Copilot bản quyền cho toàn bộ kỹ sư. Cấp tài khoản Devin, Claude Code cho những ai có nhu cầu. Bạn sẽ phát triển thành một "Hybrid Engineer" – vừa có nền tảng Backend vững chắc, vừa thành thạo các công cụ AI hiện đại. ** Rakus Việt Nam là công ty 100% vốn đầu tư từ RAKUS Co., Ltd. - công ty nổi tiếng hàng đầu tại Nhật Bản cung cấp các dịch vụ đám mây (SaaS), giúp các doanh nghiệp điều hành hoạt động của mình một cách nhanh chóng, tiện dụng nhất. **Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng 2 vị trí Senior PHP Software Engineer: LÀM VIỆC OFFLINE FULLTIME TẠI CHI NHÁNH QUẬN PHÚ NHUẬN - Domain 1: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý email: Project lớn, được sử dụng bởi hơn 8,000 Doanh nghiệp tại Nhật Bản, doanh thu tăng trưởng ổn định. Team size khoảng 15 người. Specification yêu cầu chất lượng cao. - Domain 2: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý chấm công: Project mới, Specification yêu cầu chất lượng cao, là một Dịch vụ Web được xây dựng để vận hành trên nền tảng Amazon Web Services (AWS). Nếu: ・Bạn muốn tham gia phát triển một dự án mới có độ khó cao về nghiệp vụ, hệ thống lớn. ・Bạn có định hướng thăng tiến lên Principal Software Engineer/Technical Leader. ・Bạn mong muốn môi trường làm việc lâu dài (ít nhất 3 năm trở lên) ・Bạn có năng lực tập trung và thích tìm hiểu sâu về 1 hệ thống. Hãy gia nhập đội ngũ phát triển series sản phẩm "Rakuraku" – SaaS chiếm thị phần số 1 tại Nhật Bản. Phát triển: Thiết kế, triển khai và kiểm thử các tính năng mới sử dụng PHP thuần (Pure PHP). Quy trình AI: Tận dụng các công cụ AI mới nhất để tăng tốc độ coding, refactoring và tự động hóa kiểm thử (test automation). Tư duy sản phẩm: Tập trung vào chất lượng code (Quality) và khả năng bảo trì dài hạn (Maintainability). Your Skills and Experience Yêu cầu cơ bản: Có từ 5 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên làm việc với PHP trong các dự án phát triển web application (Development, Refactoring, Unit Test) . Có kinh nghiệm với 1 (hoặc nhiều) trong các framework của PHP như: Laravel, CakePHP, Zend, CodeIgniter, Yii 2 Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc với VueJS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript Có kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt với Team và khách hàng. Có kỹ năng làm việc nhóm tốt Có khả năng đọc, hiểu và phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ phía khách hàng Có khả năng tạo/trình bày tài liệu kĩ thuật dễ hiểu và chia sẻ kiến thức với đồng nghiệp Có khả năng phát hiện và giải quyết vấn đề tốt Có khả năng research tốt. Ưu tiên: Đã từng sử dụng Figma, PHPStorm, GitHub Sử dụng hiệu quả các công cụ AI như Github copilot, Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT,... Đọc hiểu tài liệu bằng tiếng Anh tốt Hiểu quy trình và phong cách làm việc tại công ty Nhật là một lợi thế. Lưu ý: Không tuyển ứng viên nước ngoài. Why You'll Love Working Here Tại sao Rakus được yêu thích? Không chỉ là lương thưởng, chúng tôi chăm sóc cuộc sống và gia đình bạn theo phong cách Nhật Bản: "Tận tâm và An tâm". 💰 Tài chính vững mạnh (Solid Finance) Chắc chắn "14 tháng lương": Bao gồm lương tháng 13 + 1 tháng thưởng cố định (được nhận bất kể KPI). Tài chính gia đình bạn luôn được đảm bảo. Xét tăng lương: 2 lần/năm. Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, cấp trên sẽ hỗ trợ bạn thăng cấp để đạt mức lương cao hơn. Công ty đóng BHXH ở mức 100% lương gross. 100 % lương trong thời gian thử việc. 🛡️ Sức khỏe & Gia đình (Health & Family Care) Bảo hiểm đặc biệt: Chi phí y tế của bạn được chi trả phần lớn bởi gói bảo hiểm cao cấp do công ty đài thọ. Hỗ trợ người thân: Hỗ trợ thủ tục để vợ/chồng và con cái tham gia gói bảo hiểm nhóm của công ty (tự nguyện). Nghỉ phép siêu linh hoạt: 12 ngày phép năm có thể chia nhỏ để nghỉ theo "đơn vị 30 phút". "Sáng đưa con đi học" , "Chiều về sớm đón con" , "Đưa người nhà đi khám bệnh" ... Tất cả đều OK! Chúng tôi ủng hộ tuyệt đối việc bạn chăm sóc gia đình. Khám sức khỏe định kỳ. 🎉 Niềm vui & Kết nối (Community) Du lịch 5 sao: Company Trip hàng năm (3 ngày 2 đêm) tại các resort cao cấp. Tài trợ 50% chi phí tour cho gia đình nhân viên. Sự kiện liên tục: Tiệc sinh nhật hàng tháng, Year End Party hoành tráng, Lì xì Tết, quà tặng Trung thu, ngày phụ nữ, ngày nam nhân, Giáng sinh, ... Ngân sách team: Cấp 170.000 VND/người/tháng cho team building (ăn uống, cafe, picnic cùng đồng nghiệp). Tham gia các CLB thể thao (Futsal, cầu lông) ⏰ Thời giờ làm việc, nghỉ ngơi Thứ 2~ thứ 6, từ 8:30~ 17:30 12 ngày phép năm + 11 ngày nghỉ lễ lịch VN + 7 ngày nghỉ lễ lịch Nhật = 30 ngày Hầu như Không làm thêm giờ (No Overtime) 📝 Đào tạo Cơ hội được cử đi Nhật đào tạo. Các kỹ sư người Nhật hỗ trợ OJT (on the job training) Training kỹ năng mềm theo level Seminar kỹ thuật hàng tháng 🏆 Giải thưởng MVP of the Year – Nhân viên xuất sắc mỗi năm được trải nghiệm và làm việc tại Nhật 1 tuần. Quarterly MVP – Giải thưởng Nhân viên xuất sắc của Quý Giải thưởng nhân viên 5 năm, …

job_title: Senior PHP Fullstack Engineer Typescript, English
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary package and valuable benefits Get the opportunity to access global L&D programs Hybrid and flexible working environment The Job HRS, a pioneer in business travel, aims to elevate every stay through innovative technology. With over 50 years of experience, their digital platform, driven by ProcureTech, TravelTech, and FinTech, transforms how companies and travelers Stay, Work, and Pay. ProcureTech digitally revolutionizes lodging procurement, connecting corporations and suppliers in a cutting-edge ecosystem. This enables seamless efficiency and automation, surpassing travelers' expectations. TravelTech redefines the online lodging experience, offering personalized content from selection to check-in, ensuring an unparalleled journey for corporate travelers. In FinTech, HRS introduces advancements like mobile banking and digital payments, turning corporate back offices into touchless lodging enablers, eliminating legacy cost barriers. The innovative 2-click book-to-pay feature streamlines interactions for travelers and hoteliers. Combining these technology propositions, HRS unlocks exponential catalyst effects. Their data-driven focus delivers value-added services and high-return network effects, creating substantial customer value. HRS's exponential growth since 1972 serves over 35% of the global Fortune 500 and leading hotel chains. Join HRS to shape the future of business travel, empowered by a culture of growth and setting new industry standards worldwide. BUSINESS UNIT At Destination Solutions we believe there’s a smarter way for hosts, property managers and DMOs to maximize the performance of their rentals. So, as a travel tech company, we’ve created an end-to-end holiday rental platform. We’re the leading aggregator in the DACH region. We bring properties online and distribute them on our unrivalled marketplace with over 600 channels, from big OTAs to smaller regional partners, we’ve got them all covered. We offer a full-service with an intuitive suite of next generation solutions, with everything from property management, payment solutions to channel management, revenue optimization, and handling of guest relationships. It’s how we’re shaping holiday rentals - through our platform, our people and our partnership approach. Destination Solutions is part of the globally acting HRS Group. HRS is reinventing the way businesses and governments work, stay and pay in today’s dynamic global marketplace. HRS’ advanced platform technology is extending its reach beyond hospitality to meetings, office space management, payment efficiency and crisis recovery. POSITION We are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer (all genders) for a development team in our Ho Chi Minh City office. The successful candidate will have a strong understanding of modern SaaS platform architectures and online booking systems, ideally with experience in the travel, tourism, or e-commerce industry. In this role, you will be responsible for driving the technical implementation of new features, improving performance and reliability, and ensuring a high-quality user experience for our end customers. The team focuses primarily on our B2C Internet Booking Engine (IBE) and our "Agency Console" – an extended booking solution used by travel agencies and local tourism offices as a powerful front-desk and sales tool for searching, booking, and managing offers. Together with your team in Vietnam you will contribute to the evolution of modern, scalable products that support our growing B2C and agency-focused portfolio. You will work closely with engineering teams and project leadership in Europe, ensure high code quality and clean implementation of requirements, and help establish best practices within the local team in Ho Chi Minh City. CHALLENGE Full-Stack Development: Develop and extend our Agency Console using PHP and our IBE using TypeScript. · Product Evolution: Further enhance our existing booking products built with PHP/Symfony and Node.js/TypeScript · Performance Optimization: Continuously improve application performance, scalability, and reliability. · Integration: Design and implement interfaces and APIs connecting the IBE and Agency Console with other DS products. · Cross-Project Support: Collaborate with other development teams and contribute your expertise to shared initiatives or cross-functional projects when needed. · Team Leadership: Guide the development team based in our Vietnam office and serve as the key technical counterpart for our B2C team in Germany. · Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Product Management, Tech Support, and other development teams to deliver improvements that meet customer needs. · Modernization: Keep our products aligned with current standards, technologies, and modern API practices. · Risk & Dependency Management: Identify potential risks and dependencies early in the development process and collaborate with stakeholders to mitigate them proactively. · Monitoring & Metrics: Track and optimize performance and reliability using modern observability tools Your Skills and Experience FOR THIS EXCITING MISSION YOU ARE EQUIPPED WITH... Professional Experience: At least 5 years of hands-on experience in software development. · Backend Expertise: Strong knowledge of PHP and the Symfony framework, experience with TypeScript/Next.js · Frontend Skills: Solid understanding of HTML/CSS and React · Database Know-how: Practical experience with relational databases like MySQL. · Cloud Experience: Familiarity with AWS and serverless architectures is an advantage. · AI & Tooling: Interest or experience in AI-assisted development and modern developer tooling. · Agile Mindset: Basic understanding of Scrum or other Agile methodologies. · Collaboration: Strong communication skills and a proactive, team-oriented attitude. · Ownership: High sense of responsibility, structured approach, and focus on results. · Languages: Proficient in English Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive Pay: Attractive salary package with a 13th-month bonus and Reward bonus Hybrid Working Model: Embrace flexibility of working from both home and office that supports better work-life balance and boosts productivity Recognition That Matters: We celebrate your milestones with meaningful rewards and long-term commitment opportunities (after 2 years, 5 years, 10 years, etc. of service) Comprehensive Benefits: Private health insurance for you and family member, plus full statutory coverage (social, health, unemployment) Time to Recharge: 18 days of paid leave per year, including sick days Continuous Growth: Dedicated learning budget, access to Udemy, English classes, mentoring, and global workshop/business forum opportunities Support for Your Day-to-Day: Meal and parking allowances to keep life simple Culture That Empowers: Company trips, year-end celebrations, structured quarterly team bonding, culture activities for x-team collaboration - because strong teams drive meaningful outcomes Refer and Earn: Generous referral bonus for every successful hire you bring in Location: Anna Building, District 12 or LIM Tower 3, District 1, HCM City

Đánh giá bảo mật (Security Assessment) • Thực hiện quét lỗ hổng định kỳ bằng các công cụ như InsightVM, Nessus, SonarQube. • Phân tích kết quả, đánh giá mức độ rủi ro và đề xuất phương án khắc phục. Tuân thủ & Chính sách (Compliance) • Rà soát và kiểm tra việc tuân thủ các chính sách ATTT. • Đảm bảo hệ thống phù hợp với tiêu chuẩn ISO 27001 và quy định pháp luật Kiểm soát ATTT người dùng cuối • Đôn đốc, kiểm tra việc tuân thủ ATTT của người dùng nội bộ. • Quản lý và vận hành các giải pháp bảo mật endpoint (Kaspersky, WSUS Server, AD). job_title: Engineering Manager HRM, SaaS, Golang, Microservices
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us An inspiring work environment. Annual salary reviews and adjustments. Company activities and parties. The Job About the Role As an Engineering Manager , you will lead the evolution of our enterprise HCM platform . You are not just a delivery lead; you are a technical strategist and a talent multiplier. You will lead a mission-critical, cross-functional team of Full-stack (Golang/React) and DevOps/SRE engineers. Your mission is to balance rapid feature velocity with the rigorous reliability and security standards required of enterprise-scale SaaS . Responsibilities Strategic Leadership : Partner with Product, Design, and Executive stakeholders to co-author the product vision. Translate business objectives into a multi-year technical roadmap. Organizational Excellence : Build and scale a high-bandwidth team. Drive talent density through intentional mentorship, and clear performance management. Technical Oversight : Lead high-level system design and architectural reviews, prioritizing modularity, performance, and long-term maintainability. Platform Ownership : Drive the operational roadmap to ensure 99.9% availability. Establish SLO/SLI benchmarks, lead a Zero-Trust security posture, and foster a high-accountability culture that treats operational debt with the same urgency as product features. Drive engineering best practices and developer productivity : code quality gates, observability, IaC, and documentation standards Act as primary liaison with international partners and represent engineering in cross-functional forums Your Skills and Experience Requirements 7+ years in software engineering including 2–3 years in an engineering management or head-of-engineering role Hands-on background in Golang/SQL/MS Stored Procedure or similar backend tech; fluent in modern fullstack concepts Proven ability to manage " system-of-systems " complexity, including microservices orchestration and global data residency requirements. Exceptional ability to manage through ambiguity, resolve complex cross-functional conflicts, and influence without authority. Strong command of Agile delivery and experience running multi-squad engineering teams Track record of hiring, mentoring, and retaining senior engineers Excellent communication skills in English at executive stakeholder level Data-informed decision-maker comfortable with OKRs, metrics, and engineering scorecards Solid HR / enterprise SaaS domain understanding is a strong advantage Technology Landscape Fullstack : Golang, ReactJS, Flutter, Microservices, REST APIs Database : MariaDB, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, SQL/Stored Procedure DevOps / SRE : Kubernetes, Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, ArgoCD, GitOps, Blue/Green deploys Why You'll Love Working Here An inspiring work environment! job_title: Senior Fullstack Developer Golang, ReactJS, HRMS
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us An inspiring work environment. Annual salary reviews and adjustments. Company activities and parties. The Job Job Description Our HCM is an enterprise HR platform currently in active operation and continuous expansion. The system covers Core HR, Attendance, Payroll, Advance HR, Employee Self-Service (ESS), HR Development, Workflow Automation, System Integrations, and Custom Modules for Enterprise Clients. We are expanding the development team to build new features while maintaining and enhancing existing modules, working closely with both local and international teams. You will be responsible for building high-performance services in Go , stuning frontend and UX/UI in React with TypeScript , maintaining and modernizing core logic in C#/.NET and SQL. As a key member of a polyglot environment, you will bridge the gap between our high-concurrency modern microservices and our robust foundation backend, ensuring a seamless experience for our users. Key Responsibilities Develop new features and enhance existing functionalities across Core HR, Attendance, Payroll, Advance HR, Employee Self-Service (ESS), HR Development, Workflow Automation, System Integrations Maintain and refactor existing code to improve performance, scalability, and maintainability Frontend Excellence : Design and implement scalable, reusable components using React and TypeScript, ensuring strict type safety and optimal bundle performance. High-Performance Backend : Develop and maintain mission-critical microservices using Go, focusing on high concurrency, low latency, and clean API design (REST/gRPC). Backend foundation transformation (optional): Support and refactor existing business logic within our C#/.NET ecosystem, transitioning legacy services toward modern architectures where necessary. Database Design: Write complex, optimized SQL queries and manage schema migrations. You should understand indexing, execution plans, and how to resolve locking issues. System Ownership : Take end-to-end ownership of features—from database schema design to frontend deployment and observability (monitoring/logging). Participate in technical design and solution discussions Work closely with Business Analysts to clarify requirements and ensure correct implementation Perform code reviews and contribute to code quality standards Write unit tests and ensure sufficient test coverage Investigate and fix production issues when required Your Skills and Experience Technical Stack Backend: Golang RESTful APIs Microservices architecture Cloud Database: MariaDB Schema design and complex SQL queries Frontend: React (Web) Flutter (Mobile) is a plus Why You'll Love Working Here An inspiring work environment! job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are seeking a Principal Architect to define and own the architecture of our Unified Edge AI Engine . In this role, you will design the software backbone that orchestrates the entire lifecycle of video analytics on embedded hardware. You will act as the bridge between Systems Engineering and AI Research. Your mission is to build a modular, graph-based execution engine that balances massive data throughput with limited compute resources, enabling advanced AI models (optimized via quantization/pruning) to run in real-time across diverse hardware platforms. Scope of Responsibilities/Expectations: Pipeline Engine Architecture: Architect a modular, high-throughput Video & AI Pipeline Engine. Design the framework for dynamic graph construction (DAG) where AI models, logic nodes, and image processing blocks can be assembled and executed efficiently. Heterogeneous Resource Orchestration: Design the scheduling logic to balance workloads across CPU, GPU, DSP, and NPU. manage critical system bottlenecks such as PCIe Bandwidth, Memory Bandwidth, and Thermal constraints to prevent system stalls. AI Optimization Strategy: Define the architectural support for Model Quantization (INT8/FP16) and Network Pruning. Ensure the engine can natively handle optimized model formats, managing the trade-off between inference speed, memory footprint, and accuracy. Memory & Data Flow Design: Architect zero-copy data transport mechanisms (DMA, Shared Memory, Ring Buffers) to pass high-resolution video frames and tensor data between pipeline stages without CPU intervention. Scalability & Abstraction: Create a hardware-agnostic Abstraction Layer (HAL) that allows the engine to scale from low-power cameras to high-performance AI processors with minimal code changes. Your Skills and Experience System Architecture: Mastery of Modern C++ (14/17/20) and architectural patterns for high-concurrency, real-time systems. Deep understanding of Producer-Consumer models, Lock-free queues, and multi-threaded synchronization. AI Model Optimization: Strong knowledge of techniques to reduce model complexity : Quantization (PTQ/QAT), Weight Pruning, and Knowledge Distillation. Experience integrating these optimized models into C++ runtimes (e.g., TensorRT, SNPE/QNN, OpenVINO). Hardware Intimacy: Deep understanding of SoC architectures (Qualcomm, Ambarella, NVIDIA). Ability to analyze how Cache Coherency, Bus Arbitration, and Memory Controllers impact AI performance. Profiling & Analysis: Expert ability to use system profilers (e.g., Perf, eBPF, Nsight Systems) to visualize the "Critical Path" of the pipeline and optimize instruction-level performance. Pipeline Frameworks: Experience designing or heavily customizing media pipelines (similar to GStreamer, MediaPipe, or DeepStream). Basic Qualifications Bachelor’s Degree or higher in Embedded AI, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related technical fields. 10+ years of industry experience in Embedded Software Architecture or High-Performance Computing. Proven track record of designing complex software engines for Video Processing, Computer Vision, or Autonomous Systems. Experience acting as a System Architect, making critical decisions on resource allocation, memory management, and hardware selection. Why You'll Love Working Here Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service … Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination Award for marriage, newborn We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,... Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề và gỡ lỗi tốt, có khả năng xác định và xử lý hiệu quả các lỗi phía giao diện. Ưu tiên: Ứng viên có hiểu biết cơ bản về BE (Golang, Python,...) Các ứng viên có kinh nghiệm làm việc với domain viễn thông, Financial services, AI Kỹ năng mềm: Tỉ mỉ, chú trọng chi tiết trong công việc. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Dynamic working environment Hands-on mentorship, training and support Contribute directly to the company’s rapid growth The Job Company Introduction Timebeat.app is a global technology company headquartered in London, UK, specialising in ultra-precise (nanosecond-level) time synchronisation solutions for 5G telecommunications, financial systems, and data centres. As we continue to expand our operations in Vietnam, we are looking for talented individuals to join our growing team and support the delivery of cutting-edge products and digital experiences. Role Overview We are seeking a full-time Web Developer with strong hands-on experience in Wix and Shopify to join our Ho Chi Minh City office. In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining and enhancing our company website and e-commerce store. You will work closely with the Head of Brand & Marketing to implement content updates, support digital campaigns, and continuously improve user experience and conversion performance. You will also be expected to leverage modern AI tools (such as Claude or similar) to accelerate development workflows, generate solutions, and improve efficiency across web, content, and optimisation tasks. Key Responsibilities Manage, maintain, and optimise our Wix website and Shopify store Implement content updates, landing pages, and campaign assets Improve website performance, responsiveness, and user experience Support SEO optimisation, analytics tracking, and conversion improvements Troubleshoot website issues and ensure smooth day-to-day operation Collaborate with marketing and design teams on new initiatives Leverage AI tools (e.g. Claude) to assist with coding, content generation, debugging, and workflow automation Your Skills and Experience Required Skills & Experience Strong proficiency in English (written and spoken) Proven hands-on experience with Wix and Shopify Solid understanding of HTML, CSS , and modern web tools Familiarity with SEO, Google Analytics, and conversion tracking High attention to detail, organisation, and consistency Experience working cross-functionally with marketing or creative teams Comfortable using AI tools (e.g. Claude or similar) to support development, problem-solving, and productivity Nice to Have (Bonus Skills) Experience with Figma, Canva, or Adobe Creative Suite Familiarity with email marketing tools (e.g. Klaviyo, Mailchimp) Basic understanding of UX/UI principles and A/B testing Exposure to tech, fintech, or SaaS environments Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive Salary: Starting from 17,000,000 VND (gross), negotiable based on experience Career Development: Regular performance reviews and salary progression Benefits: 12 days annual leave plus full public holidays in line with Vietnamese labour law Impactful Work: Be part of a company building cutting-edge infrastructure technology Fast-Paced Environment: Join a high-growth startup with real ownership and responsibility Learning & Growth: Work closely with experienced team members across engineering and marketing Global Exposure: Collaborate with international teams and contribute to global expansion At Timebeat, we believe great companies are built by great people. If you’re passionate about building high-quality digital experiences and want to grow in a dynamic environment, we’d love to hear from you.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Làm việc với các công nghệ mới nhất Lĩnh vực chứng khoán, tài chính hấp dẫn Liên tục được đào tạo chuyên môn, kĩ năng The Job Lập trình các tính năng trên nền tảng Web (ReactJS), đảm bảo độ chính xác tuyệt đối theo thiết kế Figma và các nghiệp vụ chứng khoán phức tạp (đặt lệnh, quản lý danh mục, bảng giá). Tham gia duy trì và hiện đại hóa các dự án ReactJS hiện có; đọc hiểu nhanh source code phức tạp để tối ưu hoặc chuyển đổi công nghệ. Xây dựng Base Code & Kiến trúc: Trực tiếp phân tích yêu cầu từ phía Business, thiết kế kiếntrúc Frontend (Micro-frontends hoặc Monorepo) để dễ dàng mở rộng và phối hợp team đông người. Tối ưu Performance: Profiling và giải quyết các bài toán thắt nút cổ chai. Xử lý triệt để việc re-render thừa, đảm bảo bảng giá cập nhật real-time mượt mà (60 FPS), xử lý hàng ngàn bản ghi dữ liệu mà không gây lag trình duyệt. Giám sát Hệ thống (Monitoring) & Xử lý sự cố. Thiết lập và quản lý hệ thống giám sát lỗi tập trung (DevTools, Sentry, LogRocket, Datadog...) để phát hiện sớm các lỗi xảy ra trên trình duyệt của khách hàng. Chủ động theo dõi log, phân tích tỉ lệ lỗi và đưa ra phương án xử lý (Hotfix) thần tốc, đặc biệt là trong giờ giao dịch cao điểm. Ứng dụng AI & Giao tiếp (Communication). Sử dụng thành thạo các AI Agent (Antigravity, Cursor, Copilot, Claude...) để tăng tốc độ viết code, Unit Test và tối ưu hóa logic nghiệp vụ. Đóng vai trò "phiên dịch viên" kỹ thuật: Giải thích các rào cản công nghệ cho bộ phận nghiệp vụ (BA/PO) và đề xuất giải pháp thay thế hiệu quả. Giao tiếp kỹ thuật trực tiếp với khách hàng để làm rõ các vấn đề liên quan đến kỹ thuật. Your Skills and Experience Kiến thức & Kỹ năng bắt buộc (Must-have): Tốt nghiệp chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc liên quan. Có ít nhất 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình ReactJS. Nắm vững kiến trúc React: Virtual DOM, Fiber Engine, Reconciliation, và Hooks API. Kinh nghiệm thực chiến với State Management: Redux-Saga, Redux Toolkit, Zustand hoặc TanStack Query (React Query). Thành thạo xử lý dữ liệu thời gian thực với WebSockets (Socket.io) hoặc Server-Sent Events (SSE). Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các thư viện biểu đồ tài chính (Highcharts, Lightweight Charts, TradingView Charting Library). Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các css (style-component, tailwind,...) Kinh nghiệm làm việc trơn tru với các bản thiết kế từ Figma. Sử dụng thành thạo Git (GitHub/GitLab) và quy trình Git Flow. Kỹ năng Nâng cao: Kỹ năng AI, có tư duy sử dụng Prompt Engineering để giải quyết các bài toán thuật toán khó hoặc refactor code cũ. Tư duy sản phẩm: Hiểu biết về thị trường chứng khoán (Lệnh LO/MP/FS, nến Nhật, chỉ số kỹ thuật) là một lợi thế cực lớn. Khả năng Mentor, Review code và thiết kế quy trình CI/CD cho Frontend. Điểm cộng: Sẵn sàng nghiên cứu các giải pháp WebAssembly cho các tính toán tài chính cực nặng. Có khả năng làm thêm mảng Mobile (Flutter). Có thể đọc hiểu hoặc code được Backend bằng Java (Spring Boot / Java Core) để dễ dàng phối hợp xử lý luồng API với đội Backend. Why You'll Love Working Here Cơ hội phát triển Được làm việc với các chuyên gia công nghệ với trên 15 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực tài chính, fintech Số lượng giải pháp và các sản phẩm rất nhiều với nhiều thử thách đa dạng, giúp phát triển nghề nghiệp. Luôn được tiếp cận công nghệ mới nhất, tối ưu hóa năng lực sản xuất phần mềm Quy trình phát triển DevOps, tự động hóa nhiều trong quy trình Giải pháp tổng thể từ Front Office (iOS, Android, Flutter, ReactJS, .NET) – Middleware – Back Office với nhiều công nghệ chuyên sâu J2EE, Sping Framework, jBase, Nodejs, Apache Kafka, Apache Spark, Apache Flink, Hadoop, ElasticSearch, Oracle Database, SQL Server, Memory Database, Caching…được triển khai tại nhiều tổ chức tài chính, chứng khoán hàng đầu thế giới Được tham gia vào các dự án phần mềm, các mô hình phát triển ứng dụng cao cấp với các đối tác hàng đầu Nhật Bản: các ứng dụng trong lĩnh vực tài chính, fintech Được tiếp cận và đào tạo theo quy trình quản lý dự án phần mềm chuyên nghiệp theo chuẩn Nhật Bản như ISO 9001:2013, ISMS ISO 27001:2013 Chế độ đãi ngộ Lương cứng + Lương tháng thứ 13 + thưởng các dịp lễ, tết + lương hiệu quả kinh doanh; Có chế độ riêng cho các leader ở các cấp khác nhau Hưởng bảo hiểm xã hội, bảo hiểm y tế theo chế độ nhà nước ban hành. Thưởng dự án, review kết quả công việc 6 tháng một lần. Tuần làm việc 5 ngày, nghỉ thứ bảy, chủ nhật và các ngày lễ tết. Làm thêm ngoài giờ được tính tiền làm thêm = 150% ngày bình thường. Khám tổng thể sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm tại các bệnh viện quốc tế Du lịch 1 năm tối thiểu 1 lần, tháng tháng/quý có các hoạt động ngoại khóa, team building Được đào tạo hàng tuần về chuyên môn kĩ thuật, nghiệp vụ và các chương trình đào tạo kĩ năng mềm khác như quản lý dự án, quản lý cảm xúc, não bộ, sức khỏe, giải tỏa stress, thiền cho kĩ sư… Văn hóa Môi trường Fintech chuyên sâu , nơi công nghệ và tài chính hội tụ. Cơ hội trực tiếp ứng dụng AI vào quy trình phát triển phần mềm. Quản lý chuyên nghiệp, thưởng theo dự án, đánh giá định lượng Làm việc với quy trình tinh gọn , khuyến khích sáng tạo, học hỏi và nghiên cứu. Lộ trình phát triển rõ ràng hướng tới Tech Lead / Solution Architect . Văn hóa tôn trọng cá nhân, đề cao hiệu quả thực tế và tinh thần đổi mới .

company_name: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members 16++ days of paid leave per year The Job Company Description The Bosch Group is a leading global supplier of technology and services. Since the beginning of 2013, its operations have been divided into four business sectors: Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology. The Bosch Group comprises Robert Bosch GmbH and its roughly 360 subsidiaries and regional companies in some 50 countries. If its sales and service partners are included, then Bosch is represented in roughly 150 countries. This worldwide development, manufacturing, and sales network is the foundation for further growth. Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited (BGSV) i s 100% owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH - one of the world’s leading global suppliers of technology and services, offering end-to-end Engineering, IT, and Business Solutions. Starting its operation from 2010 at Etown 2 in HCMC, BGSV is the first software development center of Bosch in Southeast Asia. BGSV nowadays have over 4,000 associates, with a global footprint and presence in the US, Europe, and the Asia Pacific region. With our unique ability to offer end-to-end solutions that connect sensors, software, and services, we enable businesses to move from the traditional to digital or improve businesses by introducing a digital element in their products and processes. Job Description A Lead Front-End Developer for a global IT workflow product drives the user experience of complex, data-heavy systems. This role requires balancing hands-on technical excellence with the architectural foresight needed to scale products across international markets. You will lead the front-end strategy for a global IT workflow automation product, guiding architecture and delivery of intuitive, performant experiences for complex, data-heavy use cases. From drag-and-drop workflow builders and real-time dashboards to configuration wizards, you’ll set the technical direction, raise engineering standards, and ensure the UI is responsive, accessible, and reliable across regions and network conditions. Key Responsibilities · Technical strategy and architecture: Define the front-end architecture (React + TypeScript primary) including state management patterns, choosing frameworks and patterns that ensure scalability and maintainability. Drive API contract discipline with backend and define caching/streaming strategies for real-time data. · Design System Management: Own and scale the Bosch Digital Design System and component library, ensuring pixel-perfect consistency across all regions and product modules. You will ensure Bosch Corporate Design is applied correctly. · Workflow Automation UX: Design and implement intuitive interfaces for complex logic, such as drag-and-drop workflow builders, real-time data dashboards, and integration of wizards. · Design system leadership: Own and evolve the component library and design tokens (theming, dark/HC modes); govern adoption via Storybook, documentation, and CI gates (lint, a11y, visual regression). Ensure consistency and scalability across modules and international variants. · Global readiness (i18n, a11y, performance): Ensure high performance across varying network conditions and localized support for multiple languages and regional data standards. · Engineering excellence and security: Build a testing strategy and implement CI/CD quality gates, bundle analysis, and static checks. · Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with UX/UI designers to bridge the gap between high-fidelity designs and technical feasibility, and with backend teams to define robust API contracts. · Team Mentorship: Mentor engineers, lead code reviews, establish engineering standards and playbooks, and contribute to hiring and onboarding. Your Skills and Experience Must Have Education: Bachelor’s or master's degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field. Experience: 7+ years of professional front-end experience, including 3+ years leading teams or major initiatives on large-scale web apps. Core Languages: Expert in modern JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 (Sass/CSS Modules) and modern layout. Frameworks: Extensive experience with React, Angular, or Vue.js, including state management (e.g., Redux, MobX). React proficiency building reusable, stateful components and hooks; strong command of state management. Design system adoption across 2+ product modules with documented components and usage guidelines. Build & Deployment: Proficiency with Git-based workflows, and CI/CD (GitHub Actions/GitLab CI/Jenkins) with quality gates. Testing: Strong background in automated testing frameworks like Jest, Cypress, or Playwright. Deep understanding of Web Accessibility (WCAG) and SEO best practices. Localized experiences delivered in multiple languages, including at least one RTL locale. Security awareness (OWASP front-end risks, XSS/CSP, secure handling of untrusted content). Agile Mindset: Proven track record of delivering in fast-paced, sprint-based global environments. Global Mindset: Experience delivering software that accounts for regional cultural nuances and varied internet speeds. Nice to Have Workflow Expertise : Experience building tools for IT operations, project management, or SaaS automation is highly desirable. Project Management: Ability to manage timelines, define technical roadmaps, and communicate progress to senior stakeholders. Design token pipelines (Style Dictionary), Storybook, Chromatic/visual regression testing. Observability (Sentry, Datadog), feature flagging, A/B testing. Experience with distributed teams and varying network conditions across regions. Measurable improvements in Core Web Vitals and interaction latency on at least one high-traffic workflow. Why You'll Love Working Here Private Health Insurance (Generali) : Covered by company Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract) 12 days annual leave

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Compelling rewards, 13th-month salary Working 5 weekdays and Flexible working time International Teamwork opportunities The Job About Litmers “At Litmers, we partner with clients to help their business succeed through tailored IT consulting.” Litmers provides both custom IT consulting and no-code/code-based development solutions, serving a wide range of clients from early-stage startups to scaling companies. We help our clients bring products to market faster—without compromising on quality—through fast, cost-effective outsourced development. Since launching with a 4-person team in 2023, we've grown to over 50 members, completed 110+ projects, and achieved 78% year-over-year revenue growth. We are ranked 13th out of 368 global Bubble agencies and have achieved Gold Partner status, reflecting our executional excellence and technical strength. More than just a development agency, Litmers is a strategic partner that solves real business problems. With proven experience across manufacturing, finance, commerce, and startups, we help clients generate maximum business impact with minimal resources. Our full-time developers, trained in-house across Korea and Vietnam, lead projects with a focus on customer empathy, agility, and outcome-oriented thinking. Position Overview We’re seeking a talented React Native Frontend Developer to join our engineering team. In this role, you’ll work closely with designers, Bubble developers, and backend engineers to build scalable, high-performance cross-platform applications with React-based frameworks (React, React Native). This is a hands-on coding role with no managerial duties — focused purely on building great products with clean, maintainable code. Key Responsibilities Build and maintain high-quality mobile applications using React Native Translate design mockups into responsive and pixel-perfect interfaces Integrate frontend components with backend services and APIs Optimize app performance for iOS and Android platforms Write clean, reusable, and testable code that supports consistent UX Collaborate across teams to ensure smooth feature delivery Debug and resolve issues efficiently Participate in code reviews and contribute to frontend best practices Work with and improve existing React Native codebases, including stabilizing and enhancing location-based features Your Skills and Experience Requirements 4+ years of experience in React Native mobile app development Strong skills in TypeScript Experience with Expo, Firebase, and Native Modules Proven track record of deploying apps to iOS and Android Familiarity with React.js for cross-platform component sharing Solid understanding of API integration, app lifecycle, and performance tuning Familiarity with map integrations Proficiency with Git/GitHub or similar tools Knowledge of Agile workflows and modern frontend practices Comfortable communicating in English in a global team setting Optional / Nice to Have Experience implementing geolocation features (foreground & background tracking) in React Native applications Experience optimizing battery usage and performance in location-based applications Experience in diagnosing and resolving real-world mobile issues such as inconsistent location updates, background task interruptions, and OS-level restrictions Experience with automated testing (e.g., Jest, Detox) Experience with AI Agent for development(e.g. Claude Code, Codex, Skills, Subagents ...) Familiarity with App Store / Play Store release processes Hiring process Resume screening Phone screening, English interview Technical interview Cultural fit Final decision Application Timeline We review applications on a rolling basis and may close the position early if filled. Early submission is highly encouraged. Why You'll Love Working Here 13th-month salary: calculated as one month's actual basic salary if the employee works for 12 months of the calendar year. Annual Leaves : employee who has been working for 12 months or more is entitled to fully-paid annual leave with 12 days. Social Insurance, Medical Insurance, Unemployment Insurance: Yes Convenient shared office in Thao Dien, HCM Flexibility in commuting time (8:00~9:30 AM) Flexible working time with notice (ex. Visiting hospital, bank etc) Latest device support in any type (Mac, monitors etc) Working 5 weekdays (Mon-Fri) Work-related books and lectures supported External activities (Clubs)

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are looking for a talented and experienced Front-end Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in SAP UI5 (or modern frameworks like React, Angular, or Vue.js ) and be responsible for leading the development of high-quality user interfaces. As this role involves working directly with our global clients, the successful candidate must have strong English communication skills and be able to participate in a rotating shift schedule that includes US timezones . Responsibilities Architect & Develop: Lead the hands-on development of high-quality, scalable, and maintainable user interfaces, primarily using SAP UI5 . Technical Leadership: Drive front-end technical architecture, establish and champion best practices, and maintain high coding standards through code reviews and mentorship . Global Client Support: Provide direct technical support and communicate effectively with global clients in English, participating in a rotating shift schedule (including US-timezone night shifts ) to ensure uninterrupted service. Collaboration: Work closely with Product Managers, Business Analysts, and the Backend Team to translate product requirements and design mockups into fully-functioning features. Mentorship: Guide and mentor other developers, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous learning within the team. Problem Solving: Thrive in a dynamic environment, making quick and well-informed decisions to navigate tight schedules and technical challenges. End-to-End Ownership: Take ownership of the entire front-end development lifecycle, from initial concept and design collaboration to deployment and performance optimization. Your Skills and Experience Primary Skill: Extensive, hands-on experience as a Senior Developer using SAP UI5 . This must include building complex custom applications, extending standard Fiori apps, and a deep understanding of Fiori design principles to create responsive and accessible enterprise-grade layouts. Alternative Path: We strongly encourage applications from senior developers with deep expertise in modern frameworks ( React, Angular, or Vue.js ) who possess a strong passion and proven ability to quickly master new technologies like SAP UI5. Web Fundamentals: Proficiency in browser-based debugging and the use of tools for application performance testing and optimization. Development Ecosystem: Mastery of Git , familiarity with project management tools like Jira , and experience working with RESTful APIs . Design Collaboration: Experience translating designs from tools like Figma, PSD , etc., into pixel-perfect code. Language & Communication: Fluency in English (written and verbal) is required to effectively support and collaborate directly with international clients. Shift Flexibility: Willingness and flexibility to work rotating shifts, including night shifts . Personal Attributes: A fast learner who is detail-oriented and highly organized. Proven ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines in a fast-paced environment. A genuine passion for technology and for creating best-in-class user experiences. Why You'll Love Working Here 15 days of annual leaves Competitive salary (+13-month salary include) Health insurance, social insurance according to the government regulations PVI Healthcare Insurance Have a chance to work in an international, friendly, open environment Annual Travel opportunity

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary Fun, flexible and challenging work A purpose: improve the life of thousands of women The Job Our Mission ⭐️ Perifit is a profitable and fast-growing femtech startup based in Paris, France, with a software team based in Ho Chi Minh City. Turnover was multiplied by 100 in 5 years! Our goal is to assist women worldwide with the most challenging moments in their lives – moments that are heavily under-addressed – and provide fun and effective self-care solutions. Our first product, the Perifit (a connected probe and its mobile games), launched in 2018, has become the #1 connected solution for pelvic floor rehabilitation. As of now, it has helped more than 500,000 women and is the best-ranked app in its category. We now develop innovative pelvic floor trainers and breast pumps that use the most recent technologies to help women improve their lives. Our mission is to empower women to take control of their health and improve their overall well-being. At Perifit, we stand for equality, inclusivity, benevolence, and wellbeing for both our clients and our employees. Joining Perifit means being part of a dynamic, mission-driven team that is making a real difference in women's lives, and having the opportunity to contribute to a growing and innovative startup in the Femtech industry! We’re very proud of our values! FREEDOM – FEMINISM – STARTUP MINDSET – REAL IMPACT – NO EGO Why we need you 🚀 Our apps (Perifit Care and Perifit Pump) are technically ambitious: hybrid mobile applications that combine Bluetooth connectivity, game logic coded in Unity, and a React Native user interface, with a backend based on MySQL PHP. You will be the go-to technical reference for the apps, capable of understanding the big picture and going deep into specific parts when needed. App Deployment : Support app releases on iOS and Android stores, manage CI/CD pipelines, and ensure smooth updates. Cross-team Communication : Act as the bridge between engineering and product teams, translating technical challenges into clear explanations for stakeholders. Regulatory-readiness mindset : Work in coordination with QA/RA teams to ensure features are developed with robustness and traceability in mind, in line with CE/FDA requirements. You will shine if ✨ You’ve already deployed complex React Native applications at scale. You have experience with Bluetooth-connected consumer devices. You’ve worked in a regulated healthcare or medtech environment. You are familiar with CI/CD and DevOps pipelines for mobile applications. Your Skills and Experience React Native Mastery : Strong experience in React Native development for cross-platform apps. Algorithms & Signal Processing : Solid understanding of applied mathematics, real-time data processing, and algorithm design. Mobile Deployment : Familiarity with publishing apps to the App Store and Google Play. English Proficiency : Excellent written and spoken English for technical reporting and cross-team collaboration. Why You'll Love Working Here You’ll be building applications that directly impact the lives of hundreds of thousands of women – and their families. Your role will combine hands-on development with leadership responsibilities, giving you both technical depth and strategic influence. 🏥 Insurance benefits provided through PTI 🏢 Flexible and Friendly Work Environment : Dynamic startup culture, international team, and a focus on wellbeing. 🎁 Annual bonus up to 20% of total annual salary (includes 13th-month salary and performance bonus) 🎁 Company bonus based on the company’s performance

Join Solis Lab, a dynamic team crafting websites for top-tier brands with millions of monthly views. We're looking for a developer who is eager to turn intricate designs into stunning, responsive, and accessible web components. If you're detail-oriented, proactive, and ready to dive into front-end web development best practices, we want you! Your main responsibilities include: Transform design files (Sketch, Zeplin, Figma) into responsive and accessible front-end components. Uphold and advance accessibility, performance, and coding standards. Collaborate with the team leader and project manager to keep projects on schedule and aligned with goals. Engage with the technical lead to research and adopt cutting-edge front-end practices. You are perfect for this position if: Have a keen eye for details and can interpret design requirements into front-end code precisely. Writes clean, maintainable code that is designed for reusability and scalability across various projects. Demonstrates independence and initiative, proactively researching and devising technical solutions for challenging tasks. Conducts thorough quality assurance on your work before seeking reviews from team leaders. Supports fellow team members, is willing to share knowledge, and provides mentorship to less experienced developers. Takes pride in delivering high-quality work and is committed to excellence. Only apply if you're ready to invest the time and effort required to achieve the highest standards. Your Skills and Experience Basic proficiency in English reading and writing. Strong critical thinking and problem-solving abilities. Ability to write SEO-friendly, semantic HTML5. Expert knowledge of developing cross-platform/browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox) for web development. Proficient with modern CSS, including frameworks like Tailwind CSS, and native features such as Flexbox, Grid, Transforms, and Animation. Basic knowledge of CSS preprocessors like Sass, Less, or PostCSS. Skilled in JavaScript ES6+ (ES7/8/9) without relying on jQuery. Familiarity with JavaScript frameworks such as React or Vue.js. Extensive experience with responsive web design. Comfortable using design tools like Sketch, Zeplin, and Figma. Proficient in code versioning tools, particularly Git. Experience working with Shopify, WordPress, or other E-commerce platforms. The following skills are huge bonus points if you have them (if you don’t, no worries, you’ll learn on the job): Webpack / Babel / Vite. Why You'll Love Working Here Experience a fast-paced development agency life in a team that values leadership, craftsmanship, innovation, teamwork, and simplicity. Our team updates technology stacks, conventions, and workflows constantly. We move fast and learn faster. Stagnation or mediocrity is not acceptable. Continuous improvement is our way of life. If you're bothered by any of these things, don't apply. If that doesn't bother you, then you are one of us, and you will love this. Your experience and skills will grow more quickly than those of your peers in other companies. All we focus on is learning and improving through our day-to-day work, and at the same time, enjoying the company of our colleagues, whom we select very carefully. We also provide the following benefits: Total annual income equivalent to 14 months of salary (standard salary + Tet + bonus). Professional working environment: We provide you with top-notched tools including MacBook Pro, iPhone, Android devices for testing. We don't aim to micro-manage our employees. You will be the one who manages our expectations. A clear vision of your career progress: Performance/Roadmap review every 3 months. Growth tracks and career roadmap are carefully designed to build your confidence as you progress through the levels. Grow to be a Specialist or Jack of all trade: Opportunity to work with modern but pragmatic tech stacks for front-end and back-end. We pay for any courses, books, or conferences that you need to level up your skills. You are encouraged to have a life outside of work. Besides public holidays, you get 12 paid days off a year. Our fun and engaging reward system let you book extra paid leaves or remote working days for your efforts as a team player. You get one extra day off for every year you work at Solis Lab. Yearly health check-up. We also provide premium health insurance for family members of senior-level members. There are regular team-building activities, trips, parties.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us A leading Swiss product company An attractive compensation and benefit package A strong culture of growth, wellbeing and balance The Job Welcome to SMG Vietnam! SMG Swiss Marketplace Group simplifies lives with innovative online marketplaces in Automotive, Real Estate, General Marketplaces, and Finance & Insurance. As SMG’s innovation hub, SMG Vietnam develops cutting-edge solutions in a collaborative, empowering environment. Recognized among the 2023 Asia & Vietnam Best Workplaces, we attract top digital talent to create exceptional user experiences for Switzerland. Guided by our core values—Better Together, Aim High, and Act Responsibly—we drive innovation and meaningful change. This job refers to our Real Estate brands, and , the largest real estate portals in Switzerland, with more than 15 million visits per month and more than 100,000 listings. We provide all users looking for a property with a transparent overview of the entire range of listings without them having to tediously visit different platforms. In addition to great products such as the mortgage or price calculator, we also offer editorial articles on topics such as housing and financing. We are looking for a Senior Full stack Engineer for the Developer Experience (DevX) Team at SMG Real Estate, with a strong Frontend background. DevX is responsible for providing both the tools our development teams use to manage the lifecycle of our product and the experience of using them. You will get to collaborate and access the wealth of knowledge and experience from a community of amazing engineers who come from all parts of the globe and are ready to share their expertise and aid you in your path to fulfilling your potential. Join our dynamic team, located in six countries (Switzerland, Serbia, Vietnam, France, Germany, and India), where creativity thrives. Together, we tackle challenges, celebrate successes, and keep learning and growing. Your Mission: Work with our engineers to understand the challenges they face and how to improve their experience. Leverage your own knowledge and experience to help understand how to deliver the best engineering platform and tooling, improving the productivity and satisfaction of our teams. Help define processes, frameworks, and best practices for development. Support DevX’s Frontend engineers and work together with our Frontend Guild to understand our needs, develop a vision of how to best support them and deliver it as part of our Engineering Platform. Your responsibilities will evolve as we grow. Your Skills and Experience Strong English communication skills. At least 5 years of experience with TypeScript, either in front or back end. 2+ years of experience in frontend development with frameworks such as Vue and/or React. 2+ years of experience with serverless event-driven microservice architectures implemented using AWS Lambda. Experience implementing pipelines using GitHub Actions Experience implementing tests, both for front and back end. Motivated to help engineers be more productive and have the best possible developer experience. Nice-to-Have Qualifications: Previous experience in Developer Experience or Platform Engineering. Experience maintaining libraries and tooling, for example, frontend component libraries or CDK constructs. Experience or interest in integrating AI into engineering stacks. We value the skills you bring and your ability to learn quickly, so don’t worry if your career path has been unique. Why You'll Love Working Here Purposeful & Impactful Careers: Be part of SMG Swiss Marketplace Group, Switzerland’s most relevant online marketplace, promoting sustainable consumption, contributing to a greener society... Attractive Compensation: Top salary, Full pay during probation, 13th-month bonus, Annual profit growth share plan, Commuting allowance… Generous Benefits: 21+ annual paid days off, 10 paid days for sick leave, Full Social insurance contributions plus Premium private insurances for you and your family… Strong Learning & Development: Working with large scalable systems, Modern technical stacks, Transparent career paths, 24 days for learning, Personalized development plans, Yearly education budgets, Hackathons, LinkedIn learning… Fair Recognition & Evaluation: Clear OKRs, Regular performance check-ins, Annual performance cycle with 360-degree feedback mechanism, Promotion opportunities for all… Holistic Wellbeing & Balance: Annual health check-ups, Flexible hours, 40-hour work week with manageable workload, Diverse team bonding & wellness activities, Trips to Switzerland & Europe… Modern Work Environment: Inclusive & innovative culture, Hybrid working model with additional 12 remote weeks per year, Top-tier equipment, Best-in-kind AI assistants… Supportive Onboarding: Comprehensive assistance to help you settle in… APPLY NOW, SO A GREAT CAREER OPPORTUNITY WON'T BE MISSED!

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Professional, creative, and dynamic team Opportunities for growth and development Attractive salary and benefits package The Job We are looking for a Mobile App Developer with 2+ years of experience to join our team in building an AI-powered trading signal platform for US Stocks . The ideal candidate has solid hands-on experience in React Native for mobile development and is also comfortable contributing to web frontend development . You will work closely with Product, Design, Backend, AI/ML, and QA teams to deliver intuitive, high-performance applications that provide users with market insights, trading signals, watchlists, alerts, and portfolio-related features. We also value developers who know how to leverage AI coding tools to improve development speed, code quality, debugging efficiency, and overall team productivity. Key Responsibilities Develop, maintain, and enhance mobile applications using React Native for iOS and Android. Contribute to web frontend development using React.js or similar modern frameworks. Build responsive, scalable, and user-friendly interfaces across mobile and web platforms. Integrate APIs and backend services for market data, trading signals, watchlists, alerts, portfolios, and user accounts. Work closely with Product, Design, Backend, and AI/ML teams to translate business and signal logic into product features. Optimize application performance for data-heavy and near real-time market screens. Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve issues to ensure application stability and reliability. Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code following engineering best practices. Use AI development tools to accelerate coding, debugging, refactoring, documentation, and testing workflows where appropriate. Participate in code reviews, testing, release cycles, and continuous product improvement. Ensure security, data accuracy, and a smooth user experience in finance-related workflows. Your Skills and Experience Requirements 2+ years of experience in software development, preferably in mobile application development. Strong hands-on experience with React Native . Good experience with React.js or other modern web frontend frameworks. Strong knowledge of JavaScript or TypeScript . Good understanding of mobile app architecture, lifecycle, and frontend engineering best practices. Experience working with RESTful APIs , asynchronous flows, and dynamic data-driven interfaces. Familiarity with state management such as Redux , MobX , or Context API . Experience publishing and maintaining apps on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store . Familiarity with Git and Agile/Scrum workflows. Strong problem-solving, communication, and teamwork skills. Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude, or similar tools to improve coding productivity and development efficiency. Ability to use AI tools responsibly to support implementation, debugging, documentation, and code optimization. Having a backend mindset and a good understanding of APIs, system flow, database structure , and data flow is a strong advantage. Preferred Qualifications Experience working on products related to US Stocks, Trading, Investment, Market Signals, or Fintech . Basic understanding of how AI/ML-driven signals are presented in user-facing products. Experience building chart-based, data-intensive, and real-time or near real-time interfaces. Understanding of user behavior in trading or investment platforms. Knowledge of authentication, secure token handling, and application security best practices. Experience with analytics, crash monitoring, and performance tracking is a plus. Experience using AI-assisted development workflows to ship features faster while maintaining code quality is a strong advantage. Technical Skills React Native React.js JavaScript / TypeScript REST API Integration Redux / Context API Git Debugging & Performance Optimization AI Coding Tools (e.g. ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude) Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary with annual performance reviews Clear career advancement opportunities Professional training and skill development Dynamic, friendly, and supportive work environment Paid annual leave and public holidays Social, health, and unemployment insurance according to law Team building activities

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Passion for technology High monthly salary and bonus Flexible working hours The Job Why join Offspring? Offspring is a boutique digital production studio, founded by an Australian Technical Director, that works with Australian and US markets. We believe that having the best people is more important than having hundreds of people. We believe that work should be about culture, growth and passion… not only money. We believe in pushing people to learn and achieve more. We believe in rewarding people based on their contributions, not who they know. If your values match with ours, then we want to talk to you. Đôi nét về Offspring Offspring Digital là công ty công nghệ của Úc, đã hoạt động ở Hà Nội, Việt Nam gần 10 năm. Hiện công ty có hai đối tượng khách hàng chính: Úc và Mỹ. Về mặt sản phẩm, công ty hiện xây dựng và vận hành các nền tảng social network, thương mại điện tử, ứng dụng liên quan đến sức khỏe trên cả môi trường web và mobile. Với Offspring, chúng tôi tin rằng việc lựa chọn người có năng lực cao quan trọng hơn việc có nhiều người khả năng trung bình. Chúng tôi cũng cho rằng một công việc tốt không chỉ liên quan đến vấn đề bạn nhận được bao nhiêu lương, mà còn là môi trường làm việc, văn hóa công ty, triển vọng nghề nghiệp và đam mê. Offspring tin tưởng là môi trường có thể đáp ứng được những yêu cầu trên và là nơi tạo ra nhiều cơ hội cho mọi người học hỏi và đạt được nhiều thành tựu trong sự nghiệp của mình. Bên cạnh đó, Offspring luôn tin tưởng vào việc đánh giá nhân viên của mình dựa vào giá trị đóng góp của họ, chứ không dựa vào những mối quan hệ mà họ có. Ứng dụng AI tools trong quá trình phát triển phần mềm nhằm tăng năng suất và hiệu quả công việc. Tư duy sản phẩm (Product Mindset), không chỉ code đúng mà còn phải đóng góp ý kiến để sản phẩm tốt hơn. Điểm cộng lớn: Đã từng lead các dự án App có lượng người dùng lớn (>10.000 users). Có tư duy thẩm mỹ tốt, hiểu về các nguyên tắc trong UI/UX. Why You'll Love Working Here Thưởng theo dự án hàng tháng. Đánh giá lương: 1-2 lần/năm . Bonus tháng 13.
