job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us High salary from $1500 - $3000 Remote working and flexible working hours Interesting and challenging projects to work on The Job As a DevOps Engineer at Otto International , you will play a crucial role in managing AWS/Azure infrastructure using IaC, building secure CI/CD pipelines, administering Linux/Windows systems, and supporting containerized workloads with Docker and Kubernetes. This role will support the design, implementation, and operation of scalable, secure, and highly available infrastructure and delivery pipelines. You will work closely with engineering, security, and operations teams to enable reliable application delivery across cloud environments while embedding DevSecOps best practices into all stages of the software lifecycle. How will you make a difference? Design, implement, and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) to ensure consistency, scalability, and security. Build, manage, and optimize CI/CD pipelines to support reliable and automated build, test, and deployment workflows. Implement and enforce DevSecOps best practices, including container security, secrets management, RBAC hardening, network segmentation, and security policy enforcement. Deploy, operate, and troubleshoot containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes, ensuring high availability and performance. Administer and support Linux (Ubuntu, CentOS) and Windows Server environments, including installation, configuration, patching, tuning, and troubleshooting. Collaborate with development teams to improve system reliability, observability, monitoring, and incident response. Design and manage networking components such as VPCs/VNETs, subnets, routing, load balancers, DNS, firewalls, and security groups. Develop automation and operational tooling using Bash and Python to support system administration and monitoring. Create and maintain detailed documentation for system architecture, configurations, operational procedures, and disaster recovery plans. Participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance system stability, security posture, and delivery efficiency. Communicate effectively with team members and stakeholders. Your Skills and Experience Who we are looking for? Bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, system engineering, or a related field. Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience as a DevOps Engineer, System Engineer, or System Administrator, with strong expertise in Linux-based environments. Proven experience managing and operating AWS and Azure cloud platforms using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as AWS CDK, Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible, and Chef, ensuring scalable, repeatable, and secure deployments. Solid working knowledge of DevSecOps best practices, including container image scanning, runtime security, secrets management, RBAC hardening, network segmentation, and security policy enforcement across environments. Strong experience with container technologies including Docker and Elastic Container services, and Kubernetes orchestration, covering build, deployment, scaling, and troubleshooting of containerized workloads. Good understanding of networking concepts, including VPCs/VNETs, subnets, routing, load balancing, DNS, firewalls, and security groups. Working proficiency in Bash and Python for automation, system administration, monitoring, and operational tooling. Hands-on experience designing, implementing, and maintaining CI/CD pipelines, with practical experience using GitHub and GitHub Actions to enable reliable build, test, and deployment workflows. Strong experience administering Linux distributions (Ubuntu, CentOS) and Windows Server environments, including installation, configuration, patching, performance tuning, and troubleshooting. Demonstrated ability to document system architecture, configurations, operational procedures, and disaster recovery processes to ensure long-term maintainability, knowledge sharing, and operational excellence. Good verbal and written communication skills. Strong teamwork and interpersonal skills. Why work with us? Collaborative, fun and challenging work environment. Open, transparent and diverse culture with locations worldwide. Double-pay, performance bonus, flexible working hours. Full healthcare insurance coverage. All data provided by applicants will be treated in strict confidence and used solely for recruitment purposes. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Engineer platforms that operate at global scale Shape architecture and long‑term system direction Deepen expertise in reliability and scalability The Job Strong engineers often look for roles where they can work on systems that evolve over time, not just deliver isolated features. At AMB, DevOps Engineers work on production platforms used by global organizations, focusing on infrastructure, deployment systems, and platform reliability across billing systems, customer platforms, and distributed microservices. Some of the platforms our engineers support operate in the fintech and digital commerce space, where systems must process financial data reliably and efficiently at scale. These environments require high availability, fault tolerance, strong data integrity, and well‑designed cloud infrastructure. If you enjoy owning systems end‑to‑end, improving reliability, and building platforms that scale smoothly in production, this role may be a strong fit. You will collaborate closely with engineers and product teams to design and evolve infrastructure and deployment workflows that support long‑term product platforms rather than short‑term project delivery. WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON As a Senior DevOps Engineer, you will help design and evolve production‑grade infrastructure, deployment systems, and platform reliability. Your responsibilities include: Manage and maintain Linux-based production environments, ensuring system stability, security, and scalability. Design, deploy, and manage containerized applications using Docker and Kubernetes orchestration. Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines and automation workflows using Azure DevOps. Administer and optimize cloud resources across Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Implement and manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools such as Terraform and ARM templates. Set up and monitor system performance and reliability using tools like Grafana and Prometheus. Automate operational tasks and deployments through scripting languages such as Bash, Python, or similar. Collaborate closely with engineering, QA, and product teams, to ensure smooth release cycles and stable environments. Apply security best practices in all cloud and containerized deployments. We encourage engineers to take ownership of systems and features, not just complete assigned tasks. Our Engineering Stack: Our platforms use modern technologies commonly found in global engineering environments. Operating Systems: Linux (production environment management) Containerization: Docker, Kubernetes CI/CD: Azure DevOps Cloud Platforms: Azure, AWS, GCP Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Terraform, ARM templates Monitoring: Grafana, Prometheus Scripting Languages: Bash, Python Configuration Management: Ansible (preferred) Version Control: Git Cloud Interfaces: Azure CLI and Azure Portal Your Skills and Experience Core Requirements: Minimum 5+ years of experience in DevOps, Site Reliability Engineering, or related fields. Strong proficiency in Linux system administration and production environment management. Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes orchestration. Proven expertise with Azure DevOps for continuous integration and deployment. Proficiency with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools such as Terraform and ARM templates. Familiarity with monitoring and alerting tools such as Grafana and Prometheus. Strong scripting ability in Bash, Python, or similar. Experience with configuration management tools such as Ansible (preferred). Familiarity with Agile methodologies and DevOps culture. Knowledge of security best practices in cloud and containerized environments. Familiarity with multi-cloud or hybrid environments is a plus. We value engineers who: Demonstrate strong English communication skills (written and verbal). Ability to clearly explain technical concepts and collaborate effectively with international engineering teams. We value engineers who: Take responsibility for their work. Enjoy solving challenging technical problems. Write maintainable, high‑quality code. Continuously improve their skills. ____________________________________________ EXAMPLE ENGINEERING CHALLENGES YOU MAY WORK ON As a Senior DevOps Engineer, you will work on production platforms where reliability, scalability, and operational efficiency are critical. Examples of challenges our team tackles include: Designing Scalable Cloud Infrastructure: Design and evolve cloud infrastructure across AWS/Azure environments, ensuring systems are highly available, fault‑tolerant, and cost‑efficient under production load. Building and Evolving CI/CD Systems: Develop and improve CI/CD pipelines to support reliable, repeatable deployments, reducing friction for engineering teams while maintaining system stability. Improving Platform Reliability and Observability: Enhance monitoring, logging, and alerting systems using tools like Prometheus and Grafana, enabling faster detection and resolution of production issues. Managing Containerized Distributed Systems: Operate and optimize Kubernetes-based platforms, ensuring smooth deployment, scaling, and resilience of distributed services. Automating Infrastructure and Operations: Implement Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, ARM) and automate operational workflows to improve consistency, reduce manual intervention, and support system scalability. WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN THIS ROLE First Few Weeks: Understanding system architecture, infrastructure, and deployment workflows. Contributing improvements to CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, or infrastructure configuration. Participating in engineering discussions around reliability and system operations. First Few Months: Taking ownership of infrastructure components, deployment systems, or reliability improvements. Enhancing system observability, deployment processes, or operational efficiency. Contributing to infrastructure and platform design decisions. Over Time: Driving improvements in system reliability, scalability, and operational excellence. Helping standardize DevOps practices across teams. Mentoring engineers on infrastructure, deployment, and reliability best practices. Contributing to long‑term platform stability and evolution. Engineers who thrive here typically demonstrate ownership, strong operational judgement, and a proactive approach to improving system reliability and performance. Why You'll Love Working Here We aim to provide a stable and supportive environment where engineers can focus on building high‑quality systems and improving their craft over time, without unnecessary process overhead. Here are the top 3 growth reasons for engineers to empower your career with us. You will: Work on long‑term product platforms, not short‑term projects. Engineer reliable systems used in production environments. Collaborate closely with international product and engineering teams. Compensation & Equipment Competitive salary based on experience. 13th month salary paid every January. Company laptop provided. Healthcare & Insurance: Social and health insurance (based on full 100% salary). Annual health check‑ups. Additional PVI health insurance from year 2. Leave & Work‑Life Balance: 12 days annual leave starting from the first year. 2 paid sick leave days. 11+ public holidays per year. Additional leave based on seniority and family dependents. Work Flexibility: Subject to management's discretion, you can have options to work: Full time Hybrid work model with work‑from‑home option, available for high‑performing engineers. Office Environment Cozy and growing office space. In‑office parking available. Collaborative and engineering-focused culture. Company Activities Annual company trips to beach destinations. Travel cash‑out option when travel is not possible. Career Growth Work on production systems used by international organizations. Exposure to modern architectures, cloud infrastructure, and distributed systems. Opportunities to deepen expertise in system design, scalability, and reliability.

company_name: CTCP SÀN GIAO DỊCH TÀI SẢN MÃ HÓA VIỆT NAM THỊNH VƯỢNG (CAEX)
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Thưởng tháng 13 Thưởng hiệu quả kinh doanh Bảo hiểm sức khoẻ cao cấp The Job Job Purpose: IT Cloud Operator is responsible for ensuring the stable, secure, and cost-optimized operation of the entire Cloud infrastructure environment (Public/Private/Hybrid), contributing to the availability and continuity of the bank’s IT services. This role also participates in building, standardizing, and automating Cloud operations (CloudOps), improving resource management efficiency, optimizing costs (FinOps), and minimizing operational risks in Cloud environments. Key Responsibilities Operate and administer Cloud infrastructure (AWS/Local Cloud/Private Cloud). Monitor and troubleshoot Cloud systems and incidents. Manage Cloud resources and optimize costs (FinOps). Deploy and operate infrastructure using IaC tools (Terraform/ Ansible/ CloudFormation). Manage Cloud security (IAM, Network Security, Compliance). Manage backup, disaster recovery (DR), and recovery readiness. Collaborate with DevOps and application teams for system deployment. Manage configuration and changes (Change/Configuration Management). Manage Cloud vendors (AWS, Azure, Local Cloud, etc.). Develop operational documents, runbooks, and automation scripts. Prepare operational reports (KPI/KRI, capacity, cost). Continuously improve Cloud operations through Automation and AIOps. Your Skills and Experience Minimum 2-3 years of experience in system operations or Cloud operations. Experience operating production systems is mandatory. Knowledge of Cloud platforms: AWS / Azure / GCP. Understanding of Networking concepts including VPC, Subnet, Firewall, VPN, and Load Balancer. Knowledge of Linux/Windows Server operating systems. Understanding of container technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes is an advantage. Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools including Terraform and Ansible. Strong troubleshooting and system optimization skills. Automation and scripting skills (Python, Bash). Good teamwork and cross-functional collaboration skills. Understanding of ITIL/DevOps operating models. Nice to Have Cloud certifications such as AWS or Azure certifications. Experience with automation and CloudOps optimization. Strong system thinking mindset. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive Compensation World-Class Team in Humanoid Robotics Cutting-Edge Humanoid Robot Products The Job Responsibilities Hybrid Infrastructure Management: Orchestrate and maintain infrastructure across AWS, local servers, and distributed Edge hardware. Edge Computing: Hands-on experience deploying and managing workloads on NUC, NVIDIA Jetson, or Raspberry Pi. Bonus point if the workloads are related to IoT, Robotics. CI/CD Tooling: Advanced proficiency with Bitbucket Pipelines/Runners , GitLab CI, or Jenkins in a hybrid setup. Containerization & Orchestration: Expert-level skills in Docker and Kubernetes (standard K8s for cloud/on-prem and K3s/MicroK8s for Edge). job_title: Middle/Senior Software Engineer - C#/.Net, Azure, Cloud
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary. Healthcare insurance package. 13th month and productivity bonus. The Job An Internal Developer Platform (IDP) Engineer designs, builds, and maintains an Internal Developer Platform (IDP) to provide developers with a self-service environment that abstracts technical complexity and streamlines software delivery. They implement tools and automated workflows for tasks like infrastructure management, CI/CD pipelines, and environment provisioning, enabling development teams to focus on innovation by reducing their cognitive load and providing access to necessary resources. Roles, Responsibilities & Typical Activities Build and maintain the IDP: Design, implement, and manage the set of curated tools, services, and infrastructure that make up the IDP. Automate workflows: Develop automated processes for common development and operational tasks, such as provisioning cloud resources, deploying code, and managing environments. Enhance developer experience: Focus on user-friendliness and efficiency to reduce the cognitive load on developers, allowing them to self-service their needs without deep infrastructure knowledge. Ensure scalability and reliability: Create a platform that is reliable, scalable, and capable of handling evolving application needs over time. Promote self-service: Provide a centralized and unified interface, often through an internal developer portal, where developers can access the platform's capabilities and resources. Uphold security and compliance: Integrate robust security measures and governance to protect data and meet regulatory requirements. Monitor and support the platform: Provide updates, monitor the platform's infrastructure, and offer support to development teams using the IDP. Your Skills and Experience Qualifications / Experience for internal candidates Bachelors or Engineer in major of Computer Science, or related field. Senior level: 6+ years of experience Middle level: 3+ years Good communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams preferred English: Ability to understand written and spoken English at an advanced level Preferred skills C#, JavaScript, Typescripts and other support programing languages. Angular, .NET, SQL, Entity frameworks OpenAPI/Swagger Platform Engineering Microservices, Micro-Frontends development. Azure DevOps, Azure Cloud Docker, Kubernetes and containerization Infrastructure as Code skills such as Terraform Shared library development Why You'll Love Working Here • Competitive salary with 13th‑month bonus, productivity bonus, and annual salary review • Comprehensive healthcare package, including 24/24 personal accident insurance • State‑of‑the‑art office environment (gym, shower, basketball & soccer field) with a high‑end laptop provided • Work hand‑in‑hand with global software teams (Australia, New Zealand, UK, US, Canada…) • Strong learning culture: paid self‑learning hours, LinkedIn Learning & Pluralsight access, in‑person classes with professional trainers (leadership, soft skills, English…), workshops, technical sharing activities... • Clear career development with structured onboarding, ongoing training, and a mentorship program • Flexible working: 5‑day work week and flexible start times • Free lunch and free parking • Team bonding through quarterly team‑building events, yearly company outing, and a special 3‑year anniversary trip • Active social clubs: gym, yoga, football, badminton, swimming…

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Make a real impact on global sustainability Career development in a stable global industry Flexible working environment in a trusted company The Job At ROSEN, we are at the forefront of the digital transformation of critical infrastructure anomaly assessment. Our new project is a key pillar of our digital transformation strategy and focuses on cloud-native architectures, advanced AI models and a modern JavaScript technology stack to streamline workflows, modernize the portfolio, and revolutionize how we analyze and interpret pipeline integrity data. By leveraging machine learning, advanced data processing, and cutting-edge web technologies, we aim to significantly reduce cycle times, increase customer satisfaction, and provide an intuitive, seamless user experience. Additionally, you will integrate cloud services into our Developer Platform, incorporating FinOps practices to ensure cost-effective and efficient cloud operations. Implement and manage infrastructure as code (IaC) using Terraform, OpenTofu and Crossplane. Utilize Azure Cloud services effectively. Develop and maintain scripts and applications using Python and Go. Manage CI/CD pipelines using ArgoCD and Azure Pipelines. Implement FinOps tools. Ensure the security and networking of the cloud infrastructure. Your Skills and Experience Degree in software engineering, computer science, or related technical field Extensive experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools, particularly Terraform. Proficiency in Azure Cloud services. Programming and scripting skills in Python and Go. Experience with CI/CD tools, including ArgoCD and Azure Pipelines. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Role Overview The DevSecOps Engineer is responsible for integrating security best practices into our DevOps platforms and product environments. This role operates independently from delivery ownership to ensure objective risk identification, reporting, and mitigation. You will collaborate closely with DevOps, engineering, and product teams to promote secure development practices while maintaining transparency and governance over security risks. Key Responsibilities 1. Vulnerability Management – DevOps Platforms Track and follow vulnerabilities related to: CI/CD tools (e.g. Jenkins, GitLab, wiki, agents) Container platforms and base images OS packages, middleware, and supporting services Coordinate patching and remediation with DevOps engineers Maintain a central vulnerability follow-up list (with severity and status) 2. Security & Network Review Review and document: Cloud and on-prem network architecture Firewall rules, NAT rules, VPNs, access paths CI/CD system access and segregation of duties Identify security gaps and improvement opportunities Propose remediation actions and track closure 3. Security Standards & Best Practices Promote and enforce secure coding standards Assist development teams in implementing security controls Integrate security testing into CI/CD pipelines (SAST, DAST, dependency scanning) Contribute to security documentation and internal guidelines 4. Reporting & Governance Maintain clear reporting of security risks and remediation status Provide visibility into security posture across platforms and products Escalate critical risks appropriately Ensure security assessments remain independent from delivery timelines Your Skills and Experience Required Qualifications Technical Skills Understanding of DevOps practices and CI/CD workflows Knowledge of application and infrastructure security principles Familiarity with vulnerability management tools Basic understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP, SAP BTP ) Awareness of container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) Understanding of secure coding practices Soft Skills Good English communication required Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Clear and effective communication abilities Ability to collaborate cross-functionally High level of integrity and objectivity Eagerness to learn and grow in the DevSecOps domain Preferred Qualifications Experience integrating security tools into CI/CD pipelines Familiarity with security frameworks (ISO 27001, OWASP, NIST) Relevant certifications (e.g., Security+, CEH, DevSecOps-related credentials) Why You'll Love Working Here 15 days of annual leaves Competitive salary (+13-month salary include) Health insurance, social insurance according to the government regulations PVI Healthcare Insurance Have a chance to work in an international, friendly, open environment Annual Travel opportunity

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Lương, thưởng và các chế độ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn Môi trường chuyên nghiệp, khóa đào tạo nâng cao Du lịch, team building, gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe The Job You will join a dynamic and experienced engineering team, operating and maintaining infrastructure and SaaS platforms that serve more than 1,000 leading global corporations , including Vodafone, Nokia, Shell, Carlsberg, NTT, Sony, Mitsubishi, Samsung, and many others. You will work directly with production systems at global scale , spanning on-premises infrastructure and public cloud environments , with a strong focus on servers, virtual machines, networking, security, and day-to-day system operations . You will also have the opportunity to support our ongoing transition toward more modern cloud-based platforms over time. You will research, learn, and apply modern infrastructure and cloud technologies, helping to build and operate secure, stable, and high-performance systems for our financial and Investor Relations products. Key Responsibilities Administer and maintain Windows and Linux servers on both on-premises and cloud environments Manage virtual machines , system configuration, patching, upgrades, and daily operations Support and troubleshoot networking, DNS, load balancing, firewall rules, SSL/TLS, and access control Work with development teams to support deployments , improve system reliability and contribute to DevOps processes . job_title: Cloud Solution Architect AWS Senior, Junior
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Professional working environment Attractive salary, yearly bonus & awesome benefits Advanced learning & development opportunities The Job MEGAZONE Vietnam is seeking an experienced Cloud Solution Architect specializing in cloud computing solutions. This role is pivotal in delivering technical designs and innovative solutions to our customers in Vietnam, driving the adoption of cloud technologies. As a senior member of the team, you will play a crucial role in shaping and executing technical strategies within a dynamic and rapidly growing business environment. In this role, you will take ownership of technical engagements and project success, defining robust implementation architectures, crafting responses to RFPs, and building deep expertise in cloud offerings and technologies. You will collaborate closely with offshore teams at MEGAZONE CLOUD and external partners, serving as a subject matter expert for regional customers. Additionally, proactive participation in pilot projects and the development of technical solution demos will be encouraged. This position reports to the Head of Vietnam Business. What You Will Do: Present complex solutions and integrations clearly and persuasively Collaborate closely with local sales colleagues to develop business opportunities and achieve shared objectives Design and propose solutions that effectively address client needs, demonstrating the business benefits of cloud services Act as a key liaison between sales and offshore delivery teams, ensuring seamless project execution and successful outcomes Provide technical enablement and updates to the country sales team Serve as a technical ambassador for the region within the global shared service operation Your Skills and Experience 1- 5 years of enterprise-level experience in AWS, with a focus on pre-sales and technical consulting in B2B environments Extensive hands-on experience in developing and operating AWS cloud infrastructures Ability to articulate complex technical topics to both technical and business audiences Flexible to adjust working hours (e.g., 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM or 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM as needed) Strong foundational knowledge in areas such as CI/CD, Kubernetes, Databases, and AWS Management Effective collaborator across internal teams and external stakeholders BS degree in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience Preferred Qualifications: Advanced knowledge of cloud computing concepts and services, particularly AWS Proven experience in architecting, designing, and migrating workloads to public cloud environments Cloud certifications (e.g., AWS Solutions Architect Associate) strongly preferred Self-starter accustomed to working in a fast-paced, collaborative team environment Proficient technical communication skills in English and Korean Why You'll Love Working Here The attractive salary (Negotiation) 2-month probation period with 100% salary. Full salary insurance coverage after the probation period. Participation in the PVI health insurance package, and annual health check-ups. 13th-month salary, birthday bonus, New Year bonus, Mid-Autumn Festival gifts, March 8th and October 20th gifts, etc. Performance evaluation and regular salary increases. Welfare for personal events, childbirth, and other benefits as per labor regulations and company welfare policies. Dynamic and youthful work environment conducive to personal growth and development. Working Time And Location Company: Megazone Vietnam Working Hours: Standard: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM (Lunch: 12:00 PM – 1:00 PM), Monday to Friday Flexible working hours may apply depending on project (e.g., 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM) Location: 27th Floor, East Tower, Lotte Center Hanoi, 54 Lieu Giai, Ba Dinh District, Hanoi, Vietnam

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Global Company- Develop Your Career & English Competitive Salary, and company profit share Onsite opportunities The Job Who Are We Hansen Technologies is a leading global provider of software and services that enable organisations to transform customer experiences and streamline critical business processes. With a rich history of innovation and a footprint that spans over 80 countries, Hansen empowers utilities, energy, and communications companies to thrive in an ever-evolving digital landscape. Our commitment to excellence, customer focus, and collaborative culture makes Hansen a place where passionate professionals can make a meaningful impact, drive real change, and help shape the future of industries worldwide. We are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. Hansen prides itself on celebrating diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, even extending this to how we work with our customers, partners, and suppliers. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, race, ethnicity, religion or belief, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. If you require any adjustments or accommodation during the recruitment process, please let us know. Why This Role Matters Lead, Inspire, Transform, Deliver. At Hansen, our software powers critical services for industries that keep the world running. As a Senior Software Development Manager , you will play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our CIS-HU engineering capability , leading distributed teams across Vietnam and Australia. This is more than a leadership role—it's an opportunity to build high-performing engineering teams, elevate technical capability, and drive delivery excellence at scale . You will influence how we adopt AI-assisted development, modern cloud platforms, and best-in-class engineering practices to innovate faster and deliver greater value to customers. Your leadership will directly impact how our teams perform, how our products evolve, and how we deliver secure, scalable, and reliable solutions across global markets. What You’ll Do Lead Engineering Teams: Develop and mentor Technical Leads and engineering teams across a distributed structure, driving high performance and engagement. Drive Delivery Excellence: Oversee planning, execution, and delivery across multiple teams, ensuring alignment with business priorities and customer commitments. Advance AI & Productivity: Embed AI-assisted engineering practices to enhance development efficiency, quality, and innovation. Strengthen Technical Capability: Champion modern cloud (AWS) and engineering practices including microservices, APIs, CI/CD, and automation. Collaborate Across Functions: Work closely with Product, Architecture, QA, DevOps, and Delivery to ensure cohesive execution and outcomes. Enhance Quality & Standards: Establish and maintain strong engineering standards, focusing on scalability, security, and performance. Manage Risk & Improve Continuously: Proactively identify delivery risks, resolve issues, and drive continuous improvement across teams. Your Skills and Experience What You Bring Proven experience leading software engineering teams across multiple layers of leadership, including Technical Leads. Strong people leadership skills with the ability to coach, inspire, and develop high-performing teams. Experience leading distributed teams across regions and cultures. Deep understanding of modern engineering practices, cloud technologies (preferably AWS), and software architecture. Exposure to AI-assisted development and engineering productivity improvements. Strong communication and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence across technical and business audiences. Expertise in CI/CD, microservices, APIs, containerisation, and secure development practices. A passion for continuous improvement, innovation, and delivery excellence. Nice to have: Experience in energy, utilities, or enterprise software domains Background in cloud transformation or large-scale modernisation Familiarity with tools such as Jira, Confluence, GitHub, and CI/CD platforms Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive Market Rate Salary - full salary (including SI contribution) during the probation period and 13th-month salary Twice yearly salary review Full participation in the annual Hansen Profit Share Program Great Leave Options – including 12 days annual leave during Year 1, increasing to 15 days annual leave and 12 days paid sick leave per year). Premium healthcare for employee and dependents (spouse and {all} children and support for parents). Also, free comprehensive annual check-up for employees. High-speed Internet credit: VND 5,5million/year Wellness benefit: VND 2million annually for fitness package/devices Free lunch, snacks, and drink in our new modern offices, which have a cool open atmosphere with an outdoor cafe, bar, and recreation area in District 2 – including free scooter parking Continuous Learning and Development, including personalised Udemy Business – online learning platform. Reward and Recognition - Company sponsored trips and events, tenure milestones and global recognition program. New, modern developer laptop, 2 large monitors, and headset. An international work environment, highly skilled colleagues to learn from both locally and globally where you can develop your IT career and English skills.

capability, provide structured feedback, and make resourcing recommendations to leadership Challenge and validate engineering estimations; identify technical risks before they become delivery problems monitoring, and invoices Run regular client governance (status, escalations, acceptance criteria, UAT) at CTO/PMO level Produce and maintain project artefacts: plans, RAID logs, integration specs, cutover plans Ensure compliance with client security and regulatory requirements relevant to banking/securities What Makes You Successful in This Role Client-first mindset with strong commercial judgment Comfortable making decisions in ambiguous situations Strong prioritization and escalation skills Pragmatic, negotiation-oriented, and detail-focused Able to balance relationship management banks or securities firms Sufficient software development knowledge to evaluate tech team estimations, identify scope gaps, and challenge technical decisions Working knowledge of financial products and operations - lending, trading, payments, securities - beyond consumer-level familiarity Proven ability to own and define ambiguous scope in later project phases; not limited to task tracking and progress reporting Experience evaluating developer and BA profiles, providing structured performance feedback, and making resourcing calls independently Proven experience managing multi-vendor integrations (APIs, batch feeds, middleware) Strong vendor negotiation experience with documented commercial outcomes (cost savings, SLA improvements, or secured credits) Excellent stakeholder management - able to interact confidently and independently with bank CTOs/PMOs Experience managing subcontractors and remote teams Structured communicator: executive-level project documentation and status reporting Vietnamese (native) + business-level English for vendor / partner / client discussions Expert in Agile and Waterfall; able to design and adapt delivery frameworks per engagement Nice to have Certifications: PMP, Prince2, or Certified ScrumMaster Background in securities trading operations, FIX protocol, or core banking platforms Prior experience with AWS commercial programs and cloud migration projects Experience building or working alongside AI/automation development teams What Makes You Successful in This Role Client-first mindset with strong commercial judgment Comfortable making decisions in ambiguous situations Strong prioritization and escalation skills Pragmatic, negotiation-oriented, and detail-focused Able to balance relationship management with delivery discipline Why You'll Love Working Here The CoderPush Advantage Hybrid friendly culture, work where you grow best! job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job About our Line of Business – Cloud & Data Centre Solutions ST Engineering Cloud and Data Centre Solutions Pte Ltd provide all aspects of cloud management, services, and solutions, from initial setup and migration to ongoing operations and optimization. Services include engineering works to design, build and provide facility management service for mission critical environments such data centers, disaster recovery, and business continuity sites. Position Overview The Technical Manager is responsible for leading the design, deployment, and management of cloud architectures across AWS and Azure platforms. He/She applies best practices in cloud engineering and security to mitigate risks associated with new technologies and evolving business needs. The role contributes to the creation of artefacts spanning design, development, and implementation, ensuring that cloud architecture and deployment principles align with overall enterprise technology strategies. He/She provides leadership in the fulfilment of cloud infrastructure tasks spanning Day 1 and Day 2 activities. Responsibilities ✓ Participate in the design and implementation of cloud architectures and controls in alignment with enterprise security and compliance guidelines. ✓ Assist in the testing and evaluation of new cloud-native services, tools, and deployment models to ensure scalability, resilience, and security. ✓ Recommend cloud products, services, and deployment procedures to enhance overall system architecture design. ✓ Document the design, operation, use, and expected outputs of AWS and Azure cloud environments. ✓ Implement new enterprise cloud solutions, services, and enhancements across Day 1 (deployment) and Day 2 (operations) activities. ✓ Resolve issues that arise during cloud deployments, migrations, and integrations. ✓ Identify opportunities to scale up and automate infrastructure and processes through Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC), CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring solutions. ✓ Monitor cloud infrastructure for performance, availability, and security gaps, and propose continuous improvements. ✓ Oversee the maintenance of cloud platforms, services, and associated automation tools. ✓ Develop and implement disaster recovery drills and simulation tests for critical workloads hosted on AWS and Azure. ✓ Provide leadership in the resolution of incidents, performance bottlenecks, and cloud operational challenges. Your Skills and Experience Requirements ✓ 6+ years of experience in cloud infrastructure deployment and operations using Terraform, AWS Cloud Formation Template / Azure Resource Manager. ✓ Proven experience delivering cloud solutions for enterprise and/or government sector clients in Singapore. ✓ Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities. ✓ Excellent stakeholder engagement and communication skills. ✓ Ability to perform effectively in fast-paced, deadline-driven delivery environments. ✓ Strong understanding of cloud architecture principles, design patterns, and best practices for enterprise-scale deployments. ✓ Proven hands-on experience with public cloud platforms, particularly AWS and Azure, covering both Day 1 (deployment, configuration, migration) and Day 2 (operations, monitoring, optimization, incident response) activities. ✓ Experience with automation and Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) using tools such as Terraform, CloudFormation, or ARM templates; proficiency in Python for scripting and workflow automation is an advantage. ✓ Familiarity with hybrid and multi-cloud environments, with Google Cloud knowledge considered a plus. ✓ Strong collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively in cross-functional, agile, and DevOps-driven teams. ✓ Demonstrated critical thinking, analytical ability, and creative problem-solving in cloud deployment, security, and operations. ✓ High attention to detail with a focus on quality, scalability, resilience, and cost optimization in cloud solutions. Qualifications & Certifications Preferred certifications include: ✓ AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional ✓ Microsoft Azure Solutions Architect Expert ✓ Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) ✓ Terraform Associate or Professional certification Why You'll Love Working Here 14 days Annual leaves + 3 Sick leaves Private Health Insurance Annual Salary Review Performance Bonus 100% salary in probation period Free LinkedIn Learning Account Company Events & Team Building
benefits: 14 days Annual leaves + 3 Sick leaves Private Health Insurance Annual Salary Review Performance Bonus 100% salary in probation period Free LinkedIn Learning Account Company Events & Team Building

With our focus on inclusion and diversity, and in partnership with our Employee Resource Groups, NAB is a place where First Nations colleagues, colleagues of all genders, sexualities and ages, carers and colleagues with disability, and colleagues from all cultures, races and religions have the opportunity to thrive, connect and grow. We are intent on providing an environment where you can work your way. Ask about our many flexible work options and please let us know if we can provide any adjustments throughout the recruitment process. CLOUD-FIRST NAB is undergoing an exciting "Cloud First" technology transformation by taking advantage of the latest tools and techniques used by leading technology and digital companies globally. But it’s not just about the Tech, we are also investing heavily in our people, so if you have an appetite to learn, grow and elevate others around you, this is the place for you! If this excites you, let's have a chat over a cup of coffee! It's more than just a career at NAB! We believe in people with people and dreams, and we want you to achieve your aspirations. More than just a career, NAB Vietnam offers you a flexibility to balance your work - life, the opportunity to grow as professionals, people and a complete set of well-being offerings. If you have an appetite to learn, grow and elevate others around you, this is the place for you. IT'S MORE THAN MONEY We naturally also provide a very competitive remuneration package but a career with us is about a lot more than money. We believe in people with ideas and dreams, and we want you to achieve your aspirations. We will work together to deliver exceptional products and outcomes that push the limits of our own aspirations. Our passion for creating value and exceeding our customers' expectations means we are constantly striving to redefine our standards of excellence. You will have our backing to develop and our encouragement to explore, realize and reach your full potential.

Apply modern architecture patterns such as Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Event-Driven Architecture, and Microservices to solve real-world engineering problems. Lead the architecture and technical design of cloud-native applications on AWS and/or Azure, ensuring high availability, performance, security, and cost efficiency. Work closely with cross-functional Agile/Scrum teams including Product Owners, Business Analysts, Developers, QA, and DevOps to deliver high-quality solutions. Translate business requirements into clear technical architecture and system design specifications. Conduct design and code reviews to ensure adherence to architectural principles, coding standards, and security best practices. Provide hands-on technical guidance and mentorship to engineers and technical team members. Collaborate with DevOps teams to ensure effective CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and cloud deployment practices. Evaluate and recommend relevant technologies, tools, and frameworks to improve system quality and delivery efficiency. Contribute to continuous improvement of engineering practices, architecture standards, and development processes. Your Skills and Experience 1. Must have: Experience in Agile/Scrum and AWS/Azure + Kubernetes . Strong understanding and practical application of: Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Event-Driven Architecture, Microservices Cloud-native architecture principles Experience designing and delivering production systems in at least one backend technology: .NET, Java (Spring/Quarkus/Micronaut), Python, Go, Node.js Good understanding of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and infrastructure-as-code concepts. Ability to design system architecture using C4 Model and/or UML diagrams. 2. Nice to have: Experience with Kafka/Event streaming Multi-cloud or large-scale systems Experience using GenAI-powered development tools (e.g., AI-assisted coding, code generation, review automation) to improve software delivery efficiency. Experience in designing or integrating AI agents (Agentic AI) into software development workflows, such as automated coding assistants, testing agents, or DevOps automation agents Personal Qualifications: Strong leadership, mentoring, and coaching skills Good communication and problem-solving High ownership and willingness to learn Proactive, collaborative, and continuously improving engineering practices. Passionate about modern software architecture and cloud technologies. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Flexibility to perform You Embrace the Freedom to Be Yoursel Access to high technology and modern working The Job Làm việc với khách hàng để thu thập yêu cầu, phân tích, phát hiện cơ hội đầu tư, mua sắm và đề xuất các giải pháp về Cloud / Storage / Backup / HCI / Virtualization. Xây dựng tài liệu, lên danh mục thiết bị và viết giải pháp kỹ thuật đáp ứng yêu cầu cụ thể của từng dự án. Thực hiện PoC (Proof of Concept), demo giải pháp cho khách hàng cũng như tham gia trực tiếp công việc triển khai và hỗ trợ kỹ thuật trong các dự án. Hỗ trợ đối tác vận hành mức cao: phân tích log, data flow, packet capture, I/O để xử lý root cause trên hệ thống. Đào tạo & chuyển giao công nghệ cho khách hàng sau triển khai. Your Skills and Experience Tốt nghiệp đại học: An toàn thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, Công nghệ thông tin, Điện tử viễn thông, Điện tử truyền thông, … hoặc các chuyên ngành có liên quan. Có kiến thức chuyên sâu về các công nghệ: Compute Infrastructure , Server Virtualization , Containerization , AI Computing , HCI, Software Defined Data Center (SDDC ), … Thành thạo Windows Servers , Linux (RedHat based/Debian based Linux…) Hiểu biết về các tiêu chuẩn và quy định bảo mật: ISO 27001 , GDPR , PCI - DSS , … ứng dụng trong mảng Máy chủ và Ảo hóa. Kỹ năng viết tài liệu giải pháp kỹ thuật, kỹ năng giao tiếp và trình bày thuyết phục, khả năng nghiên cứu, học hỏi và nắm bắt nhanh các công nghệ mới. Ưu tiên ứng viên có một trong các chứng chỉ quốc tế của các hãng: Dell , HPE, VMWare , IBM, Microsoft , LPI , RedHat , … hoặc tương đương. The role supports daily operations, incident handling, system monitoring, and infrastructure optimization to ensure committed SLAs and stable IT operations. Key Responsibilities Operate, monitor, and maintain server infrastructure and related IT services. Ensure system availability, stability, and performance in compliance with committed SLAs. Perform system checks, troubleshooting, incident handling, and corrective actions. Deploy, maintain, upgrade, and optimize server systems and related technologies. Manage server configurations, system assets, operational procedures, and infrastructure standards. Monitor resource utilization, maintain capacity planning, and improve operational efficiency. Participate in change management, configuration management, and CAB activities. Implement and maintain security solutions related to server infrastructure. Coordinate with related teams and vendors to resolve incidents and improve service quality. Prepare operational checklists, reports, and technical documentation Your Skills and Experience Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, related field, or equivalent working experience. Minimum 3 years of experience in server infrastructure operations or related system administration roles. Strong knowledge of Windows Server, AIX, Linux, VMware, and related platform services. Strong understanding of server infrastructure, networking, security, database systems, and DC–DR infrastructure. Experience operating and administering enterprise server platforms and infrastructure systems. Experience troubleshooting and resolving issues on server platforms during operation. Experience working with server products, platform services, and infrastructure management solutions. Knowledge of Exchange, SMTP, Active Directory, Open Directory, and directory services. Good communication and technical reporting skills. Ability to work effectively within highly technical teams. Nice to Have MCSA certification. ACSP or ACTC certification. Experience working with enterprise monitoring and server optimization solutions. Experience in server infrastructure standardization and configuration management. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Server & Virtualization Management (Primary Focus) Administer and optimize x86 server hardware (such as HP and Dell) and operating systems, including RHEL and Windows Server. Manage, operate, and troubleshoot virtualization layers, specifically VMware and Hyper-V. Ensure robust system security by executing regular patching and OS hardening processes. Infrastructure Support (Database & Storage) Provide operational support for Oracle and MSSQL databases, managing daily monitoring, backups, and restore tasks. Administer SAN/NAS storage systems, which includes LUN provisioning and ongoing health monitoring. Operational Stability & Vendor Coordination Monitor system performance continuously to ensure the high availability of all banking services. Establish, update, and maintain comprehensive IT Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs). Coordinate directly with external vendors to manage maintenance schedules and resolve complex technical issues. Your Skills and Experience Must-Have At least 5 years of IT infrastructure operations, with mandatory prior experience in the Banking or Financial sector. High proficiency in Linux/Windows server administration and setting up virtualization environments. Solid basic understanding of SAN storage systems and Database (SQL) management. A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related discipline. Intermediate English proficiency, with the ability to comfortably conduct technical discussions and read/write technical documentation. Nice-to-Have Familiarity and understanding of the State Bank of Vietnam (SBV) IT regulations, specifically Circular 09/2020. Hands-on experience participating in IT setups for new branches/subsidiaries or managing large-scale system migration projects. Holding relevant professional IT certifications, such as VCP, MCSE, or OCP. Why You'll Love Working Here Itviec's Client is currently representing a premier 100% foreign-owned bank from South Korea, a dominant force in East Asian finance with over 60 years of heritage. As a leader in corporate and digital banking, our client is aggressively expanding its tech hub in Vietnam to redefine cross-border financial services. This is a rare opportunity to join a global financial giant that combines a long-standing reputation for stability with a forward-thinking approach to digital transformation and Fintech innovation. 3 Reasons Why You Should Join Global Prestige & Career Stability: Work for a top-tier international bank known for its rock-solid financial foundation. You will benefit from a professional, structured environment that follows global banking standards, offering long-term career security and a clear path for professional growth. Premium Compensation & Benefits: Beyond a highly competitive salary, you will enjoy the elite "Banking-standard" benefit package, including generous performance bonuses (13th month and beyond), comprehensive premium health insurance, and attractive allowances that stand out in the tech market. High-Impact Fintech Projects: Get hands-on experience with sophisticated Core Banking systems, cross-border payment gateways, and advanced security architectures. You will collaborate directly with international experts from the HQ, gaining invaluable exposure to global financial technologies and "system-thinking" methodologies.

job_title: Chuyen gia an ninh mang Cybersecurity, Networking
company_name: Trung tâm công nghệ thông tin MobiFone
job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Môi trường làm việc năng động, chuyên nghiệp Cơ hội thăng tiến cao trong công việc Chế độ đãi ngộ và phúc lợi tốt The Job 1. Nghiên cứu, đề xuất xây dựng kiến trúc an ninh mạng: Nghiên cứu, đề xuấtthiết kế và triển khai các kiến trúc bảo mật cho hệ thống CNTT và các hệ thống tuân thủ các chuẩn bảo mật của Việt Nam. 2. Giám sát và phát hiện tấn công: Triển khai và vận hành các hệ thống giám sát an ninh mạng (Security Monitoring) để phát hiện sớm các dấu hiệu tấn công hoặc hành vi bất thường trong hệ thống. 3. Triển khai và vận hành các giải pháp an toàn thông tin: Triển khai và vận hành các giải pháp hệ thống an toàn thông tin đảm bảo hệ thống CNTT, dữ liệu và hạ tầng mạng. 4. Phân tích và xử lý sự cố an ninh: Thực hiện điều tra và xử lý các sự cố an ninh mạng (Incident Response), bao gồm: phân tích log hệ thống, phân tích malware, điều tra tấn công APT, khôi phục hệ thống sau sự cố. 5. Đánh giá lỗ hổng và kiểm thử bảo mật: Thực hiện đánh giá an ninh hệ thống và Phối hợp với đội phát triển phần mềm để khắc phục lỗ hổng bảo mật trong hệ thống và ứng dụng. 6. Hợp tác giữa các phòng ban Phối hợp với các đội ngũ CNTT, DevOps, Phát triển phần mềm, Vận hành hệ thống để đảm bảo các giải pháp CNTT được triển khai theo tiêu chuẩn bảo mật. Tham gia tư vấn cho ban lãnh đạo về chiến lược an toàn thông tin và quản trị rủi ro CNTT. 7. Nghiên cứu và cải tiến: Theo dõi các xu hướng tấn công mạng mới và nghiên cứu và áp dụng các công nghệ mới nhằm nâng cao năng lực phòng thủ an ninh mạng cho doanh nghiệp. Your Skills and Experience 1. Kinh nghiệm chuyên môn: Có tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực an ninh mạng hoặc an toàn thông tin tại các tập đoàn, doanh nghiệp CNTT tại Việt Nam. Ưu tiên ứng viên đã tham gia thiết kế hoặc triển khai các hệ thống bảo mật cho các hạ tầng CNTT lớn, hệ thống ngân hàng, hệ thống chính phủ hoặc doanh nghiệp công nghệ. Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hoặc vận hành các hệ thống bảo mật như: Firewall, SIEM/SOAR, IDS/IPS, SOC, Endpoint Security, WAF, DLP, PAM/VPN, DBFW… 2. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật: Ứng viên có hiểu biết về bảo mật mạng (Network Security), bảo mật hệ thống (System Security), bảo mật ứng dụng (Application Security), bảo mật đám mây (Cloud Security) và thành thạo các công cụ bảo mật phổ biến như: SIEM/SOAR, vulnerability scanner, network monitoring tools, malware analysis tools…. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ thống: Linux, Windows Server, Network infrastructure, Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) là lợi thế. 3. Kỹ năng hạ tầng Ứng viên có hiểu biết về các công nghệ hạ tầng CNTT như: container và Kubernetes, hệ thống mạng doanh nghiệp, hệ thống lưu trữ dữ liệu, kiến trúc microservices và cloud-native. Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng các mô hình bảo mật như: Zero Trust Architecture, Secure DevOps (DevSecOps) là lợi thế. 4. Kỹ năng phân tích Có tư duy phân tích, khả năng phát hiện và đánh giá rủi ro bảo mật. Có khả năng điều tra và phân tích các sự cố an ninh mạng phức tạp. 5. Yêu cầu khác: Kỹ năng giao tiếp và trình bày tốt, có khả năng giải thích các vấn đề kỹ thuật cho lãnh đạo và đối tác không chuyên về CNTT. Có khả năng làm việc độc lập, đồng thời phối hợp tốt với các nhóm kỹ thuật khác. Tiếng Anh tốt để đọc tài liệu kỹ thuật và trao đổi chuyên môn quốc tế. 6. Trình độ chuyên môn Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành: An toàn thông tin/Công nghệ thông tin/Khoa học máy tính/Hệ thống thông tin hoặc các ngành liên quan. Ưu tiên ứng viên có: Thạc sĩ/Tiến sĩ về an ninh mạng và các chứng chỉ quốc tế như: CISSP, CISM, CEH, OSCP, Security+, AWS Security Specialty,… Why You'll Love Working Here Thu nhập cạnh tranh: Mức lương và thưởng hấp dẫn, thỏa thuận dựa trên năng lực và kết quả. Chế độ phúc lợi: Đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo Luật Lao động, kèm bảo hiểm sức khỏe nâng cao. Chế độ nghỉ phép, nghỉ lễ theo quy định, cộng thêm các phúc lợi nội bộ (du lịch, teambuilding, hội thao, v.v.). Môi trường làm việc: Được trang bị công cụ, phần mềm, nền tảng công nghệ hiện đại để phát triển sản phẩm. Được tham gia vào các chương trình đào tạo và phát triển chuyên môn (workshop, đào tạo nội bộ, học tập công nghệ mới), có chính sách khen thưởng, hỗ trợ chi phí học tập các chứng chỉ quốc tế tế cao cấp/chứng chỉ chuyên môn cao cấp. Cơ hội làm việc với các dự án B2G quy mô lớn, cung cấp sản phẩm, dịch vụ hoặc giải pháp cho các cơ quan, tổ chức chính phủ, tiếp cận những xu hướng công nghệ/nền tảng mới nhất. Môi trường trẻ trung, năng động, minh bạch, văn hóa làm việc chuyên nghiệp, nhiều cơ hội hợp tác với đối tác chiến lược, tập đoàn công nghệ trong và ngoài nước.

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Ngân hàng TMCP hàng đầu Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, minh bạch Cơ hội được đào tạo, phát triển kỹ năng chuyên sâu The Job Trách nhiệm chính Cài đặt mới, cấu hình, cập nhật các bản vá lỗi phần mềm CSDL Oracle, SQL Server Cấu hình các giải pháp nâng cao tính sẵn sàng của hệ thống CSDL Oracle, SQL Server Cấu hình tính năng kiểm toán CSDL. Giám sát hiệu năng các hệ thống CSDL Oracle, SQL Server. Thiết lập các cảnh báo tự động cho hệ thống CSDL, gửi báo cáo hàng ngày tình trạng CSDL thông qua email, SMS. Hỗ trợ tinh chỉnh, tối ưu hóa các câu lệnh truy vấn chậm. Sử dụng tính năng phân vùng, nén, mã hóa dữ liệu trong CSDL giúp tăng hiệu năng, giảm dung lượng lưu trữ, nâng cao tính bảo mật hệ thống CSDL. Tham gia các dự án liên quan đến hệ thống CSDL Oracle, SQL Server. Thực hiện các công việc khác theo sự phân công của cấp quản lý. Your Skills and Experience Yêu cầu công việc: 1. Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm quản trị hệ thống CSDL Oracle Cloud hoặc tương đương. Ưu tiên có kiến thức nghiệm vận hành hệ thống máy chủ chuyên dụng Oracle Exadata. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Job Title: Embedded Linux Engineer (C/C++ | Virtualization | Automotive) We are hiring an Embedded Linux Engineer to work on low-level system software and virtualization technologies for automotive platforms. This role involves working with C/C++, Linux systems, and system-level debugging. This role will be responsible for the development, configuration, integration, and validation of virtualization solutions within our automotive systems. This role requires a deep understanding of hypervisor technology, system-level debugging, and performance optimization. About KPIT: KPIT is a global technology company specializing in providing software solutions and services to the automotive, manufacturing, life sciences, and financial services industries. We are passionate about innovation and creating impactful solutions that drive the future of mobility. At KPIT, you’ll be part of a collaborative and dynamic environment, working on cutting-edge technologies with a team of talented engineers and designers. Chức danh công việc: Kỹ sư Embedded Linux (C/C++ | Ảo hóa | Ô tô) Mô tả công việc: Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng một Kỹ sư Embedded Linux để làm việc với phần mềm hệ thống mức thấp và các công nghệ ảo hóa cho nền tảng ô tô. Vai trò này bao gồm lập trình bằng C/C++, làm việc với hệ điều hành Linux và gỡ lỗi ở cấp độ hệ thống. Vị trí này sẽ chịu trách nhiệm phát triển, cấu hình, tích hợp và kiểm thử (xác nhận) các giải pháp ảo hóa trong hệ thống ô tô của chúng tôi. Công việc yêu cầu hiểu biết sâu về công nghệ hypervisor, gỡ lỗi hệ thống và tối ưu hiệu năng. Về KPIT: KPIT là một công ty công nghệ toàn cầu chuyên cung cấp các giải pháp và dịch vụ phần mềm cho các ngành ô tô, sản xuất, khoa học đời sống và dịch vụ tài chính. Chúng tôi đam mê đổi mới và tạo ra các giải pháp có tác động, định hình tương lai của ngành di chuyển. Tại KPIT, bạn sẽ làm việc trong một môi trường năng động, hợp tác cùng đội ngũ kỹ sư và nhà thiết kế tài năng, trên những công nghệ tiên tiến. Your Skills and Experience Skills & Experience: Must-Have: Strong understanding of hypervisor technologies (e.g., Xen, KVM, VMware). Experience with virtualization concepts and techniques. Proficiency in C/C++ programming. Experience with system-level debugging and troubleshooting. Familiarity with Linux-based systems. Good-to-Have: Experience with automotive embedded systems. Knowledge of real-time operating systems (RTOS). Experience with performance analysis and optimization tools. Familiarity with automotive networking protocols (CAN, Ethernet). Education: Bachelor's degree in computer science, Electrical Engineering, or related field. Kỹ năng & Kinh nghiệm: Bắt buộc: Hiểu biết vững về các công nghệ hypervisor (ví dụ: Xen, KVM, VMware). Có kinh nghiệm với các khái niệm và kỹ thuật ảo hóa. Thành thạo lập trình C/C++. Có kinh nghiệm gỡ lỗi (debugging) và xử lý sự cố ở mức hệ thống. Quen thuộc với các hệ thống dựa trên Linux. Ưu tiên: Có kinh nghiệm với các hệ thống nhúng trong lĩnh vực ô tô. Kiến thức về hệ điều hành thời gian thực (RTOS). Có kinh nghiệm với các công cụ phân tích và tối ưu hiệu năng. Quen thuộc với các giao thức mạng ô tô (CAN, Ethernet). Học vấn: Tốt nghiệp Cử nhân ngành Khoa học Máy tính, Kỹ thuật Điện/Điện tử, hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan. Why You'll Love Working Here One of the best company is IT services & products globally

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Job Summary: The SOME/IP Protocol Engineer will be responsible for the planning, deployment, and maintenance of the Scalable service-Oriented MiddlewarE over IP protocol stack, a critical component of our autonomous driving system. This role involves designing network topologies, developing toolchains, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure successful integration and mass production. Responsibilities: Plan and deploy the SOME/IP protocol stack, including core functions such as service discovery, remote procedure call, and event notification. Design and propose robust network topology solutions based on SOME/IP technology to enhance communication efficiency and scalability within the autonomous driving system. Participate in the development and maintenance of a toolchain supporting the SOME/IP protocol. Collaborate closely with hardware and algorithm teams to facilitate the successful mass production application of the protocol stack. Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to SOME/IP communication and integration. Contribute to the documentation of the SOME/IP implementation and network architecture. Your Skills and Experience Skills & Experience: Must-Have: Strong understanding of the SOME/IP protocol and its underlying concepts. Experience with network protocol design and implementation. Proficiency in C++ programming. Experience with Linux-based systems. Strong problem-solving and analytical skills. Good-to-Have: Experience with automotive networking technologies (e.g., Ethernet, CAN). Familiarity with AUTOSAR architecture. Experience with robotics or autonomous driving systems. Knowledge of service-oriented architecture (SOA). Education: Bachelor's degree in computer science, Electrical Engineering, or related field. Why You'll Love Working Here • 20MN+ vehicles on road are powered by KPIT software • 14+ Software Centers of Excellence Globally • 25+ Years Focus on Auto & Mobility • 13K+ Software experts passionate of mobility and tech
benefits: • 20MN+ vehicles on road are powered by KPIT software • 14+ Software Centers of Excellence Globally • 25+ Years Focus on Auto & Mobility • 13K+ Software experts passionate of mobility and tech

job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Thu nhập cạnh tranh trên thị trường Bảo hiểm sức khỏe SHBFC Care Chế độ làm việc Hybrid The Job MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC: - Đảm bảo hoạt động hiệu quả và an toàn của tất cả các hệ thống cơ sở dữ liệu trong Khối CN. - Tối ưu hóa hiệu suất và độ tin cậy của cơ sở dữ liệu để hỗ trợ các mục tiêu của tổ chức. NHIỆM VỤ, TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH - Quản trị, vận hành, giám sát hệ thống gồm ảo hóa, hệ điều hành, cơ sở dữ liệu, ứng dụng, đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định. - Triển khai các dự án mới về hạ tầng hệ thống. - Kiểm tra, cập nhật, nâng cấp hệ thống. - Thực hiện sao lưu và phục hồi hệ thống. - Xây dựng hệ thống có độ sẵn sàng cao (HA), dự phòng thảm họa (DR), xây dựng kịch bản switch-over/fail-over, định kỳ switch-over hệ thống. - Xây dựng, cập nhật tài liệu vận hành quy trình, quy định, hướng dẫn công việc. - Hỗ trợ người dùng, các bộ phận phòng ban IT, nghiệp vụ liên quan đến hạ tầng công nghệ, xây dựng các môi trường DEV/TEST/STAGIN. - Thực hiện các công việc khác được lãnh đạo phòng/khối giao. Your Skills and Experience - Tốt nghiệp Đại học về CNTT hoặc các ngành gần (toán tin, viễn thông…) - Có 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc tại vị trí tương đương. - Có kiến thức về hệ thống CNTT, bao gồm hệ điều hành (Windows, Linux), ứng dụng phần mềm, cơ sở dữ liệu (Oracle, Mysql, Postgresql, SQL Server, Elasticsearch); Mảng sản phẩm: server, storage, ảo hóa (Vmware, Oracle KVM…), giải pháp backup (VEEM), giải pháp monitor (Zabbix, Grafana), web server (tomcat, glassfish, weblogic), log tập trung (ELK), container (docker, K8S), message queue (RabbitMQ, Kafka), automation (Ansible, Chef, CI/CD), cloud plaform (AWS, OCI). - Năng lực, kỹ năng chuyên môn: Kỹ năng phân tích, tổng hợp và báo cáo; Khả năng làm việc độc lập và quản lý nhiều công việc cùng lúc; Kỹ năng triển khai dự án tương đối phức tạp (multisite, HA, đáp ứng số lượng user lớn). - Khả năng làm việc hướng tới kết quả; Khả năng sáng tạo và liên tục cải tiến; Khả năng giải quyết vấn đề. Why You'll Love Working Here Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, cởi mở, chú trọng 5 giá trị cốt lõi: “Thông minh – Chính trực – Dũng cảm – Thân thiện – Hợp tác” Thời gian làm việc từ thứ 2 – thứ 6 (40h/ tuần); Chế độ làm việc Hybrid dành riêng cho CBNV khối Công nghệ; Đồng nghiệp thân thiện, cởi mở với tư duy đề cao sự phát triển của mỗi cá nhân; Văn phòng làm việc với không gian mở, rộng rãi, được cung cấp đầy đủ các trang thiết bị để phục vụ cho công việc. This role is both hands-on and strategic — responsible for building and mentoring the database team from the ground up, and driving database modernization initiatives, including migration from SQL Server to MariaDB or PostgreSQL. Key Responsibilities Manage SQL Server and PostgreSQL databases across hybrid cloud (AWS, Huawei Cloud) ensuring 99.9% uptime and performance SLAs Troubleshoot and resolve critical performance issues cause analysis Design and maintain backup, HA, and disaster recovery strategies Define database standards and provisioning for multi-tenant architecture Support SQL Server to MariaDB or PostgreSQL migration initiatives Collaborate with other members of the DBA team in other locations Ensure PDPA compliance and collaborate with internal teams and external vendors Your Skills and Experience observability tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana) Solid knowledge of backup/recovery, high availability (HA), and disaster recovery (DR) Proven experience in crisis management, incident response, and Kubernetes-based database operations Multi-cloud environments (AWS, Huawei Cloud) GitOps and CI/CD practices for database changes Knowledge of PDPA and data protection compliance Scripting skills (Python, Bash, PowerShell) Language Able to communicate in English in a professional working environment (reading technical documents, participating in discussions with international team members) Why job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary and bonus package Premium AON healthcare insurance Fully sponsored training to build your career The Job 1. Design And Implementation - Define the configuration for the database implementation within the organization. This shall include proper sizing and the detail requirement on parameters, file location, etc. - Determine and monitor the capacity and utilization of databases and corresponding hardware. - Determine the upgrade path for over utilized databases and corresponding hardware. - Verify the justification of the database requirement from vendors for their solution installing in the company. - Implement the design in professional manner. - Ensure zero data loss by proper backup/recovery mechanism design. - Ensure the database facilities operating and recovery within the agreed SLA. - Determine the best approach for system protection requirement such as load balancing, failover, remote site protection, etc. - Determine the risks in database facilities and the resolution to rectify the risks. 2. Operation Support - Perform any database cleansing ensuring the health working environment. - Implement ETL, clean up and transform external data to fit the desired format, efficiently importing large volumes of data extracted from multiple systems into a data warehouse environment. - Determine the effectiveness of the restoration for the database by the backup data. - Determine/define the mechanism for the monitoring of the performance & exceptions of the database facilities. - Determine/define the mechanism on detecting any issues happening in the database facilities in the campus. - Rectify the issues immediately if happening. - Perform user administrative activities on database level but not included user administration on application level. - Define/design the operation reports required to summaries the status of the database facilities for management. This shall include the utilization vs capacity, rate of availability, issues, etc. 3. Security & Authentication - Determine potential weaknesses of the database software and the company’s overall system. - Determine how to protect the database facilities. - Implement best practices to minimize security risks. - Set up access policy according to the company’s role matrix to control who has access and what type of access they are allowed. - Set up audit policy. - Consult audit logs in the case of a security breach or irregularity. 4. Documentation & Version Control - Document the design of the database facilities with the detail of diagram, system parameters and requirement, protection mechanism, and other related material as well as its historical changes becoming part of the IT Architecture Dossier. - Prepare the documents keep the latest and historical information of the facilities becoming part of the inventory control of the department. - Maintain the configuration document for each facility keeping the latest configuration parameter, historical changes on parameters in each device, and the method of changing the parameter becoming part of the - Configuration Control and Version Control within the department - Prepare the operation guide for each facility. Your Skills and Experience - University Degrees or above in IT, Computer Mathematics or related subjects. - At least 5 years as Database Administrator in companies in the field of banking, finance, telecommunications or equivalent. - Expert knowledge of Oracle Database (12c and higher) or Microsoft SQL Server Database (2016 and higher), is a must. - IBM DB2, PostgreSQL and MongoDB administrative experience is an advantage. - In-depth experience of databases running on Unix server. - Solid experience in supporting High Availability database environment: various operating systems, clustering, HA, event debugging and issue resolution. - Proficiency in using PLSQL (or T-SQL, PL/pgSQL ...) is a strong advantage. - Experience of database tuning and capacity planning is an advantage. - Experience with securities trading systems is an advantage. - Knowledge with security model to manage risks through patching or innovative techniques. - Good presentation, written and verbal communication skill. - Communication skills, communication confidence, teamwork, good customer relations. - Ability to work independently, under pressure and large. job_description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Design, implement, and maintain PostgreSQL and MySQL databases, including database schema design, table creation, index optimization, and stored procedure/function development. Monitor database performance, identify bottlenecks, and implement optimization strategies to ensure high efficiency and stability. Manage database backup and recovery strategies, perform regular backups, test recovery processes, and ensure data integrity and disaster recovery readiness. Troubleshoot database-related issues (e.g., connection errors, performance anomalies, data corruption) in a timely manner, provide root cause analysis and solutions. Cooperate with the development team to provide DB services, review and optimize SQL statements provided by developers. Implement and maintain database security measures, including access control, data encryption, and compliance with data protection regulations. Participate in database migration projects (e.g., from MySQL to PostgreSQL, or between different versions) and ensure smooth transition with minimal downtime. Document database architectures, configurations, procedures, and troubleshooting guides; keep technical documentation up-to-date. Stay up-to-date with the latest features and best practices of PostgreSQL and MySQL, and propose improvements to the database infrastructure. Your Skills and Experience Technical Skills 3+ years of hands-on experience in managing and optimizing PostgreSQL and MySQL databases in a production environment. Proficient in PostgreSQL and MySQL database design, schema optimization, query tuning, and performance monitoring. Familiar with database backup, recovery, and disaster recovery strategies (e.g., point-in-time recovery, replication). Skilled in writing and optimizing SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and triggers. Knowledge of database security practices, including user access control, data encryption, and vulnerability management. Experience with database migration, data import/export, and integration with ETL tools is a plus. Familiar with Linux/Unix operating systems, shell scripting, and DevOps tools is preferred. Familiar with database high availability architecture, distributed deployment, data synchronization and migration technology; Understanding of database replication and high-availability solutions. Soft Skills Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting abilities, with a focus on root cause analysis. Excellent communication and collaboration skills, able to work effectively with cross-functional teams. Detail-oriented, responsible, and able to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment. Self-motivated, with a willingness to learn new technologies and adapt to changing requirements. Education & Certifications College degree or above, with over 3 years of relevant database work experience, or a related field (or equivalent work experience). Relevant certifications (e.g., PostgreSQL Certified Professional, MySQL Certified Developer/DBA) are a plus. Strong English communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with development teams. Why You'll Love Working Here Working Hours: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday Salary: 15.000.000 - 30.000.000 (based on skills and experience) Career development opportunities in line with the advancement of smart technology Competitive salary and benefits An open work environment with challenging projects Ample learning and growth opportunities, with an emphasis on technological innovation A company culture that values teamwork and individual development
